poem_new_02.text_ar: وش اللي بقى في القلب يا ليل
poem_new_02.translation_en: What remains in the heart, O night, that I haven't revealed

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما أظهرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: I'm not one who usually keeps things, yet something remained despite my denial

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما انا بهاقيٍ عاده بقى شي
poem_new_02.translation_en: I who wanted to forget and find solace with those who moved on

poem_new_02.text_ar: لذا الحين على كثر ما أنكرته ولا بان
poem_new_02.translation_en: But wherever I found myself, I remembered them despite distance and separation

poem_new_02.text_ar: أنا اللي بغيت أنساه واسلى مع السالين
poem_new_02.translation_en: I was given two choices, neither consulted me nor did I consult about them

poem_new_02.text_ar: لكن وين ما لقيت وجهي
poem_new_02.translation_en: One is the companionship that has two faces

poem_new_02.text_ar: تذكرته على مواصله والبعد
poem_new_02.translation_en: The other is upon us like the essence of manners and its tree

poem_new_02.text_ar: خيرت بين أمرين ولا شارني في مقتضاها ولا شرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Between connection with embarrassment or separation without dignity

poem_new_02.text_ar: حداها سواة الرفقة اللي لها وجهين
poem_new_02.translation_en: I don't know which choice is worse if I choose it

poem_new_02.text_ar: وحداها علينا كنه الداب وشجرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: We don't know what's best, but I wish we were neighbors

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما بين الوصل بإحراج ولا الجفا ببزين
poem_new_02.translation_en: Not every choice must bear its fruit

poem_new_02.text_ar: ولا أدري وش اشلى الاختيارين لا اخترته
poem_new_02.translation_en: May we not be among those who suffer when heart and memory conflict

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما ندري وش الخيرة لكن ليت حن دارين
poem_new_02.translation_en: Remembering the connection with loved ones from time to time

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما هو لازم ان كل اختيار له ثمرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Overwhelmed by longing, bearing beyond capacity

poem_new_02.text_ar: على ما لحقنا جعل ماحن من الشاقين
poem_new_02.translation_en: I love them until I tire of them, and love them until they seek my connection

poem_new_02.text_ar: إلى قام كل بين قلبه وذاكرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: When they come, I forgive them, saying there's no excuse needed when feelings are clear

poem_new_02.text_ar: تذكر وصال موالفه بين حين وحين
poem_new_02.translation_en: If I gave them what I gave, I wouldn't multiply it

poem_new_02.text_ar: غلبه اشتياقه واحتمل فوق
poem_new_02.translation_en: Asked about their place, I said in both my eyes

poem_new_02.text_ar: مقدرته، أحبه لين أسجّ منه
poem_new_02.translation_en: They said you stayed up late, I said why wouldn't I for one blessed with beauty

poem_new_02.text_ar: وأحبه لين يجيني يبي وصلي
poem_new_02.translation_en: May God not deprive the eyes that your visions accompany

poem_new_02.text_ar: ولا جا تعذرته، أقوله ولا دونه عذر
poem_new_02.translation_en: Asked about their worth, I said where can I find their equal

poem_new_02.text_ar: والشعور يبين
poem_new_02.translation_en: If love divided Arab hearts in two, I'd know your love is greater

poem_new_02.text_ar: لو أسوق له ما سقت له ما تكاثرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Suffering shared between heart and eye, neither interceding nor excusing

poem_new_02.text_ar: نشد عن مكانه قلت في عيوني الثنتين
poem_new_02.translation_en: He moved from his place, I said in my two eyes

poem_new_02.text_ar: قال أسهرت موقك قلت وش عاد لا اسهرته عسى اللي عطاك وميّزك في ذوات الزين
poem_new_02.translation_en: He said I kept your fire awake, I said what else could I do but keep it awake, may He who gave you and distinguished you among the beautiful ones

poem_new_02.text_ar: ما يحرم عيون اللي طيوفك معاشرته ونشد من غلاه وقلت له وين ولا منين
poem_new_02.translation_en: The eyes that your phantom accompanies are not deprived, and I pulled him from his passion and asked where are you from

poem_new_02.text_ar: أبلقى مثل وصفه مثل ما تبصرته لو أن الغلا يقسم قلوب العرب قسمين
poem_new_02.translation_en: I will find someone like him as I have seen him, even if love divides the hearts of Arabs into two parts

poem_new_02.text_ar: عرفت ان غلاك أكبر من اللي تصور مع اللي تناصفه الشقا بين قلب وعين
poem_new_02.translation_en: I knew your love was greater than what one imagines, with one who shares suffering between heart and eye

poem_new_02.text_ar: فلا ذا بيشفع له ولا ذي بعاذرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Neither this one will intercede for him nor that one will excuse him

poem_new_02.text_ar: مقفي وهو يرجي حد يتبع المقفين
poem_new_02.translation_en: Following while hoping someone will follow those who follow

poem_new_02.text_ar: على غير وده والمقادير جابرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Against his will, and fate has compelled him

poem_new_02.text_ar: حفظ ما مضى والله على المقبلات يعين
poem_new_02.translation_en: May what has passed be preserved, and may God aid in what is to come
poem_new_02.imagery_tags: time, divine providence, past and future

poem_new_02.text_ar: مقدر ظروفك لو ظروفك ما قدرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: I appreciate your circumstances even if your circumstances don't appreciate me

poem_new_02.text_ar: ترك لك شعور دافنه من ثمان سنين
poem_new_02.translation_en: He left you feelings buried for eight years

poem_new_02.text_ar: إلين أومرك ربي على القلب وأظهرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Until God commanded you upon my heart and revealed it

poem_new_02.text_ar: على قربكم ما الله كتب للظروف تزين
poem_new_02.translation_en: Despite your closeness, God has not decreed for circumstances to improve

poem_new_02.text_ar: في نفس البلد لا عاد زارك ولا زرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: In the same country, he neither visited you nor did you visit him

poem_new_02.text_ar: يسافر يخاف الشوق واللي جحده يبين
poem_new_02.translation_en: He travels fearing longing, and what he denied becomes clear

poem_new_02.text_ar: إلا ضاق ولا اشتاق لك قص تذكرته
poem_new_02.translation_en: Whenever it becomes narrow and yearns for you, I remember its story

poem_new_03.text_ar: اللي عليها القصايد مثل مزن الغمام
poem_new_03.translation_en: She upon whom poems fall like clouds of rain

poem_new_03.text_ar: كم مزنةٍ هلّت إبداع النظم فوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: How many clouds have poured creative verses upon her

poem_new_03.text_ar: ذي عندها الصمت وافي وأبلغ من الكلام
poem_new_03.translation_en: She has silence that is complete and more eloquent than words

poem_new_03.text_ar: تخلف قلوب العرب ويضيع منطوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: She leaves Arab hearts behind and their speech is lost

poem_new_03.text_ar: تلثمت وارتفع في السوق سعر اللثام
poem_new_03.translation_en: She veiled herself and the price of veils rose in the market

poem_new_03.text_ar: واغتاض منها البنيّ ولا برا عوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: The brown-skinned were upset by her and couldn't surpass her

poem_new_03.text_ar: وتبرقعت وبرزت بالحور معنى الهيام
poem_new_03.translation_en: She wore a burqa and revealed with her eyes the meaning of passion

poem_new_03.text_ar: تشيبهوا لها البنات وطيحت سوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: Girls imitated her and their market value fell

poem_new_03.text_ar: إن شبهوها جهد وإن وصفوها حرام
poem_new_03.translation_en: If they compare to her it's effort, if they describe her it's forbidden

poem_new_03.text_ar: هذا اللي لا قالوا مخلاةٍ طروقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: This is what they say about one free to be courted

poem_new_03.text_ar: يهدي نظرها الرضا وشفاهها الابتسام
poem_new_03.translation_en: Her gaze grants contentment and her lips smile

poem_new_03.text_ar: الشهد في ثغرها والسحر في موقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: Honey is in her mouth and magic in her eyes

poem_new_03.text_ar: من ذوقها الناس خلوها محط اهتمام
poem_new_03.translation_en: Because of her taste, people made her the center of attention

poem_new_03.text_ar: إلين صار البعض يلبس على ذوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: Until some started dressing according to her taste

poem_new_03.text_ar: عذروبها إنها لا جات تسبب الازدحام
poem_new_03.translation_en: Excuse her if she comes and causes crowding

poem_new_03.text_ar: ويضيق صدر المكان وصدر معشوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: The place becomes tight as does her admirer's chest

poem_new_03.text_ar: ينافسون العذارى زينها كل عام
poem_new_03.translation_en: Maidens compete with her beauty every year

poem_new_03.text_ar: وهي تتلف أعصابها وتنشف حلوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: While she ruins her nerves and dries her throat

poem_new_03.text_ar: الله يستر عليها من عيون الأنام
poem_new_03.translation_en: May God protect her from people's eyes

poem_new_03.text_ar: من شافها قام ينشدها من عروقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: Whoever sees her asks about her origins

poem_new_03.text_ar: لو أنها ما تمر إلا مرور الكرام
poem_new_03.translation_en: If only she would pass by with noble dignity

poem_new_03.text_ar: إن كان من نافسوها طابت وفوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: If those who competed with her were good and above her

poem_new_03.text_ar: ولو معرفتها مع العالم
poem_new_03.translation_en: Even if knowing her with the world

poem_new_03.text_ar: معرفة سلام أنا أعتقد يعتبر حق من حقوقها
poem_new_03.translation_en: A greeting acquaintance I believe is considered her right

poem0025_sa.text_ar: يا مدوّر الهين ترى الكايد أحلى، اسأل مغني كايدات الطروقي
poem0025_sa.translation_en: O you who seeks the easy path, know that the difficult is sweeter, ask the singer of difficult melodies

poem0025_sa.text_ar: الزين غالي، لكن الأزين أغلى، ولكل شرّاء بضاعة وسوق
poem0025_sa.translation_en: Beauty is expensive, but the more beautiful is more expensive, and every buyer has their merchandise and market

poem0025_sa.text_ar: يا مدوّر الهين ترى الكايد أحلى، اسأل مغني كايدات الطروقي
poem0025_sa.translation_en: The star is high, and the sky above it is higher, whoever surpasses knowledge, another knowledge surpasses me
Welcome difficulty! I said: O difficulty, be easy! Since you want me, you difficulty are my longing
I love to break the mare that acts precious, and I love to tame every wild horse that bolts
I love to travel with clouds that rise high, and I love the lightning's flash above the clouds
I love to stay awake with the full moon that reveals itself, and draw the sun's rays at sunrise

poem0025_sa.text_ar: لي فاق علمٍ، جاه علم يفوق
poem0025_sa.translation_en: O you who took charge of my rebellious heart, remain compassionate to the heart of dignity
Honor the dear one who never humbled himself in life, who drives his life toward noble deeds
I chose you from all people, a companion for the heart, for you are my desire, my way, and my taste

poem0025_sa.text_ar: دامك تبيني؟ فأنت يا صعب شوقي
poem0025_sa.translation_en: I wouldn't search for every adorned person, if not for you being worthy, I wouldn't have given you my heartbeat
The difficult one has arrived/appeared
I said oh difficult one, welcome
As long as you want me?
For you are, oh difficult one, my longing
I love to tame the filly that plays hard to get
I love to tame the filly that plays hard to get
And I love to tame every eye that glances at me
And I love to travel with clouds that rise high
And I love above the clouds the flash of lightning
And I love to stay awake with my full moon that has appeared
And I draw the sun's rays at sunrise

poem0025_sa.text_ar: يا من على ثاير فوادي تولّى
poem0025_sa.translation_en: O you who has taken control over my rebellious heart

poem0025_sa.text_ar: يا من على ثاير فوادي تولّى
poem0025_sa.translation_en: O you who has taken control over my rebellious heart
Keep yourself on the heart of dignity with compassion
Honor the dear one in life
He doesn't seek guidance, driving his life aimlessly

poem0025_sa.text_ar: يا من على ثاير فوادي تولّى
poem0025_sa.translation_en: O you who has taken control over my rebellious heart
Keep yourself on the heart of dignity with compassion
Honor the dear one who in life never sought guidance
He drives his life to the precipices as I drive mine
I chose you from among all people
I chose you from among all people
For the heart, leave it be
Oh wherever you are, you are my desire, my mood, and my taste

poem0025_sa.text_ar: ما رحت أدوّر كل زول تحلّى، لولاك تسوى
poem0025_sa.translation_en: I didn't go searching for every adorned person, without you they're worthless
I didn't give you my heart

poem0027_sa.text_ar: كنت أمسي في حديقة منزلي في الرياض
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I was spending the evening in my home garden in Riyadh

poem0027_sa.text_ar: وكنت صحبة أخ كريم وصديق عزيز
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I was in the company of a generous brother and dear friend

poem0027_sa.text_ar: وهو موجود معنا الآن الأمير خالد بن فهد بن خالد
poem0027_sa.translation_en: And he is present with us now, Prince Khalid bin Fahd bin Khalid
And I was walking with him
I don't know what happened to us that night

poem0027_sa.text_ar: كلنا ساكتين بس نمشي نمشي نمشي
poem0027_sa.translation_en: We were all silent, just walking, walking, walking
And suddenly
He let out that groan
He sighed deeply
I said: May you be safe
What's wrong, Khalid?
He said: What's wrong with me? What have I done?
I burned half of our trees
With your sigh
He said: By God, it doesn't matter
Anyway, we walked a bit more

poem0027_sa.text_ar: بعدين التفت عليه قلت يا ضايق الصدر بالله وسّع الخاطر
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I said: O troubled heart, by God, ease your mind

poem0027_sa.text_ar: دنياك يا أخوي ما تستاهل الضيقة
poem0027_sa.translation_en: Your world, my brother, is not worth the distress
He said: Did I ask you?

poem0027_sa.text_ar: وشو قال لا تقول يا أخوي
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I said: What? He said: Don't say 'my brother'
I said: Why, my brother?

poem0027_sa.text_ar: قال دور لك شي ناعم دور لك شي ناعم دور لك حاجة
poem0027_sa.translation_en: He said: Find something gentle, find something soft, find something

poem0027_sa.text_ar: قلت ليش قال ابي استانس به أنا بعد معك
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I said: Why? He said: I want to enjoy it too with you
I said: Fine, we trust in God
O troubled heart
O troubled heart, by God
Ease your mind
Your world, O beautiful one
You don't deserve the distress
God/Allah

poem0027_sa.text_ar: الله على ما يفرج كربتك قادر
poem0027_sa.translation_en: God is capable of relieving your distress
And God has the judgment/authority
In the aftermath of his creatures
Beautiful eyes
Is it so soft and pleasant, O Khalid?
Oh you with the troubled heart
By God, ease the heart/mind
poem0027_sa.imagery_tags: heart expansion, divine appeal, emotional space

poem0027_sa.translation_en: Your world, oh beautiful one
You don't deserve the distress
God/Allah

poem0027_sa.text_ar: الله على ما يفرج كربتك قادر
poem0027_sa.translation_en: God is capable of relieving your distress
And by God, He has the right
In the aftermath of his creatures
The beautiful eyes have captivated me
Her falling tears

poem0027_sa.text_ar: كف العباير كف العباير حزين الدمع ما أطيقه
poem0027_sa.translation_en: Stop the cloaks, stop the cloaks, the tears are sad and I cannot bear them

poem0027_sa.text_ar: حسائف الحزن حسائف حسائف الحزن يغشى وجهك الط
poem0027_sa.translation_en: Sorrows of grief, sorrows, sorrows of grief overshadow your pure face
Veils of sorrow cover your pure face
And the roses in your cheeks, it's forbidden to drown them
The beautiful eyes were captivated by their flowing tears
The hem of the abayas
The hem of the abayas, tears of sorrow
I cannot bear it
Sorrows of sadness
It covers your pure face
And the roses in your cheeks
It's forbidden to drown him
May he be sacrificed for you

poem0027_sa.text_ar: يفداك قلبٍ على ما تشتهي حاضر
poem0027_sa.translation_en: May a heart that is ready for whatever you desire be sacrificed for you

poem0027_sa.text_ar: يفداك باللي بقى لي من معاليقه
poem0027_sa.translation_en: I sacrifice for you what remains of my precious possessions
What has passed
Let what's gone be gone
And don't worry about tomorrow

poem0027_sa.text_ar: واغنم من اليوم ما ساقت توافيقه
poem0027_sa.translation_en: And seize from today what its fortunes have brought
Thank you

poem0026_sa.text_ar: من يقول الزين ما يكمل حلاه
poem0026_sa.translation_en: Who says beauty cannot be perfected / Everything in my beloved is complete
God is the one who perfected him / And God gave him what left no place for beauty in my beloved
The eyes more beautiful than the eyes of wild deer / My heart saw them and applauded and celebrated

poem0026_sa.text_ar: والله عطاه ما بقى للزين في خلي محل
poem0026_sa.translation_en: His glance from its charm is a flame of life / And the eyelids from shyness have laziness in them
His eyelash arrows on the cheek and its light / As if his cheek's glow is roses and dew
And the lips as if embers of ghada wood / Guarding the saliva sweetened with honey
The hair is night that carried the redness of its evening / Curly falling on his chest
Flowing, not coming from above his shoulders / Not folded, as if a waterfall descended at sunset
His neck launched, competing in its splendor / Above a swaying that separated and straightened

poem0026_sa.text_ar: كن لمعة وجنته ورد وطل، والشفايا
poem0026_sa.translation_en: In grace he has from the desert gazelle / When he walks as if he moves on the wind
His scent selected from every flower / And extra from lavender and clover
Pure, pure like rain on rock / Smiling like good tidings with hope
Gathering from every beauty its ultimate / Impossible to describe my beloved, yet easy
Curly-haired one who coiled upon his chest
Pouring rain that doesn't come from above its back
He did not fold it, even if it were a waterfall
At sunset he descended, his neck stretched forward

poem0026_sa.text_ar: أنطلق جيده يماري في بهاه فوق مياس
poem0026_sa.translation_en: Her neck stretches forth, competing in its beauty above the swaying
She isolated herself and stood upright, with grace
In it is from the gazelle of the wilderness

poem0026_sa.text_ar: لي مشى كنه على الريح انتقل
poem0026_sa.translation_en: When he walked, it was as if he moved upon the wind
His fragrance is selected from every flower
And the abundance is for the lavender and clover

poem0026_sa.text_ar: صافيٍ صافيٍ مثل المطر فوق الصفاة
poem0026_sa.translation_en: Pure, pure like the rain upon the rock
Smiling like glad tidings with hope
Gathering from every beauty its ultimate perfection
It's impossible to describe my beloved
Easy/Simple

poem0029_sa.text_ar: ودنا بالطيب بس الدهر جحّاد طيب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: We desire goodness, but fate denies goodness / Whenever you are sincere with people, it's as if you deceive them

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كل ما تخلص مع الناس كنك تغشها
poem0029_sa.translation_en: Whenever you kindle the fire of love with a beloved / They pull at its embers and extinguish it

poem0029_sa.text_ar: ودنا بالطيب بس الدهر جحّاد طيب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: If your hand extends in loyalty, don't expect what it brings / If it returns safely, kiss your hand and hide it

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كل ما تخلص مع الناس كنك تغشها
poem0029_sa.translation_en: Whenever time falls silent, it's like a stranger's face / As the proverb says, as long as it walks, let it walk

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كل ما شبيت نار المحبة مع حبيب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: This era doesn't care for what is right and proper / May the wood gatherer's straw, when it strays, be gathered
He began pulling at her gray hairs and sprinkling them

poem0029_sa.text_ar: يدك لا مدت وفاء لا تحرى وش تجيب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: When your hand extends in loyalty, you don't know what it will bring
poem0029_sa.imagery_tags: extended hand, gesture of loyalty, unknown outcomes

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كان جاتك سالمة حب يدك وخشها
poem0029_sa.translation_en: If greetings came to you, love your hand and enter it

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كل ماواجهت لك في الزمن وجه غريب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: And whenever silence befalls time, it's like the face of a stranger

poem0029_sa.text_ar: مثل ما قال المثل دام تمشي
poem0029_sa.translation_en: As the proverb says, as long as you keep walking

poem0029_sa.text_ar: يدك لا مدت وفاء لا تحرى وش تجيب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: When your hand extends in loyalty, you don't know what it will bring
poem0029_sa.imagery_tags: extended hand, gesture of loyalty, unknown outcomes

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كان جاتك سالمة حب يدك وخشها
poem0029_sa.translation_en: If greetings came to you, love your hand and enter it

poem0029_sa.text_ar: كل ماواجهت لك في الزمن وجه غريب
poem0029_sa.translation_en: And whenever silence befalls time, it's like the face of a stranger

poem0029_sa.text_ar: مثل ما قال المثل دام تمشي
poem0029_sa.translation_en: As the proverb says, as long as you keep walking
And a group that doesn't call for what is right and true
May the wood gatherer find no wood to gather

poem0033_sa.translation_en: A calamity

poem0033_sa.text_ar: مصيبة لا تردت قيمتك في عين من قيّمت يشوفك في السهل وانت تشوفه في السماء السامي مادام ان جانبي شام لجنابك وانت عني شمت كثر خيرك وأنا لانيب لا جايع ولا ظامي
poem0033_sa.translation_en: A calamity when your value wasn't returned in the eyes of those you valued; you see them in the plains while they see you in the high heavens

poem0033_sa.text_ar: مادام ان جانبي شام لجنابك وانت عني شمت كثر خيرك
poem0033_sa.translation_en: As long as he has turned away from you and you have turned from me, may your goodness increase

poem0033_sa.text_ar: وانا لا نيب لا جايع ولا ظامي اشوف انه علي واجب ليا مريتكم سلمت
poem0033_sa.translation_en: I am neither hungry nor thirsty; I see it as my duty when I passed by you to greet

poem0033_sa.text_ar: مرور أكرام تربطها الكرامة عند الأكرامي
poem0033_sa.translation_en: A passing of honor bound by dignity among the honorable
For the sake of the heart
For the sake of the heart
That upon its throne you sat and rose
And darkness was veiled from you
Until bright days dawned for you
The end of the story
O you of good companionship
You were honored and remained
This is your right upon me
And the right of my strengths over my illusions
The destiny of time
Will explain to us your circumstances
Will explain to you its circumstances
If you become heedless and sleep, time will awaken you
That which awakens everyone who sleeps
Remember me when you put aside your illusions
By whom you imagined and knew the difference
Between the love of noses (pride) and the love of feet (humiliation)
And peace be upon you and God's mercy and blessings

poem0030_sa.text_ar: الجهالة لابن آدم توليه الدبور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Ignorance gives the son of Adam a false sense of direction

poem0030_sa.text_ar: لو طريقه غادٍ يحسب انه متجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Even if his path is wrong, he thinks he's heading right

poem0030_sa.text_ar: يحسب ان ما مثل شهوره مع الأشوار شور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: He thinks his months with thorns are like consultations

poem0030_sa.text_ar: ما يعرف الا مزاجه وللناس أمزجة
poem0030_sa.translation_en: He only knows his mood while people have various moods

poem0030_sa.text_ar: ممكن
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Perhaps he'll find a mood that exchanges feelings with him

poem0030_sa.text_ar: يلقى مزاج يبادله الشعور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Whether through cleverness or deception

poem0030_sa.text_ar: لو على فيلم الشطارة وفيلم الدبلجة
poem0030_sa.translation_en: At journey's end, when you discover what's in hearts

poem0030_sa.text_ar: وآخر المشوار
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Every falsehood has its consultation when speech becomes narrow

poem0030_sa.text_ar: لا حصلت ما في الصدور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: The moon and sun seem to borrow light from him

poem0030_sa.text_ar: كل زور فيه شور ليا ضاق هرجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Mountains move beneath saddled horses

poem0030_sa.text_ar: القمر والشمس كنها تسلف منه نور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: He thinks he has superiority that grants him passage

poem0030_sa.text_ar: والجبال تشير تحت خيول مسرجة
poem0030_sa.translation_en: If he meets salt he shouts at it, if he meets patience he makes it tasteless

poem0030_sa.text_ar: يحسب أن معه أفضلية توليه العبور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: O son of Adam, God curses the arrogant and proud

poem0030_sa.text_ar: ان لقى الملح أزعقه وان لقى الحلو أسمجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Whoever humbles himself before God, He elevates in rank

poem0030_sa.text_ar: يا ابن آدم يلعن الله مختالٍ فخور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: The sky that bird wings failed to reach

poem0030_sa.text_ar: من تواضع تحت ربي يعليه درجة
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Only Muhammad reached it on his night of ascension

poem0030_sa.text_ar: السماء عجزت تصل لها جناحين الطيور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: So you don't enter hell because of arrogance, O Arabs

poem0030_sa.text_ar: ما وصلها إلا محمد بليلة معرجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Try to be humble and show them respect

poem0030_sa.text_ar: لجل ما تدخل جهنم على شان الغرور للعرب
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Whoever finds sweet springs and fruitful flowers

poem0030_sa.text_ar: حاول تواضع وتعطيهم وجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Doesn't keep drawing from the sea and driving his camels

poem0030_sa.text_ar: من لقى عذب المشارب ومثمرة الزهور
poem0030_sa.translation_en: Whoever finds sweet water sources and flowering fruit trees
poem0030_sa.imagery_tags: water, springs, fruit trees, flowers, oasis

poem0030_sa.text_ar: ما قعد يغرف من البحر ويسوق أحدجه
poem0030_sa.translation_en: He didn't sit to scoop from the sea and drive his camels

poem0074_ku.translation_en: Everyone searches for the presence of companionship

poem0074_ku.text_ar: لكن وجود أوناس يفرق عن أوناس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: But the presence of some companions differs from others
And the most beautiful fruits of experience and study
Two things I have that gladden the heart and mind
The first clears away the dust of misery
Observing the flow of souls in breaths
And the second brings the feeling of leadership

poem0074_ku.text_ar: ان قمت في رفع المظالم عن الناس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: When you rise to lift injustices from people
Religion, human lineages, and politics
In them debate plants daggers in livers
In them debate loses its eyes and head
In them man enters the whirlpool of despair
Each pulls sanctity to their banner
And uses the dagger and uses the axe
Strikes the measure of whoever differs from his measure
And from accusations they have trumpets and bells
From his factory of ideas and factory of enthusiasm
With him weapons and pens and fangs and molars

poem0074_ku.text_ar: من خاض فيهن ما يفارق عماسه
poem0074_ku.translation_en: Whoever engages in them doesn't leave his confusion

poem0074_ku.text_ar: يصير قلبه للعداوات محماس من فتنة الأحلاس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: His heart becomes a furnace for enmities from the strife of discord

poem0074_ku.text_ar: يلبس لباسه والرابح اللي يجتنب تلك الأحلاس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: He wears his garment and the winner is who avoids those discords

poem0074_ku.text_ar: اسلك نقاش الدين من عند ساسه
poem0074_ku.translation_en: Conduct religious discussion from its leaders
And don't persist in debate outside the foundation
And all sustenance through flattery

poem0074_ku.text_ar: ما كنه الا دم خنزير في كاس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: Is nothing but pig's blood in a cup
And the wealth that comes from vile activities
A wealth of those without conscience and feeling

poem0074_ku.text_ar: ومن يسكب الأسرار في كل طاسة
poem0074_ku.translation_en: And whoever pours secrets into every cup
He encounters with the days the plague of Amwas
The secret escapes in the absence of guards
Place guards over your heart for secrets
And jest sends guards to the hearts

poem0074_ku.text_ar: احذر لا جالك من المزح عساس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: Beware when humor comes to you as a guard
Some hidden things are discovered through intuition
When a gentle breeze from her stirs the veils
poem0074_ku.imagery_tags: wind, veils, gentle breeze, feminine presence

poem0074_ku.translation_en: Jest and discuss with politeness and tact

poem0074_ku.text_ar: واحذر من التعميم في رمي الأقواس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: And beware of generalization in casting judgments
And when a setback approaches the direction of discussion
Leaving the argument is the most beautiful prize and compass

poem0074_ku.text_ar: وإذا أفضل الأرباح دره وماسه دفع الشرور أغلى من الدر والماس
poem0074_ku.translation_en: And if the best profits are pearls and diamonds, preventing evil is more precious than pearls and diamonds

poem0073_ku.text_ar: يقول قالوا: غني؟ قلت: اعترف ما علي دين. قالوا: لك أعداء؟
poem0073_ku.translation_en: They said: Are you rich? I said: I confess I have no debts. They said: Do you have enemies?

poem0073_ku.text_ar: قلت: عندي قرايب. قالوا: عسى بالمجتمع منصبك زين؟ قلت: احترام الناس حاضر
poem0073_ku.translation_en: I said: I have my relatives. They said: Is your position in society good? I said: People's respect is present

poem0073_ku.text_ar: وغايب. الله مسخّر لي قلوب السلاطين ما رحت في حاجة ورديت
poem0073_ku.translation_en: And absent. God has subjected the hearts of rulers to me, I never went with a need and returned
poem0073_ku.imagery_tags: God's favor, rulers' hearts, fulfilled needs

poem0073_ku.text_ar: خايب. والله ما أحسد جامعين الملايين وأهل المناصب
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Disappointed. By God, I don't envy those who gather millions and those in positions

poem0073_ku.text_ar: حاملين الحقائب.  باليوم لا قدمت خدمة لمسكين أخيَر من منصب
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Carrying briefcases. If I serve a poor person today, it's better than a minister's

poem0073_ku.text_ar: وزيرٍ ونائب. ما ابي مقابلها من الناس الحين ابغي ليا حطت علي
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Or deputy's position. I don't want reward from people now, I want when fate places upon me

poem0073_ku.text_ar: علي النصايب. ابي ثمنها يوم وضع الموازين لا سيقت الأرواح سوق
poem0073_ku.translation_en: The destinies. I reap its price when the scales are set, when souls are driven like
poem0073_ku.imagery_tags: scales of justice, souls, judgment day

poem0073_ku.text_ar: الجلايب. وإن جاك بالدنيا على الطيب تثمين، مثل الرشاوي
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Slaves to market. If worldly appreciation comes to you for good deeds, like bribes

poem0073_ku.text_ar: جالبات المعايب. لا تنتظر يأتي لك الأجر بعدين يا اللي على
poem0073_ku.translation_en: That bring defects. Don't wait for reward to come later, O you who

poem0073_ku.text_ar: المسكين تاخذ ضرائب. وأعمالنا واحد على واحد اثنين مفهوم ما
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Take taxes from the poor. Our deeds are one by one, two, a concept that

poem0073_ku.text_ar: تدخل عليه الشوائب. شيء لوجه الله على الرأس والعين وهذا
poem0073_ku.translation_en: No impurities enter. Something for God's sake, upon head and eyes, and this
poem0073_ku.imagery_tags: purity, God's sake, head and eyes

poem0073_ku.text_ar: الذي تتعب عليها الركائب. شيء لعبدالله طليق الحجاجين
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Is what mounts tire themselves for. Something for Abdullah, free of pilgrims

poem0073_ku.text_ar: والثالثة اللي بينها إلا الهبايب. وزلغى يوم ضاعت
poem0073_ku.translation_en: And the third which has nothing but gifts. And slippery when lost

poem0073_ku.text_ar: تضيع القوانين. تستفحل أمراض الفتن والمصايب. ولا فيه
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Laws are lost. Diseases of discord and calamities spread. And there is no

poem0073_ku.text_ar: علم. إلا ويحتاج تمرين. من شان ما يبقى معطل وسايب. والبعض يرعى
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Knowledge except it needs practice. So it doesn't remain idle and abandoned. Some tend

poem0073_ku.text_ar: العلم رعي البعارين ومداركه مثل البيوت الخرايب. يدرس
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Knowledge like camels graze, and his perceptions like ruined houses. He studies

poem0073_ku.text_ar: علوم في جميع الميادين. لكن عن التنفيذ عاجز وهايب.
poem0073_ku.translation_en: Sciences in all fields. But unable and fearful of implementation

poem0050_sa.translation_en: Beware of leaning and breaking / Try to resist this crowd
O eye / Tell me how much
You bid farewell to the remnants of darkness
The fastest path / To the grave
The truest path in love
The sin is greater than the excuse / And the wound is greater than blame
And the promise / Is the key to patience
And patience is the key to clouds
Nothing resembles betrayal / Except vile revenge
O passerby of this world, pass through / Stand firm, for permanence belongs to God
And beware of leaning and breaking / Try to resist this crowd
And if they stab us in the back / Be sure that you are ahead
And patience is the key to the clouds
There is nothing like treachery
Only the vile seeks revenge
O passerby of this world, pass through
Stand firm, for permanence belongs to God alone
And beware lest you lean and break
Try to resist this crowd
And when you came, you stabbed us in the back
Make sure you are in the front

poem0081_ku.text_ar: البنت من رجالها والخيل من خيالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: A girl is known by her men, and horses by their riders

poem0081_ku.text_ar: والضبعة العرجاء تحوم تبي عشاء لعيالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And the limping hyena circles seeking dinner for her cubs

poem0081_ku.text_ar: هذا من الشعر القديم ما قالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: This is from ancient poetry, not what he said

poem0081_ku.text_ar: أمثال من قول البدو مدري من اللي قالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Proverbs from Bedouin sayings, I don't know who said them

poem0081_ku.text_ar: الفطن يفهم مقصدي، ومالي ومالك
poem0081_ku.translation_en: The wise understands my purpose, what's mine and yours

poem0081_ku.text_ar: لا ضاقت الدنيا علي، سلمى تهز جبالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: When the world becomes narrow for me, Salma shakes its mountains

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ما أضيق لو غيري يضيق وما هو موقّف لي طريق
poem0081_ku.translation_en: I don't feel constrained when others do, nothing blocks my path

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وعيال شمر لابتي صكت علي رجالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And the sons of Shammar, when I called, their men answered

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ما اضيق لو غيري يضيق وماهو موقف لي طريق وعيال شمّر لابتي صكت علي رجالها عبدة مع الصايح جميع والشمرية ما تضيع
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Abda with all who call, and the Shammari never lose

poem0081_ku.text_ar: شمر ليا ضاق الزمن كلٍ يقول أنا لها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Shammar, when times are hard, each says 'I am for her'

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وانا غريري يا بعدي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And I am Ghurairi, oh my distance

poem0081_ku.text_ar: حفيد بن حاتم عدي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Grandson of Ibn Hatim Adi

poem0081_ku.text_ar: عيال عدي العدوات
poem0081_ku.translation_en: The sons of Adi of the raids

poem0081_ku.text_ar: كلٍ يعرف أفعالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Everyone knows their deeds

poem0081_ku.text_ar: يا بنت قومي والعبي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Oh girl, rise and play

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ابا اتفاخر بنسبي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: I want to boast of my lineage

poem0081_ku.text_ar: من غبنها بعض النفوس يصيبها سلالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: From its injustice, some souls suffer consumption

poem0081_ku.text_ar: تفاخري بي يا مرة
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Boast of me, oh woman

poem0081_ku.text_ar: الذل ما فيه ثمرة
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Humiliation bears no fruit

poem0081_ku.text_ar: كم سربة من ذلها كلٍ شرب فنجالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: How many groups from their humiliation, everyone drank their cups

poem0081_ku.text_ar: صرنا طنايا من طنا
poem0081_ku.translation_en: We became echoes from our echoing

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ما هو طرب ولا غناء
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Not joy nor singing

poem0081_ku.text_ar: صرنا طنايا من طنا ما هو طرب ولا غناء
poem0081_ku.translation_en: We became echoes from our echoing, not joy nor singing

poem0081_ku.text_ar: أشد لحظات الزعل فال الله ولا فالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: The harshest moments of anger, may God not bring them

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وما فيه نجدي وجزري، الشمري
poem0081_ku.translation_en: There's no Najdi or Jaziri, the Shammari

poem0081_ku.text_ar: هو شمري، بأي ديرةٍ فيها نزل زمّ الحمول وشالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: He is a Shammar tribesman, in whichever land he settles, he gathers the caravans and leads them

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وفيني حميّا وأسلمي ولا لحيسة محزمي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: I have passion within me, so surrender, and don't let confusion bind you

poem0081_ku.text_ar: لا عدت بيوت العرب متشيد منزالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: May the houses of Arabs not be rebuilt after their destruction

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وان صرت عبدي ضيغمي سنعوس دمي ولحمي
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And if you become my slave, my lion, fierce and proud, my blood and flesh

poem0081_ku.text_ar: عبدة سناعيس الفخر تعجز تعد أبطالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: The servants of glory's banners, unable to count their heroes

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وان قلت أنا زوبع فخر أهل المراجل والسطر
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And if I said I am a whirlwind, the pride of brave men and lineage

poem0081_ku.text_ar: شيوخ شمر منهم اللي يظل ظلالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: The sheikhs of Shammar, among them are those whose shade remains

poem0081_ku.text_ar: عرّب وليدك عرّبه وكاس المراجل شربه
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Arabize your child, Arabize him, and let him drink from the cup of manhood

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وخل العلوم مفرقة من دقها وجلالها ما يزعل الناس المديح
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Leave the sciences scattered in their minutiae and grandeur, praise does not upset people

poem0081_ku.text_ar: خص إذا مدحك صحيح والعفن تلقى المرجلة تقصر عليه حبالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Especially when your praise is true and the rotten one finds that manliness's ropes fall short of reaching him

poem0081_ku.text_ar: واعرف ولو طال الزمن
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And I know, even if time stretches long

poem0081_ku.text_ar: الطيب يبقى له ثمن
poem0081_ku.translation_en: Goodness always has its price

poem0081_ku.text_ar: واعرف ترى نفسك تبي تجزا بنوع أعمالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And know that your soul will be rewarded according to its deeds

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وانا ولاني مستضيق
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And I am not distressed

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ولا هو موقف لي طريق
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And it is not a position for me to take a path

poem0081_ku.text_ar: وعيال شمر لابتي صكت علي رجالها
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And the sons of Shammar, when my tribe called upon its men

poem0081_ku.text_ar: ولا عليكم زود
poem0081_ku.translation_en: And it's no burden upon you

poem0066_ku.text_ar: أمشي السالفة من طيب نياتي أمشي السالفة من طيب نياتي لو هي على وجهها ولا مقفاها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: I proceed with matters from my good intentions, whether they go right or wrong

poem0066_ku.text_ar: ما دامني صح لا أفكر ولا أحاتي والي نوى لي بنية سوء يلقاها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: As long as I'm truthful, I don't think or worry, and whoever intends evil for me will find it returned

poem0066_ku.text_ar: أشوف ناس تضاعفني من سكاتي ما تدري النفس عدتها من رضاها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: I see people who think my silence is weakness, not knowing the soul's strength comes from its contentment

poem0066_ku.text_ar: وأشوف ناس تبي تكسر طموحاتي والحمد لله اجيها وأتعداها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: I see people wanting to break my ambitions, but thank God I reach them and surpass them

poem0066_ku.text_ar: يا مدور الشعر يوم تدور أبياتي
poem0066_ku.translation_en: O seeker of poetry, when you seek my verses

poem0066_ku.text_ar: يا ماجد فريح يوم تدور أبياتي
poem0066_ku.translation_en: O Majed Fareeḥ, when you seek my verses

poem0066_ku.text_ar: ابشر بمزنة تهل ولا وقف ماءها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: Rejoice in a rain cloud that pours and never stops its water

poem0066_ku.text_ar: همّت ودمّت هواها صرصرٍ عاتي سويتها يوم رب العرش سواها
poem0066_ku.translation_en: It thundered and roared, its wind a fierce gale, I made it when the Lord of the Throne created it

poem0067_ku.text_ar: وش يرفع الي هاقيِ فيه لا طاح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: What can lift up one who has already fallen

poem0067_ku.text_ar: انا اشهد ان طيحته ما هي بطيحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: I testify that his fall is no ordinary fall

poem0067_ku.text_ar: وأحرّ منها لا تذكرت ما راح يوم نصحوك ولا سمعت النصيحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: And more painful when I remember what's gone, the day they advised you but you didn't heed the advice
I stood with him in worry, sorrow and joy
And I got angry for his sake with a scarred face
And what I gained were worries, stabs and wounds
Woe to him who did his deeds, woe to him

poem0067_ku.text_ar: يا طير يوم اني دعيتك بملواح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: O bird, when I called you with a wave
Move away, friend, and let out a cry

poem0067_ku.text_ar: ما هو عشانك طنب القلب بصياح أصيح من هم من عسى الله يزيحه
poem0067_ku.translation_en: It's not for you that my heart cries out, I cry from worry that may God remove

poem0067_ku.text_ar: يا طير يوم اني دعيتك بملواح ابتعذر فيك وأجر صيحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: O bird, when I called you with a wave, pass by friend and let out a cry

poem0067_ku.text_ar: ما هو عشانك طنب القلب بصياح أصيح من هم من عسى الله يزيحه
poem0067_ku.translation_en: It's not for you that my heart cries out, I cry from worry that may God remove

poem0067_ku.text_ar: القلب قفل ولا لقى القفل مفتاح واللي تردى بي عسى الله يبيحه أخيل
poem0067_ku.translation_en: The heart is locked and found no key for the lock, and whoever wronged me, may God permit it

poem0067_ku.text_ar: برق العز من وين ما لاح ولا أخيل برّاق النفوس الشحيحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: I don't imagine the lightning of glory from wherever it shines, nor imagine the lightning of stingy souls

poem0067_ku.text_ar: الله خلقني للثقيلات نطاح أتعب وهم قلوبهم مستريحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: God created me to bear heavy burdens, I toil while their hearts are at ease
If you see me at ease, I'm not at ease
I laugh while the spacious narrows in my eye
Sought after, and before me are barriers and spears
Being near her is dangerous and my rejection is scandalous

poem0067_ku.text_ar: ما أخاف لكني بلا درع وسلاح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: I don't fear but I'm without armor and weapon

poem0067_ku.text_ar: ما قد دنيت سلاح كود القريحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: I never approached a weapon except the sharpness of wit
My dignity comes before losses and gains
May God preserve you, O true knowledge

poem0067_ku.text_ar: خسرت لي قوم على شان الانصاح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: I lost my people for the sake of giving sincere advice
I was honest with people thinking they were honest too
People are divided by concepts of reform
And they gathered around the platter and the slaughtered feast
People are divided by concepts of reform
And they gathered around the platter and the slaughtered feast

poem0067_ku.text_ar: لو قلد الجاهل من العقل بوشاح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: If the ignorant one were adorned with a sash of wisdom
You find with him the liver of the resting camel wounded

poem0067_ku.text_ar: لو يسكت العاقل ولا أدلى بالافصاح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: Better for the wise man to remain silent than to reveal and disclose
You find the expressions of gazes eloquent

poem0067_ku.text_ar: والله خلق لي عقل ماني بمداح
poem0067_ku.translation_en: And God created for me a mind, I am not a flatterer

poem0067_ku.text_ar: ولا اشره على ذم الزمان ومديحه
poem0067_ku.translation_en: And I do not yearn for blaming or praising time
A time of change when the winds shifted direction
And the ships of ignorance sailed with its wind
You want to leave your companion

poem0067_ku.text_ar: وأنت مرتاح لا شفته أخطأ عاتبه في نصيحة
poem0067_ku.translation_en: And while you are at ease, if you see him err, reproach him with advice

poem0065_ku.text_ar: يا بنت ياللي ما ستر راسك الشال وبزعمچ انچ من كبار العوائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: O girl who doesn't cover her head with a shawl, and you claim you're from noble families

poem0065_ku.text_ar: انا بقول الحق والحق ينقال اللي تتستر ذيك بنت الحمايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I speak the truth and truth must be said, the one who covers herself is a daughter of virtue

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ما هوب في كشخه وخاتم وسلسال الستر لعيال الحمايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: It's not about fancy dress, rings and chains, modesty is what matters for virtuous daughters

poem0065_ku.text_ar: دلايل يا بنت لو قلتي لي المهر بريال والله فلا أعنّز عليك السلايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: O girl, if you asked for a dowry of one riyal, by God I wouldn't deny you noble lineage

poem0065_ku.text_ar: والله لا أخطب اللي على راسها جلال لو كان مطلبها ثمانين حائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: By God, I won't propose to one with a veil on her head, even if her demand is eighty camels

poem0065_ku.text_ar: أنا ليا مني خطبت ابغي عيال ابغي العيال اللي تشيل الثقايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: When I propose, I want children, I want children who can bear heavy burdens

poem0065_ku.text_ar: لا من خطبت اختار لعيالي الخال والدين عندي هو سيد الفضائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: When I propose, I choose a good maternal uncle for my children, and religion is the master of virtues to me

poem0065_ku.text_ar: قالت قسم بالله ما شفت رجال مثلك بغى حجر السنين الاوائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: She said: I swear by God I haven't seen a man like you, wanting stones from ancient times

poem0065_ku.text_ar: قلت الصحيح يصح لو مرت أجيال ركب الكدايش غير ركب الاصايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I said: Truth remains true even if generations pass, riding mules is different from riding thoroughbreds

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ما هو بذنبي ما عرفتي لچ رجال ذنب الزمن خلا النشامى قلائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: It's not my fault you don't know real men, it's time's fault that noble men have become few

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ولا نيب لا رجعي ولا جيت خيال ولا شايل سيفي وصايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I'm not someone who retreats or comes as a horseman, nor carrying my sword wandering

poem0065_ku.text_ar: وجايل انسان متعلم ومن ناس عقّال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I'm an educated person from wise people

poem0065_ku.text_ar: وفتحت عن نهج الحضارات
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And I've opened files about civilization paths

poem0065_ku.text_ar: فايل انا وسط المدن ماني بنازل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I'm in the midst of cities, not dwelling in deserts

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ورحّال لو ان ربعي بين ضلعان
poem0065_ku.translation_en: Even though my people are between the ribs of Hail

poem0065_ku.text_ar: حايل وأنام في بيت ومكيف جنرال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And I sleep in a house with central air conditioning

poem0065_ku.text_ar: وأسوق سيارة وعندي موبايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I drive a car and have a mobile phone

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ترى البداوة فعل ما هي بالأشكال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: Bedouinism is in actions, not in appearances

poem0065_ku.text_ar: والسلم ما نرضى عليه البدايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And peace, we don't accept substitutes for it

poem0065_ku.text_ar: و تبعت سلم العود واصبحت وبّال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: I followed the path of oud and became a camel herder

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ونقيت لي من الذود دق وجلائل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And I selected from the camels both young and mature ones

poem0065_ku.text_ar: الطيب لاهل الطيب يبقى ولا زال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: Good remains for good people and always will

poem0065_ku.text_ar: وأعرف سلوم الطيب والشك زايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And I know the good Salloum, and doubt has vanished

poem0065_ku.text_ar: ولا شفت أنا عقال السناعيس ميال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: And I have not seen the headband of noble men tilted

poem0065_ku.text_ar: غصب عليه عقال راسي تمايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: Against his will, the agal on my head sways

poem0065_ku.text_ar: السالفة ما هي بتمييلة عقال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: The matter is not just a tilting of the headband

poem0065_ku.text_ar: السالفة دمٍ في هالعرق سايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: The story is blood flowing in this vein

poem0065_ku.text_ar: يا بنت يوم الدم بعروقنا سال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: O girl, when blood flowed through our veins

poem0065_ku.text_ar: كل على عقله من الفكر شايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: Each person carries thoughts according to their own mind

poem0065_ku.text_ar: لكن لو قلتي لي المهر بريال
poem0065_ku.translation_en: But if you told me the dowry is one riyal

poem0065_ku.text_ar: والله فلا اعنّز عليك السلايل
poem0065_ku.translation_en: By God, I will not make the lineages/descendants precious to you

poem0106_bh.translation_en: You deserve all goodness, O land of the free
O pearl of the Gulf, glory and worthiness
You are through the passage of time, a flame of ideas
Shelter of bird's safety, you are a lighthouse
In every situation, we create glory as remembrance
History bears witness to us, people of civilization
We are the coolness when the world yearns for rain, and we are the inferno that avoids sparks
We are the peaks of the homeland and we are the light of the house, whenever night comes to us we become its day
You are our land and we are your trees, look at the pure water, these are its fruits
When they said Bahrain, we said what a blessed home, for the authentic one never abandons his home
You are true to your promise, fragrances and flowers, and we are the oath that manages its capability
We are with you, we are with you against challenges and dangers, we build the country and live every victory

poem0106_bh.text_ar: حنا البرد لي اشتاقت الدنيا أمطار
poem0106_bh.translation_en: We are the cold that the world yearns for as rain
And we are the hell that avoided its spark

poem0106_bh.text_ar: حنا ذرى الديرة وحنا ضوى الدار
poem0106_bh.translation_en: We are the pinnacle of the homeland and we are the light of the home

poem0106_bh.text_ar: كل ما يجينا الليل صرنا نهاره
poem0106_bh.translation_en: Whenever night comes to us, we become its day

poem0106_bh.text_ar: انتي لنا ارض وحنا لك أشجار
poem0106_bh.translation_en: You are our land and we are your trees
Look at the pure water, these are its fruits

poem0106_bh.text_ar: لي قالوا البحرين قلنا والنعم دار
poem0106_bh.translation_en: When they told us about Bahrain, we said yes indeed, what a home
The one who is noble does not abandon his home
You are, upon your promise, fragrant herbs and flowers
And we are the right hand that wields its power

poem0106_bh.text_ar: حنا معك حنا معك قد التحدي والاخطار
poem0106_bh.translation_en: We are with you, we are with you, against challenges and dangers
poem0106_bh.imagery_tags: standing together, facing threats, collective strength

poem0106_bh.translation_en: We build the nation and live every victory

poem0013_em.translation_en: When the eastern wind blew and pleased me / That which makes the hearts of people content
It reminded me and stirred what's within me / And my tears flowed in streams
For a beloved who turned away and stood against me / After he used to lean towards me
What appeared from the evil of encounters / The envious watchers gloated over him

poem0013_em.text_ar: چيبي، على وليفٍ صدّ واقفى بي
poem0013_em.translation_en: He executed judgment in my absence / And law doesn't judge the absent
They said what's wrong with you, not responding, always anxious / And you don't answer
I said I have no interest in reproach / Nor do I follow the path of those who blame
I take kindness with kindness / And I don't give generously until he's generous with me
And I run my mount in my withdrawal / Blowing through all the expanses
I take kindness with kindness / And I don't give generously until he's generous with me

poem0013_em.text_ar: قالوا وش بك ما تعطي نابي دائما مهوجس
poem0013_em.translation_en: And I run my mount in my withdrawal / Blowing through all the expanses
My heart yearned like an eagle's yearning towards you, my longings intense / I began moaning at every watchtower and reciting at the hilltops
And whoever sees the state of one who melted / Says what's wrong with you from the afflictions
Go and seek treatment and causes / To the doctor and every accountant
The fortune-teller told me / O so-and-so, your stars are setting

poem0013_em.text_ar: ولا اسخي به لين يسخي بي
poem0013_em.translation_en: I said leave my beloved to me / However he wants to treat me
He is my eyes' sleep and my eyelashes / And a neck that sways like a willow
And when he speaks eloquently / He doesn't indulge in idle talk
A banana stalk and the hill's fig / Different from the heat of flames

poem0013_em.text_ar: ولا اسخي به لين يسخي بي
poem0013_em.translation_en: May his separation cause me striving / In the midst of standing, the wound of drying
And I run my camels with my racing camel
It blew through all my expanses

poem0013_em.text_ar: تاق قلبي توق العقابي صوبكم واشواقي سغيبي، قمت أونّ بكل مرقاب
poem0013_em.translation_en: My heart yearned for you like an eagle yearns, and my longings are my torment, I stood moaning at every watchtower
And I recite to the heads of the watchmen
And whoever sees the state of one who has melted away
He said what's wrong with you from the afflictions
Go and see my remedy and my reasons
To the doctor and all my relatives
The fortune teller told me
Oh so-and-so, your stars are setting
I said leave him, my friend is more worthy of me
How does he not want to do anything with me
He is the drowsiness of my eyes and my eyelashes
And a beautiful neck that sways with the graceful movement of the slender one
poem0013_em.imagery_tags: neck, swaying, graceful movement, slender figure

poem0013_em.translation_en: And if he speaks with idle talk, it afflicts me
He doesn't talk nonsense much
A banana stalk and the spring fig
poem0013_em.imagery_tags: banana tree, fig, spring, fruit, nature

poem0013_em.translation_en: Different from the scorching heat of the burning flames
Perhaps he sought through his separation to afflict me
In the midst of his standing, the wound of my misfortune
Pray upon the Prophet and my companions
And they remembered Allah, the Knower of the unseen

poem0011_em.text_ar: أنا قلت يا نسيم البر بسألك
poem0011_em.translation_en: I said, O breeze of the land, I will ask you / How is the state of the blissful one from Al-Oudi
He said his state is different from yours / In happiness and his days are fortunate
And you, O tormented one, the perishing / No one asks about you, nor are you sought
One who rests like your resting place / Does not spend nights conversing with the dunes
I said I am patient on that / Bound by faith and my covenants
He said don't let it cross your mind / That that time will return
I said I am owned and the owner / Has contracts of his ownership over me
He said I pity your state / But I have no purpose with him
How many like you have died / Because of the softness of cheeks
I told him may rain fall on your orbit / Don't blame the generous people
My way and your way are complete / In preservation, O gentle one of the dunes
And my aspiration/desire
And my aspiration/desire
The one who takes a midday rest like your resting place
Your midday rest
He doesn't stay up conversing with the oud
The one who calls/summons
I said I am patient
This is a dialogue with the wind
Yes, indeed
I said I am patient with that
That
Bound by faith and my covenants
My promises/covenants

poem0011_em.text_ar: قال لا يطرا على بالك أن ذاك الوقت بيعود
poem0011_em.translation_en: He said don't let it cross your mind that those times will return
He will return
I said I am the owned/enslaved one
And the owner has my contracts for my possession with him
He said I am concerned about your condition
And I have no intention regarding it
True/Correct

poem0011_em.text_ar: كم من لي ماتوا من أمثالك
poem0011_em.translation_en: How many of mine have died from the likes of you
And the reason is the blush of my cheeks
The cheeks

poem0011_em.text_ar: قلت له يعل الدنا فالك لا تعاذل عن أهل الجود
poem0011_em.translation_en: I told him may fortune be yours, do not blame the generous people
God is greatest

poem0011_em.text_ar: تم منوالي ومنوالك في الحفظ يا ريّف النودي
poem0011_em.translation_en: My pattern and your pattern remain preserved, O gentle one of generosity
God is greatest

poem0016_em.text_ar: يقول الغنامي بس من الهجران والفرقى
poem0016_em.translation_en: Al-Ghanami says, enough of separation and parting
You are the lock of my heart and its key
When the plant of love is not watered, its stem dries and leaves are lost
In love, even if I toil and suffer, your hardship, my beloved, is comfort
Where can I find someone like you among people, O full moon illuminating the space
In your eyes is a blue depth where people drown swimming, many have drowned there, I drowned as captain of navigation
poem0016_em.imagery_tags: blue eyes, drowning, sea, captain, navigation

poem0016_em.text_ar: يبس عوده والورق تاحه في الهوى
poem0016_em.translation_en: Its branch dried up and the leaves fell in the wind of passion
poem0016_em.imagery_tags: dried branch, fallen leaves, wind, decay

poem0016_em.translation_en: Even if through hardship and suffering
Your tiredness, my beloved, is comfort
O full moon, O illuminator of the courtyard
In your eyes there is a blue mist

poem0016_em.text_ar: سباحة كم لي ماتوا بها غرقى غرقت قبطان الملاحة
poem0016_em.translation_en: Swimming in which many have drowned, I drowned as the captain of navigation

poem0014_em.text_ar: قال ما يلام لي فارق غناته
poem0014_em.translation_en: He said: 'I am not to be blamed for leaving his dwelling place'
After happiness and fortune, bitterness came to me

poem0014_em.text_ar: ينوح وتهل عبراته شروى فطيم فارق الدرّ
poem0014_em.translation_en: He wails and his tears flow like a weaned child separated from pearls
O Abu Hamad, record his verses
I'll give you a written document, bring the Jamsi or the red Range

poem0014_em.text_ar: بعطيك مكتوباً مسطّر قم چيّك الجمسي وهاته والا خطاة الرنج الأحمر
poem0014_em.translation_en: Before afternoon prayer becomes obligatory
On the road to Falaj we'll pass
We'll perform the obligatory prayer for its judges in the shade of the red Arqoub
We'll spend the night in the valley of his villages, wanting to breathe the desert air

poem0014_em.text_ar: بنأدي الفرض لقضاته في ظلّة العرقوب الأحمر
poem0014_em.translation_en: Where the air's sweetness flourishes, better than air conditioning and stone
He who closes the door, what life is that? Sometimes cold, sometimes hot
I replied to him, what did I say? I said: 'O living one who brings me his verses'
I welcomed him a million times and more
Count the clouds and their particles, and the numbers of torrents that came and rained
Thunder roared and spent the night, watering villages, coast and desert
Coming from the valley's white expanse like water roaring
From God's grace and blessings, the dunes and plains flowed
The grass bunched for its shepherds, their backs not bent from exhaustion

poem0014_em.text_ar: قلت له يا حي من يتني أبياته
poem0014_em.translation_en: Abu Salem returns at his times, and comes back to you completely
What passed has passed, and I according to his requests

poem0014_em.text_ar: عد النسيم و ذارياته و أعداد سيل جاد
poem0014_em.translation_en: As if he wants to drink from the desert spring

poem0014_em.text_ar: و أمطر دنّ رعده و الليل باته واسقى القرايا ساحل و بر
poem0014_em.translation_en: Ready and I'll fulfill his duties with everything, Range Rover

poem0014_em.text_ar: و يت من الحير بطحاء بياته
poem0014_em.translation_en: For in hearts flows its metaphors, like life appearing in Arqoub

poem0014_em.text_ar: شروى زمير الموي تزمر من فضل ربي و حسناته
poem0014_em.translation_en: Like the murmur of water, it murmurs from God's grace and His blessings
The sand dunes flowed and the valley betrayed
poem0014_em.imagery_tags: sand dunes, flowing water, valley, betrayal

poem0014_em.translation_en: And the grass has gathered its shepherds
And their backs do not bend from regret

poem0014_em.text_ar: وترد بو سالم أوقاته ويعود لك كلي
poem0014_em.translation_en: And Abu Salem returns at his times and comes back to you completely

poem0014_em.text_ar: مضى و زر وأنا على حسب
poem0014_em.translation_en: He passed by and visited while I was according to circumstances
His requests are as if he wants to drink deeply
The land's bounty is present/ready
And I fulfill his duties from everything completely
Range Rover
I have a place in hearts
It flows as if it were him
Like life appearing in the hamstring
He appears/It appears
It appears in the heel/Achilles tendon

poem0012_em.text_ar: قلت له عاد أنا أقول له: يا محمد شيّك الجمس الشفر
poem0012_em.translation_en: I told him and I say to him again: O Muhammad, prepare the silver Land Cruiser
What comforts my heart is its speed of movement

poem0012_em.text_ar: ان نزل من القار في درب الوعر يرقب العرقوب والرمل يحذيه
poem0012_em.translation_en: When it descends from the asphalt onto rough paths, it watches the heel and the sand guides it

poem0012_em.text_ar: لو بعيد الدار يضويها العصر عند من يكرم
poem0012_em.translation_en: Even if the destination is far, we'll reach it by afternoon to those who honor guests and meet them

poem0012_em.text_ar: الضيف ويلتقيه، اللي يحمس البن والهيل الخضر
poem0012_em.translation_en: Those who brew coffee beans and green cardamom, not serving instant coffee to travelers
poem0012_em.imagery_tags: Coffee beans, green cardamom, instant coffee

poem0012_em.translation_en: If we excuse them, we bring no excuse, and if we swear an oath, duty comes before it

poem0012_em.text_ar: قلت: ان تعذرناه، ما جبنا العذر وان حلفنا واجبه سبّق عليه، وان حلفنا واجبه سبّق عليه (حلف قبلنا) يذبحون سمان ماجوب وقدر الخسر والربح ما فكروا فيه
poem0012_em.translation_en: They slaughter fat livestock without calculating loss or profit
poem0012_em.imagery_tags: Fat livestock, slaughter, profit and loss

poem0012_em.translation_en: Their hospitality lights shine until dawn, and their generosity they forget its excess
Good-hearted people with no bitterness in their speech, no fool enters among them
Nomads settling in desert lands, their herds grazing on desert plants
Where the mother of twins and the goat settle, a green place where gazelles mix with their young
O Muhammad, this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, if you value it, you'll revive a valley
Or else my ailment won't be healed by needles, and the medicine prescribed by Doctor Ali
No fool enters among them
Traveler and settler
In a desolate home
Their camels graze on the desert herbs they seek
Where is the mother of garlic
And the one who harms has settled/established
Verdant pasture and the gazelle
Mix with its flames/passion
O Muhammad
This is an opportunity in life
If you could appreciate/value her
My heart greets him
And my ailment cannot be healed by needles
And the medicine that Doctor Ali prescribed

poem0015_em.translation_en: Matar bin Dahrawi says
He made a phone call
He requested from Matar bin Dahrawi
Matar wants to inquire
About the poem
In Al-Ghanami's estate
Many people, yes it's true
Want to inquire about the poem
I won't explain the subject
The poem's subject, may he live long
That year
I had sheikhs as companions
Companions from Al-Qawasim
Al-Qawasim companions, Faisal from Khalid
And we appeared, may he live long, from the hill
And when we came to the fence
This stick resembles horsemanship
Except that he greeted in the house
We entered inside the fence
We set up camp
And the sheikhs came to us in the afternoon
And they said tomorrow so-and-so will have lunch here
I said this is a blessed hour
They said we'll bring the poet with us
I said welcome, good
They rushed upon him at noon

poem0015_em.text_ar: يوم يو قال لهم لا أنا روحي
poem0015_em.translation_en: When he came, he told them no, I'm going
Arabs have invited me, Rashid Sharar will come to me
Between me and the wolves, and between me

poem0015_em.text_ar: وقالوا لي يوني يوم عطلوا وقالوا والله برحمة يقول بيتعشون عندنا قلت حياكم انزين
poem0015_em.translation_en: They told me they're coming when they have a day off, and said by God's mercy they'll have dinner with us, I said you're welcome, that's fine

poem0015_em.text_ar: قيلنا نحن هناك وسوينا العشاء المساء ويونا الربع
poem0015_em.translation_en: We said we are there and we made dinner in the evening and the friends came
And they dined and conversed and shortened the journey and traveled on

poem0015_em.text_ar: يوم سروا ضيعوا في الشبج ضيعوا الباب تموا يحوطون داخل
poem0015_em.translation_en: When they left, they got lost in the fog, lost the door, and kept circling inside

poem0015_em.text_ar: يوم التفتت انا الا انهم هنا قلت الربع ضاعوا بنعطيهم ليت
poem0015_em.translation_en: When I turned around, I found they were here; I said the companions are lost, we'll give them perhaps

poem0015_em.text_ar: وظهرت لهم أنا طال عمرك وأظهرت لهم الباب وسروا
poem0015_em.translation_en: And I appeared to them, may your life be long, and I showed them the door and they rejoiced
And the riyal, may God have mercy on it, between us and it
Many adventures means many poems
The poem of stories/tales
Yes
This poem was just stories/tales
Yes
Between us, we are with each other
Yes
And disagreement that must be responded to
This/Here

poem0015_em.text_ar: تعرف يعني وجب عليك الرد وجب
poem0015_em.translation_en: You know what it means, you must reply, you must
Disagreement/Dispute
Yes
He said it is known by the mercy of his poem
In the bachelor quarters of Al-Ghanami
I'm afraid you'll get lost

poem0015_em.text_ar: يا أبو خدود نعامي يا أبو عود رفيع
poem0015_em.translation_en: O one with ostrich-like cheeks, O one with a slender figure
poem0015_em.imagery_tags: ostrich cheeks, slender body, physical beauty

poem0015_em.text_ar: لا تسكن في الظلامي في السفرة والصقيع
poem0015_em.translation_en: Do not dwell in darkness during the journey and frost
In the bachelor's quarters of Al-Ghanami

poem0015_em.text_ar: خايف عليك تضيع تحوط بك الأسيامي
poem0015_em.translation_en: I fear you'll be lost, surrounded by misfortunes
You won't find anyone to intercede for you
I am still/I am after
He has a reason for rejection

poem0015_em.text_ar: ولا أنا بعد ما برد عليه
poem0015_em.translation_en: And I will not respond to him anymore

poem0015_em.text_ar: الرد هذا أنا ما برد عليه
poem0015_em.translation_en: This response, I will not respond to it

poem0015_em.text_ar: الله يرحمه لكن صار له سبب بعد الرد
poem0015_em.translation_en: But there became a reason for him after the rejection

poem0015_em.text_ar: من باب السوالف يعني نعم هيه. قلت له يا طارش باهتمامي
poem0015_em.translation_en: I said to him, O you who splashes with my concern
Get up and hurry quickly
He withheld returning my greeting
Upon the one who complains of burning passion
Tell him we are
We heal and prepare for spring
He has our respect and his duty
We do not obey while in the domain of Al-Ghanami
A wall and an impregnable barrier, a high fortress
Al-Maqami is a sheikh of high standing, Faisal
The lineage of the noble ones, the support of those who are at ease

poem0015_em.text_ar: يا علي ما تنلام تزقر طير قنيع
poem0015_em.translation_en: O Ali, you are not to be blamed for hunting a satisfied bird

poem0015_em.text_ar: طيرك تعلى و حام وخايف عليه يضيع
poem0015_em.translation_en: Your bird soared high and circled, and I fear it might get lost

poem0015_em.text_ar: وان سرت للغنامي وقت أيام الربيع
poem0015_em.translation_en: And if you walk among the Ghanami during the days of spring
I thank the heads of the enemies
In a grass that ripens/flourishes
Where the gazelles grazed
The sound of doves spreads
Where the lavender blooms fragrantly
He does not become impatient/restless
And I do not claim to have a protector
We withdraw from his claims
And you are from my kin for taking and returning
My prayers and my peace
Upon the one who is an intercessor
May God bless your tongue
The Arabs are singing/chanting
Like the day she became clear/appeared
She became famous from the day he sang about her
No one denies it, for it is famous
The Arabs do not know the meaning of the poem

poem0017_em.translation_en: The life of my uncle Rayed, may God have mercy on him
The life of my uncle Rayed, a poet
May God have mercy on his soul in paradise
Because he passed away, did not attend
Winds blew upon him and days of intense heat
Sweet people of Mulayla, Mulayla
I said this year there's no strength, with patience and consolation
I want to release the shackles, perhaps fortune will favor
I will dwell in the soil of the stream beside the plants and its space
Where the stream flows, descending with its melodies
He said
Sweet people of Melilla
A beautiful night
His burning passion cannot be extinguished even if

poem0017_em.text_ar: ابليس يحثي له دوم يكوّل نقاة
poem0017_em.translation_en: Satan constantly whispers to him, selecting pure temptations

poem0017_em.text_ar: قلت السنة لا حيلة بصبر وبتوزاه
poem0017_em.translation_en: I said this year there's no way to be patient or to bear the longing

poem0017_em.text_ar: أبغي طلق اليديلة كود البخت يجناه
poem0017_em.translation_en: I want to release the braided hair, perhaps fortune will come to us

poem0017_em.text_ar: مما يبا بشري له حتى بحضر وياه
poem0017_em.translation_en: Whoever wants my good news, I'll even attend with him

poem0017_em.text_ar: بسكن ثرى المسيلة جمب النبت وفضاه
poem0017_em.translation_en: I will dwell in the soil of the valley beside the plants and its open space

poem0017_em.text_ar: وين الفلج يجري له يتحدّر بالوحاه
poem0017_em.translation_en: Where the falaj flows, it descends with its lamentations
poem0017_em.imagery_tags: water, falaj irrigation, flowing, descent, mourning sounds

poem0017_em.translation_en: The sound of the dove and its generation follows its path

poem0017_em.text_ar: على السعف يلعي له الراعبي تلقاه يمسي الياهي قبيلة بارد مهمّ جداه
poem0017_em.translation_en: On the palm fronds the shepherd calls out, you find him spending the evening, the one who seeks becomes a cool tribe no matter his fortune

poem0017_em.text_ar: يمسي الياهي قبيلة بارد مهمّ جداه وثوب الشعر غزّيلة
poem0017_em.translation_en: The distracted one becomes a cold tribe, very important to him, and the garment of poetry is spun for him

poem0017_em.text_ar: عندي مصر وسداه عدوا عندي دليله نازل وواصل ماءه
poem0017_em.translation_en: I have Egypt and its dam, they counted me as an enemy; I have a guide descending and its water has reached

poem0017_em.text_ar: داوودي في الأصيلة لوث العداء ما جاءه عن الخباب أرفي له
poem0017_em.translation_en: My David in the evening, the enmity's turmoil did not come to him from the informer, I am gentler to him

poem0017_em.text_ar: وأطول في نشاه له أسنان ثقيلة
poem0017_em.translation_en: And I linger in his intoxication with heavy teeth
They are in the high peaks

poem0017_em.text_ar: لو في بحرهن جيله بتي وحاتي بسراه
poem0017_em.translation_en: If in their sea there was a generation that accounts for its secrets

poem0017_em.text_ar: عن الخباب برفي له وأطول في نشاة
poem0017_em.translation_en: About the deceitful one, I am lenient with him and patient in his upbringing
Prolonged in upbringing/formation

poem0061_om.text_ar: لا لي لا لي لا لي لا لي لا لي لا لي لا لي لا لي
poem0061_om.translation_en: La li la li la li la li la li la li la li la li (traditional chanting rhythm)

poem0061_om.text_ar: طابت الدنيا وطابت ليالي شاعر المليون هذه تحية
poem0061_om.translation_en: The world has become pleasant and the nights are sweet, poet of millions this is a greeting
Delivered by a poet who drives eloquence
His homeland stands in times of zeal
The stance of Qaboos in precious eyes
And the giving of Zayed whose home is generous
My belt from Ja'alan in times of hardship

poem0061_om.text_ar: من زفن والصوت لا لي لا لي
poem0061_om.translation_en: From the dance and the voice la li la li
A dagger and two swords remain as identity

poem0044_sa.translation_en: Don't wave to the traveler, the traveler has gone
The streetlights have wilted and extinguished
The world has become narrow upon us
Missed us and the traveler has gone
And the branches, this is your traveling face
Where are my eyes, my beloved

poem0044_sa.text_ar: سافرت مثلك حبيبي القطار وفاتنا ومسافر
poem0044_sa.translation_en: I traveled like you my beloved, the train missed us and is traveling

poem0042_sa.text_ar: سلامة رماحك الي جرحها غالي جرحتني غاضب لين انكسر رمحك
poem0042_sa.translation_en: Peace be upon your spears whose wounds are precious / You wounded me in anger until your spear broke
Justice and satisfaction in love / Your slaughter, my master
And if you intend to increase my exile / Tell me and I'll distance my darkness from your morning's light
If it doesn't please you / I'll lengthen the sun with my mountains

poem0042_sa.text_ar: قل لي وأنا ابعد ظلامي عن سنا صبحك
poem0042_sa.translation_en: And it's not enough that I loved your mountains and slopes / All love in love blooms and struts
And I am the one who in losing my dignity / Gains you
Oh, may trees never bloom in my sands / If I apologize for my pride in hope of your forgiveness
Peace be upon your spears whose wounds are precious / You stabbed me in anger until your spear broke
And it's not enough that I loved your mountains
And your slope poured all the love
In love, he blooms and struts with pride
And I am the one who is at a loss of my dignity
Oh, may the trees never bloom
I won't apologize for my pride
May your spears be safe, whose wounds are precious
You stabbed me angrily until your spear broke

poem0043_sa.text_ar:
ظماي أنت 
ومن يعشق ظماه غيري
 وجروحي أنت
 ومن يكره دواه غيري 
اسقني لو ما ارتويت
وداوني لو ماشكيت
ماهقيت اني اعطش في حياتي لغيرك انت
و ما دريت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: You are my thirst, and who else but me loves their thirst? You are my wounds, and who else but me hates their cure?

poem0043_sa.text_ar: إن ما به أغلى منك إلا أنت يا ظمائي يا ظمائي أنت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: There is nothing more precious to me than you, O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

poem0043_sa.text_ar: ما اتخيل أن عيني مرة تغفى وما تشوفك
poem0043_sa.translation_en: I cannot imagine my eyes closing once without seeing you

poem0043_sa.text_ar: وما اتخيل لو يطول الصمت ما أسمع حروفك
poem0043_sa.translation_en: And I cannot imagine if silence lengthens that I won't hear your letters

poem0043_sa.text_ar: تدري احساسي بخوفك هو أماني
poem0043_sa.translation_en: You know my feeling of your fear is my wishes

poem0043_sa.text_ar: لما تسأل عني ليلة عن مكاني
poem0043_sa.translation_en: When you ask about me one night, about my place

poem0043_sa.text_ar: ما اتخيل كيف تحرقني الثواني شمعة في ليل انتظارك
poem0043_sa.translation_en: I cannot imagine how the seconds burn me, a candle in the night of waiting for you

poem0043_sa.text_ar: وكيف يسبقني زماني من عطش ليلي لنهارك
poem0043_sa.translation_en: And how my time races ahead of me from my night's thirst for your day

poem0043_sa.text_ar: عطني موعد وانسى موعد
poem0043_sa.translation_en: Give me an appointment and forget the appointment

poem0043_sa.text_ar: بس لا تهجر وتبعد
poem0043_sa.translation_en: But don't abandon and distance yourself

poem0043_sa.text_ar:
بس لا تهجر وتبعد 
واسقني لو ما ارتويت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: And quench me even if I'm not satisfied

poem0043_sa.text_ar: وداوني لو ما اشكيت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: And heal me even if I don't complain

poem0043_sa.text_ar: يا ظماي يا ظماي انت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

poem0043_sa.text_ar:
يا ظمأ قلبي لقلبي
 وغربة عيوني عن عيوني
poem0043_sa.translation_en: O thirst of my heart for my heart, and estrangement of my eyes from my eyes

poem0043_sa.text_ar: وينك أنت؟ يا ترى الليلة في صدري
poem0043_sa.translation_en: Where are you? I wonder, tonight in my chest

poem0043_sa.text_ar: او في جفني في الشعور اللي خطفني ودار بي الدنيا
poem0043_sa.translation_en: Or in my eyelid, in the feeling that seized me and spun the world around me

poem0043_sa.text_ar: و عوّد اسأل الدنيا حبيبي وينك أنت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: And I got used to asking the world: my beloved, where are you?

poem0043_sa.text_ar: اه لو تدري بشوقي
poem0043_sa.translation_en: Oh, if only you knew my longing

poem0043_sa.text_ar: يا ظمأ الدنيا بعروقي
poem0043_sa.translation_en: O thirst of the world in my veins

poem0043_sa.text_ar: اسقني لو ما ارتويت وداوني لو ما شكيت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: Quench me even if I'm not satisfied, and heal me even if I don't complain

poem0043_sa.text_ar: يا ظماي يا ظماي انت
poem0043_sa.translation_en: O my thirst, O my thirst, you are

poem0045_sa.text_ar: ما بقى لي قلب يشفع لك خطية ذوبته جروح صدك والخطايا
poem0045_sa.translation_en: I have no heart left to intercede for your sin; you melted it with the wounds of your rejection and sins

poem0045_sa.text_ar: صاحبي بالله لا تعتب عليّ العتب ما عاد تاسعه الحنايا
poem0045_sa.translation_en: My friend, by God, don't blame me; blame no longer fits within my ribs
poem0045_sa.imagery_tags: ribs, blame, emotional capacity, divine oath

poem0045_sa.text_ar: كل جرح فات لي منك هدية، وش بلاك تخاف من رد الهدايا
poem0045_sa.translation_en: Every wound from you was a gift to me; why do you fear the return of gifts?

poem0045_sa.text_ar: الله أكبر، كيف مالك مقدرية؟ وكل ما تحمله من همي بقايا
poem0045_sa.translation_en: God is Greatest, how do you have no appreciation? All you carry of my burden are mere remnants

poem0045_sa.text_ar: لا تمنيني سراب المهمهية القراح اليوم
poem0045_sa.translation_en: Don't tempt me with the mirage of the desert; today, clear water cannot quench my thirst
poem0045_sa.imagery_tags: desert mirage, thirst, clear water, deception

poem0045_sa.text_ar: ما يروي ظمايا وإن غدا للحب في قلبك شظية وش يقول الي غدا
poem0045_sa.translation_en: And if tomorrow love remains a splinter in your heart, what would one say whose heart has become shards?
His heart is shattered into fragments
poem0045_sa.imagery_tags: broken glass, shattered pieces, fragmented heart

poem0035_sa.text_ar: يقول يا عظيمة كل شيء له حدود وله نهاية
poem0035_sa.translation_en: He says, O great one, everything has limits and an end

poem0035_sa.text_ar: لكن انت ما وقفتي عند حدك يا عظيمة استلذيتي بطعناتي واخذتيها هواية
poem0035_sa.translation_en: But you didn't stop at your limit, O great one, you took pleasure in my wounds and made them a hobby

poem0035_sa.text_ar: كن مالك حربةٍ توجع وطعنات أليمة
poem0035_sa.translation_en: As if you have no spear that hurts and painful stabs

poem0035_sa.text_ar: آه ليتك ما تماديتي بطعنات البداية لأن صار الكل طعنة في الحشا
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Oh, if only you hadn't continued with the initial stabs, for now every stab is in the heart

poem0035_sa.text_ar: معنى وقيمة الله يبيحك ولكن كيف في أغرب رواية تكتبين الحب كذبة والهوى دقة
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Meaning and value, may God forgive you, but how in the strangest story you write love as a lie and passion as an old tune

poem0035_sa.text_ar: قديمة وانتي اللي كل ما لدت
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Old, and you're the one who whenever you look at your eyes in the mirror
You only glimpsed the orphan whose heart you took

poem0035_sa.text_ar: ما لمحتي إلا اليتيم اللي خذت قلبه
poem0035_sa.translation_en: An orphan girl, and the orphan girl among orphans has no right to guardianship
The guardianship is for the tender branch and pure intentions
But you gained the right of guardianship and authority
You became tyrannical and the Bedouins departed, and you became a resident
You didn't leave until you destroyed enough in him
A sane person who loved madness and the sound of your fire in dry grass
You violated the sanctity of the madman with awareness and care
You turned to him with your mind and settled in his core
From how much he loves you, he didn't tell you his opinion about love
Afraid the days might reveal dire consequences
In your path, whenever he touched the path of guidance
He got lost, and the straight paths of life are straight
Lost is my sight, and whoever brought him to God's house is lost
Excuse for one who closed one eye while his other eye is generous

poem0035_sa.text_ar: في صميمه من كثر ما يعشقك
poem0035_sa.translation_en: In his very core from how much he loves you
He didn't tell you his opinion about love
I fear the days lest their consequences emerge

poem0035_sa.text_ar: وخيمة في طريقك كل ما كنه
poem0035_sa.translation_en: And a tent in your path whenever it exists
He touched the path of guidance
He got lost while the paths of life are straight
Straight yet my sight is lost/wandering
And whoever brought him to the House of God
Lost is the excuse of one who closed an eye
And his other eye is generous
