I sacrifice myself for you, for what has passed of the days

poem0035_sa.text_ar: واللي عاد جاية يا بعد عمرٍ
poem0035_sa.translation_en: And what is yet to come, oh after a lifetime
My losses with you are a treasure to me

poem0035_sa.text_ar: أنتِ الفارع بقدّ وجدّ وأسماء وكناية
poem0035_sa.translation_en: You are the tall one in stature, lineage, names and titles

poem0035_sa.text_ar: من عشق مثلك يجوز من الهوى واشتاق ريمة
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Whoever loves someone like you is justified in passion and longing for a gazelle

poem0035_sa.text_ar: ليه لا وانتي بحسنك في ذوات الحسن آية
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Why not, when you with your beauty are a miracle among the beautiful ones

poem0035_sa.text_ar: لا ذهب لا ماس لا ياقوت لا أحجار كريمة
poem0035_sa.translation_en: No gold, no diamonds, no rubies, no precious stones
poem0035_sa.imagery_tags: gold, diamonds, rubies, precious stones, wealth, jewelry

poem0035_sa.text_ar: شاعرٍ له مع أهل الرايات في المرقاب
poem0035_sa.translation_en: A poet who has dealings with the flag bearers at the watchtower

poem0035_sa.text_ar: راية كل ما هبت هبوبك فلها قدر
poem0035_sa.translation_en: A banner that whenever your winds blow, it has destiny and worth

poem0035_sa.text_ar: وحشيمة سامحك من ألف باء الذنب
poem0035_sa.translation_en: And out of shame, I forgive you from the very beginning of the sin

poem0035_sa.text_ar: إلى مالا نهاية واستباحك عن خطاه وكل طقة
poem0035_sa.translation_en: Until infinity and permitted you from his steps and every knock
By his teaching when you said give me my freedom
He releases his hands
Nothing is spared from your face
Except for two stabs
In his very core/essence
God, God
Your tongue speaks truth
Your tongue speaks truth

poem0037_sa.text_ar: الجادل اللي يمر القلب شارعها بين الحنايا تعدى ما تطالعني تقفي مع الدم بعروقي وأتابعها وأحس كنها على نفسي توزعني
poem0037_sa.translation_en: The beautiful one whose streets my heart passes through, between the ribs she crosses without looking at me, she stops with the blood in my veins and I follow her, and I feel as if she distributes me upon myself

poem0037_sa.text_ar: قامت تبعثر غلا وان جيت اجمعها أضمها واتشتت لين تجمعني بين الحنايا تثنى في مرابعها كنها تقول اتحدى
poem0037_sa.translation_en: She began scattering precious love and when I try to gather it, I embrace it and scatter until she gathers me, between the ribs she bends in her territories, as if she says 'I challenge whoever can make me leave'

poem0037_sa.text_ar: من يطلّعني، دام الحشا بيتها
poem0037_sa.translation_en: As long as my chest is her home and I pamper her, what business does the heart have being upset when it hurts me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: وانا مدلعها، وش دخل القلب يزعل
poem0037_sa.translation_en: When her eyelash takes a man who looks at her, perhaps an eyelash has taken me and won't return me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: يوم توجعني، وليا خذا رمشها
poem0037_sa.translation_en: Her eyes are armies and their forward scouts raided my chest and struck generously with her sword, stabbing me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: رجل يطالعها لعل رمشٍ خذاني
poem0037_sa.translation_en: When I turned away until my heart from its fortresses, and patience from my beating heart no longer benefits me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: ما يرجعني، عيونها جيوش
poem0037_sa.translation_en: My heart is infatuated with her and my eyes are her pastures, I die for her while she plants me to the wind

poem0037_sa.text_ar: والنظرة طلايعها غارت بصدري وجاد بسيفها
poem0037_sa.translation_en: If the wind knew about these calm natures, it wouldn't shake my heart's branches until it bid me farewell

poem0037_sa.text_ar: طعني ويوم انكفت
poem0037_sa.translation_en: My basil and love planted in the heart, she drinks my veins and quenches me and satisfies me, like bees satisfied from flower nectar

poem0037_sa.text_ar: لين قلبي من قلايعها والصبر عن خافقي ماعاد
poem0037_sa.translation_en: My pride comes from the sweetest thing that starved me, and when her shyness embraces her humility, I embraced a night that encouraged me on its path

poem0037_sa.text_ar: ينفعني، مدهالها القلب
poem0037_sa.translation_en: If her night travels, I would travel to sell it, good news that God lifts me from error, and I became after being against her, with her

poem0037_sa.text_ar: وعيوني مراتعها، أموت فيها وهي للريح
poem0037_sa.translation_en: If she's lost I'm lost, if she guides she elevates me, and if I see with my eyes my heart between her fingers, I prostrate to God, O God don't lose me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: تزرعني، لو تدري الريح عن هادي طبايعها ما هزت غصون قلبي لين ودعني، ريحانتي
poem0037_sa.translation_en: When she gets serious and gives me her tears to drink, I taught her what tears mean to lovers, tears are a voice when it courts her ears

poem0037_sa.text_ar: والغلا في القلب زارعها، تشرب عروقي وترواني وتشبعني كن النحل من رحيق الورد
poem0037_sa.translation_en: She sees my voice and when I pass she hears me, by God I didn't obey her or listen to her, but love made me hear and made me obey

poem0037_sa.text_ar: مشبعها، وانا شموخي من أحلى شي جوّعني وليا تعانق خجلها
poem0037_sa.translation_en: For the beautiful one whose streets are my arteries, the heart leads me while peace prevents me

poem0037_sa.text_ar: مع تواضعها عانقت ليلٍ على مسراه شجعني لو ينسرى ليلها
poem0037_sa.translation_en: Despite her humility, she embraced a night whose path encouraged me, if only her night would pass

poem0037_sa.text_ar: سريت بايعها، بشر ولا الله عن الزلة مرفعني، واصبحت من عقب ما اني ضدها معها ان ضاعت أضيع
poem0037_sa.translation_en: I went to sell her, but neither man nor God lifted me from my fall, and I became after being against her, with her - if she is lost, I am lost

poem0037_sa.text_ar: وان دلّت تسنعني وان شفت بالعين قلبي بين أصابعها سجدت لله يا الله لا تضيعني، وان جات للجد
poem0037_sa.translation_en: When she guides me I listen, and when I see with my eyes, my heart between her fingers, I prostrated to God, O God don't forsake me, and when it comes to seriousness

poem0037_sa.text_ar: واسقتني مدامعها علمتها الدمع للعشاق وش يعني الدمع
poem0037_sa.translation_en: She gave me her tears to drink, I taught her what tears mean to lovers, what tears signify

poem0037_sa.text_ar: صوتٍ ليا غازل مسامعها تشوف صوتي واذا مريت تسمعني والله ما كنت أطاوعها ولا أسمعها لكنه الحب سمّعني وطوّعني للجادل الي شراييني شوارعها القلب يقتادني والسلم يمنعني
poem0037_sa.translation_en: A voice when it flirts with her ears, she sees my voice and when I pass by she hears me. By God, I never used to obey her or listen to her, but love made me listen and submit to the one whose veins are my streets. The heart leads me while peace prevents me
poem0037_sa.imagery_tags: voice, ears, veins as streets, heart leading

poem0036_sa.text_ar:
ياوجودي كل ما هب نسناس الشمال
وجد من حدّه زمانه على اللي ما يبيه
ويا وجودي كل ما اضحيت ثم مال الظلال
لا غفت عيني ولا ذقت شيٍ مشتهيه
وجد من قفى وهو في رجاء كلمة تعال
والتفت من عقب ما اقفى ولا احد لدّ فيه
ويا عذابي لا دنى الليل من روس الجبال
وانتهى يوم من العمر ماعاد ارتجيه
وانتي ابعد من سما الحلم ووصالك محال
يابعد
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Subscribe to the channel / From this my tear at the morning of separation
Upon it, oh my songs / Don't think my tears when they flowed were weakness
Nor fear nor thus / Nor like this, by God I am

poem0036_sa.text_ar: لا تحسبين دمعي يوم سال ضعف
poem0036_sa.translation_en: By God I am from men who support men / But the bad luck
Led my tears, all of it, by God I / Whenever it revolves around you
The argument arose as if death points / At my grave with its hands, by God

poem0036_sa.text_ar: والله اني من رجال يضدون الرجال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: If I have the ability and I turn away, no space came to you / A turning away that doesn't distress
Remember his brother's grave, and who asked me / Asked me, I said I don't know, and if

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ساق دمعي كل أبيه والله اني
poem0036_sa.translation_en: The question returns, I told him enough with your question / It's not appropriate
What do you want me to say publicly, my slaughter is lawful / And the mistake from her on me, I've come to love it
And I desire it, her excuse / If she doesn't excuse, like striking an example
Someone who doesn't know the blond heat / Gets burned by it, and if we return to descriptions

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ان قد لي وانا أصد لا جالك
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And if we return to descriptions / To God belongs perfection
When the night of beauties ends, she comes to you / To begin it, as if she's unaware with the Bedouins
The modesty has folded her / Only the perceptive from perceptive can distinguish her description
Oh fortunate is he who reached her and tasted from the pure water / A sip while people are unaware, from her mouth to his

poem0036_sa.text_ar: عاد السؤال قلت له تكفى سؤالك
poem0036_sa.translation_en: By my honor for those who made me, a love that cannot be reached / And when it reached him, he lost his mind between his mother and father
Oh first dreams of childhood at the edge of imagination / The plea to the one who carried a house from its carrier, the wind prevented you from Antar's sword

poem0036_sa.text_ar: وش تبيني أقول عامة ترى ذبحي حلال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And ninth situation prevented, trace after trace prevented you / And I claim hey hey hey hey, oh you whom beauty deceived and beauty made you tyrannical
By God, if I die without seeing anyone similar to your descriptions / If beauty and pride were sold for pounds and riyals
Nothing would remain in the market except you, neither riyal nor pound / How can I gift you to fate

poem0036_sa.text_ar: لو ما تعذر مثل واضرب مثال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: If it weren't impossible, I would give an example and strike a comparison
Someone who doesn't know the noble blond/fair one
He desires it, and if we return to descriptions
And if we return to the descriptions
Perfection belongs to Allah
When the night of beauties ends, it comes to you
She begins it as if she were unaware among the Bedouins

poem0036_sa.text_ar: طاويها الحيال ما يميز وصفها الا نبيه من نبيه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: The camels fold/traverse it, none can distinguish its description except the wise from the wise

poem0036_sa.text_ar: وا هنيّ اللي وصلها وذاق من الزلال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Oh fortunate is he who reached her and tasted from the pure water

poem0036_sa.text_ar: رشفة مع غفلة الناس من فيها
poem0036_sa.translation_en: A sip from her mouth to his while people are unaware

poem0036_sa.text_ar: بفيه وعزتي للي سواتي عشق مالا يطال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: By my honor, for the one who made me fall in love beyond reach

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ويوم طاله ضيع الحلم بين أمه وأبيه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And a day when he grew up, he lost his dreams between his mother and father

poem0036_sa.text_ar: يا أول أحلام الطفولة على حد الخيال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: O first dreams of childhood at the edge of imagination

poem0036_sa.text_ar: الرجاء باللي حمل بيت من حملة بريح حال دونك سيف عنتر
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Hope lies in the one who carried a house from its burden with ease, while before you stands the sword of Antar
poem0036_sa.imagery_tags: burden bearing, legendary sword, heroic figure

poem0036_sa.text_ar: وتاسع حول حال بأثر حول حال دونك
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And the ninth year passed after year passed without you

poem0036_sa.text_ar: وأنا ادعي هيه هيه هيه يا اللي غرك الحسن وأطغاك الجمال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And I cry out hey hey hey hey, O you whom beauty deceived and whose beauty made you arrogant

poem0036_sa.text_ar: والله أن أموت ما شفت لأوصافك شبيه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: By God, I may die without seeing anyone comparable to your qualities

poem0036_sa.text_ar: لو يسام الحسن والتيه بجنيه وريال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: If beauty and pride were sold for pounds and riyals

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ما بقى في سوق غيرك ريال ولا جنيه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Nothing remains in the market except you, neither riyal nor pound
How can I guide you to fate/destiny

poem0036_sa.text_ar: كيف أهدك للمقادير وانت راس مال راس مال ومال والمال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: How can I surrender you to fate when you are my capital, my wealth and fortune

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ما يعطى السفيه حافظك حفظي لعيني ورمشي لك جلال
poem0036_sa.translation_en: The fool is not given what protects you, my protection for my eye and eyelash is majesty for you
And you are begging for water
And I, what have I seen? I have seen your injustice
And silent while the night grows long, so long

poem0036_sa.text_ar: لا تركتي طعن قلبي وانا ما قلت
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Don't leave after stabbing my heart while I said nothing
Why, if patience remained for cardamom

poem0036_sa.text_ar: على فوح الدلال ما بقى للقلب صبر
poem0036_sa.translation_en: With the fragrance of coquetry, the heart has no patience left
For something that comes to him
I thought that the high cost had gone away
poem0036_sa.imagery_tags: inflation, cost of living, economic struggle

poem0036_sa.text_ar: واثره لا يزال فالحشا ما كنه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And its trace still remains in the heart, what is its essence
Oh, I seek refuge in the noble one who led me
Your love unto death
And my years are lean while circumstances are divisions of injustice
For the honorable display while you are leading/driving
My mind is on the edge of madness

poem0036_sa.text_ar: تحسبين ان من بغى شي يقدر
poem0036_sa.translation_en: You think that whoever wants something can achieve it
He buys it, but not me

poem0036_sa.text_ar: ولا أنا يا وجد حالي وجود
poem0036_sa.translation_en: And I am not, oh longing, my state is existence
What is called passion from one who sacrifices
Precious one for the satisfaction of his parents
Oh my existence, oh beginning of life

poem0036_sa.text_ar: قبل البس عقال وجد من باع
poem0036_sa.translation_en: Before wearing the agal, there was one who sold
poem0036_sa.imagery_tags: agal, manhood, betrayal, coming of age

poem0036_sa.translation_en: The end of life is in the desire of one's loved ones
Oh my existence, whenever your voice rises

poem0036_sa.text_ar: من شمال وجد من حده زمانه
poem0036_sa.translation_en: From the north comes one whose time has reached its limit
Upon the one who doesn't want it

poem0078_ku.text_ar: صمت الكرامة ونفس على نفس الوزن وعلى نفس الوزن والقافية القافية
poem0078_ku.translation_en: The silence of dignity, breath upon breath, on the same meter, on the same meter and rhyme, the rhyme

poem0078_ku.text_ar: صمت الكرامة زاد حملي فداك البوح
poem0078_ku.translation_en: The silence of dignity increased my burden, may expression be sacrificed for you
I want this poem and monopolize my remaining poetry

poem0078_ku.text_ar: اللي يقول لما قلت أنا المزن وبجوفي بطل بالظما مذبوح
poem0078_ku.translation_en: To those who say when I said I am the rain cloud, and in my depths a hero slaughtered by silence

poem0078_ku.text_ar: وعلى شحه ما خيبت هقوة الهاقي
poem0078_ku.translation_en: Despite its scarcity, I didn't disappoint the rain's generosity

poem0078_ku.text_ar: وأنا شمس لكن ما لقت بالوجيه سفوح فهقت الظلام
poem0078_ku.translation_en: I am a sun but found no slopes in the face, so I poured darkness, and didn't fail in my sunrise

poem0078_ku.text_ar: ولا تخاذلت بإشراقي وأنا نجم لكن لي متى والنجوم تلوح
poem0078_ku.translation_en: I am a star but until when do stars appear, before my absence I must invest my horizons

poem0078_ku.text_ar: قبل غيبتي لابد ما استثمر آفاقي
poem0078_ku.translation_en: Now I said I gathered the poems like Noah's ark idea, so that rare verses may have something remaining

poem0078_ku.text_ar: الآن قلت جمعت الشرائد مثل فكرة سفينة نوح لأجل ندر الأبيات يبقى لها باقي
poem0078_ku.translation_en: Now I said I gathered the scattered poems like the idea of Noah's ark so that rare verses may have something remaining
poem0078_ku.imagery_tags: Noah's ark, gathering, scattered poems, preservation

poem0058_om.translation_en: Bedouinism, Bedouinism preserves it
If it's brief
Because time
I bring it from the end, he says
He says if your door

poem0058_om.text_ar: عبس في وجه من هو زار
poem0058_om.translation_en: Frowns in the face of whoever visits
You see the Bedouin
In acts of manhood is more knowledgeable
His houses are always open
For visitors his houses without locks

poem0058_om.text_ar: وباب بالأحرى سرى في ليلة قمرا
poem0058_om.translation_en: And a door, rather, traveled on a moonlit night
To the seventh neighbor when you are without
Electricity cursing the journey

poem0058_om.text_ar: ولا صاحت له العذراء يرد الثار
poem0058_om.translation_en: And if the virgin cries to him, he returns the revenge
Woe to the aggressor if the virgin cries

poem0058_om.text_ar: ولا صاحت له العذراء يرد الثار
poem0058_om.translation_en: And if the virgin cries to him, he returns the revenge
Woe to the aggressor if the virgin cries
He loves camels and solitude and bread of fire
And distinguishes between a barren camel and a pregnant one

poem0058_om.text_ar: ويستبشر إذا منها لفاه حوار حلب
poem0058_om.translation_en: And rejoices when a nursing calf meets him from her
And if her calf is absent from him, he grieves
And from losing her, he plays poetry
With sad melodies that delight the moon

poem0058_om.text_ar: وحب النوق أحسن له من الكفار
poem0058_om.translation_en: And loving camels is better for him than disbelief

poem0058_om.text_ar: يوم انك ذايب في مسّي وإبرا
poem0058_om.translation_en: When you are melting in touch and needles
Peace be upon the Bedouins

poem0058_om.text_ar: سلام الله على البدوان بأية دار، قلوب من خضار وأرضهم قفراء من الي لا كتب تتنزل الأفكار قلمه أجمال بنات الفكر به أسرى من صحاري ظفار وبين بدو ظفار رُبى ماينحدر لو ديرته حدرى، يا مستهزئ بنا لا ضقت لفّ ونحن جروحنا من بننا تبرى بدو غير البداوة مول ما نختار لين تشوف قيصر يحتضن كسرى
poem0058_om.translation_en: Translation by Nancy Qanqar

poem0080_ku.text_ar: دخيل الغلا اللي راح واللي وقف مرتاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: By the love that has gone and that which stands in doubt

poem0080_ku.text_ar: بسمّيه عشقٍ وانت مدري وش تسميه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I call it passion while you don't know what to call it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ودخيل العيون اللي عليها الحلا جذّاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: By those eyes upon which beauty is captivating

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تشوف الولع فيهن ولا تدري ايش تاليه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: You see the burning passion in them but don't know what follows

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ودخيل المكان اللي جمعنا ولا هو إعجاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: By the place that gathered us, and it's not mere admiration

poem0080_ku.text_ar: اذا لي معزة طاري البعد لا تطريه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: If you have affection for me, don't mention separation

poem0080_ku.text_ar: لو تشوف وضعي عندما تلتقي الأهداب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: If you could see my state when eyelids meet

poem0080_ku.text_ar: لك الله لو لك نية بالجفاء تلغيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: By God, if you intend cruelty, cancel it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: انا وأنت غايب چن وسط العيون تراب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: When you're absent, it's as if dust fills my eyes

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تنام الخلايق ولا انا النوم ما لي فيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: People sleep while I have no share in sleep

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ذبحني غلاك اللي سرى مثل سم الداب طفح في العروق وكل ما وافقه ينهيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Your love killed me, spreading like snake venom, flooding the veins and destroying all it meets

poem0080_ku.text_ar: بقى قلبي اللي ما ذبحته وهو منصاب أنا أدري تبي تستوطنه يومك تخليه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: My heart remains though not slaughtered yet afflicted, I know you want to inhabit it then abandon it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: سكنته وهو عمره قفل بالوجيه الباب؟ أنا عارف قلبي لا عشق لا رحم واليه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: You inhabited it though it always locked its door? I know my heart when it loves shows no mercy

poem0080_ku.text_ar: يجي كله من أقصاه ويحبّ باستغراب وفاء فيه ما هو مع بشر ليتك تداريه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: It comes from its depths and loves strangely, its loyalty isn't for humans, if only you'd understand it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ترفق على قلب تلوّع بك ولا تاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Be gentle with a heart tormented by you that hasn't repented

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تمكنت به حيث الولع مثل غرس الناب مصيبتك تدري بس ليه المفارق ليه ودخيل الجمال اللي تلافت له الارقاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Passion took root in it like a fang embedded, your calamity you know but why the separations why, by the beauty that turns necks

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وانا اللي لفتني زينك وجيتك مباريه تمعنت فيك وجيت هايب وأنا ما هاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I who was captivated by your beauty came to match you, I contemplated you and came fearful though I'm not one who fears

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ولا اقفيت عنك الا وانا هالغلا معطيه عليك العيون اللي لهم فعل غزو عقاب ضعيفات خلق بس ياويل من تنويه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I didn't turn from you except while giving you this love, upon you are eyes that act like raiding eagles, weak in creation but woe to whom they intend

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ولك نور وجهٍ چن لك في النجوم أنساب وليلٍ عجز من طوله الكف لا يسريه ولك مبسمٍ
poem0080_ku.translation_en: You have a face's light as if you have kinship with stars, and a night whose length defeats the palm from passing

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ما چنه الا شفق الغياب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And you have a smile that seems like sunset's twilight

poem0080_ku.text_ar: حمارٍ من الله جمر من ولّعه ناسيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Red from God, embers from one who lit it and forgot

poem0080_ku.text_ar: عبث وانت مقبل تستفز وتثير أعصاب؟
poem0080_ku.translation_en: It's futile when you approach provoking and irritating nerves

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تبي تلفت الأنظار منّاك لي منيه؟
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Do you want to draw attention, or is it just my wishful thinking?

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وعبث وانت مقفي تاخذ وتكسر الألباب؟
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And it's futile while you turn away, taking and breaking hearts?

poem0080_ku.text_ar: عبث جاهل توه مشى في بيت من يغليه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: A foolish act of an ignorant one who just walked into the house of someone who cherishes him

poem0080_ku.text_ar: دخيلك على بعضك ولا هي بدعوى عتاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I implore you to pull yourself together, this is not a matter of reproach

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تعيد النظر في البعد من قبل لا تبديه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: You reconsider the distance before you reveal it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: عليك الله أكبر وانت حكمك شريعة غاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Upon you, God is greatest, and your rule is the law of the jungle

poem0080_ku.text_ar: تجيب الطعون وتجرح الخافق وتدميه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: It brings wounds and injures the heart and makes it bleed

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وانا أموت فيك وصال وأموت فيك غياب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And I die in you in union and I die in you in absence

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وهي موتة واحدة مع فارق التشبيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And it is one death with the difference of comparison

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ومن قال ما به موت بالحب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And whoever says there is no death in love

poem0080_ku.text_ar: قلت چذاب جميل وبثينة ما ذبحهم
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I said you're a liar, Jamil and Buthaina weren't killed by their love

poem0080_ku.text_ar: مرض يا هيه أحبك
poem0080_ku.translation_en: It's a sickness, oh yes, I love you

poem0080_ku.text_ar: إيه أحبك ومن حبك خسرت أغلب الأصحاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Yes, I love you, and because of my love for you I lost most of my friends

poem0080_ku.text_ar: إذا عاتبوني فيك
poem0080_ku.translation_en: If they blame me for you

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وعتابهم ما ابيه أحبك
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I don't want their reproach, I love you

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ولا تسأل حبيبي عن الأسباب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And don't ask, my beloved, about the reasons

poem0080_ku.text_ar: أنا لو أعرف أسباب حبك قدرت أنهيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: If I knew the reasons for your love, I could end it

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ألا يا معرّض رجل مغليك للمرقاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Oh you who expose the leg of one who boils for you to the watchtower

poem0080_ku.text_ar: أثر بالطوال تفرّج الهم يا راعيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: The long nights bring relief from worries, O shepherd

poem0080_ku.text_ar: أنا بسألك هو صحيح
poem0080_ku.translation_en: I will ask you, is it true

poem0080_ku.text_ar: الهوى غلاب؟ أنا بنصح لي مثل شرواي
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Is love overpowering? I advise those who are like me in my condition
poem0080_ku.imagery_tags: love's dominance, advice, companionship in suffering

poem0080_ku.text_ar: لا يمشيه ومن لا يحسب بالهوى
poem0080_ku.translation_en: He who does not consider love will not walk its path

poem0080_ku.text_ar: للفراق حساب لك الله ما غنى
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Separation has its reckoning, by God it brings no benefit

poem0080_ku.text_ar: سلامة يبي يغني مثل هل دمعي
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Salama wants to sing like these tears of mine

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وانت رايح وطرق حجاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And you are leaving, knocking on veils/barriers

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ومثل مارمى عبد الحليم الزهر
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And like how Abdul Haleem cast the dice

poem0080_ku.text_ar: يرميه وإذا فيه بكتاب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: He throws it and if there's something in it, it's in a book

poem0080_ku.text_ar: النحو للفراق إعراب فهو فعل
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Grammar has a parsing for separation, for it is a verb

poem0080_ku.text_ar: مطلق بالبشر والجفا ماضيه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Absolute in humanity and harshness is his past

poem0080_ku.text_ar: ألا ليت ربي ما خلق في الغرام غياب
poem0080_ku.translation_en: Oh, if only my Lord had not created absence in love

poem0080_ku.text_ar: وإذا فيه فرقى طاري الحب لا نطريه
poem0080_ku.translation_en: And if there's separation in it, we don't pursue the sudden love

poem0076_ku.text_ar: فيه فيه إحساس يحسه الواحد لما يبتعد عن أهله فترة زمنية طويلة
poem0076_ku.translation_en: There is a feeling one experiences when separated from their family for a long period of time

poem0076_ku.text_ar: ولي أبيات أقول القلب يخلي كل ما بطى به البعد
poem0076_ku.translation_en: And I have verses saying the heart empties everything that distance has slowed within it
When my separation happened and absence became forced

poem0076_ku.text_ar: لا أمساه ليل وكل من في البلد هجد يستاحش وتطري عليه
poem0076_ku.translation_en: When night falls and everyone in the country stays awake, feeling lonely as thoughts come upon them

poem0076_ku.text_ar: الطواري ما كنه الا مدرّج الهيم للورد متيمم لين خلفته
poem0076_ku.translation_en: The sudden thoughts are like the path of the lovesick to the rose, devoted until I left it behind

poem0076_ku.text_ar: المذاري يصبح على شوفة صحاصيح هالجرد ويمسي على لجة قنيب
poem0076_ku.translation_en: The storms - morning finds them upon seeing the barren plains, and evening upon the depths of dark clouds

poem0076_ku.text_ar: الضواري قلبي وأعرف أقصاه وش حاجة السرد
poem0076_ku.translation_en: The wild beasts - my heart, and I know its depths, what need is there for narration

poem0076_ku.text_ar: عذروبه أنه في الضلوع متواري لو هو يشاف
poem0076_ku.translation_en: Forgive it for being hidden in the ribs, even if it could be seen

poem0076_ku.text_ar: انت چان يا قوم يا الورد أحن وألين من حديث
poem0076_ku.translation_en: You were, O people, O rose, more tender and gentle than conversation

poem0076_ku.text_ar: اعتذاري بلاه ولف أدناة ما حرّك
poem0076_ku.translation_en: My apology - without it, even its closest approach didn't stir the longing

poem0076_ku.text_ar: الوجد بلاه ولف أدناة ما حرك
poem0076_ku.translation_en: Without it, even its closest approach didn't stir the longing

poem0076_ku.text_ar: الوجد يا كثر ماله من حنينه مساري
poem0076_ku.translation_en: The longing - how many paths it has from its yearning

poem0076_ku.text_ar: لا حول عشر سنين كله ولا الفقد
poem0076_ku.translation_en: Not even ten years passing, nor the loss

poem0076_ku.text_ar: لو هو على صكات الأيام ضاري
poem0076_ku.translation_en: Even if it becomes fierce against the blows of time

poem0075_ku.text_ar: يقول يومها بين يديني والغلا عادي
poem0075_ku.translation_en: She says that day she was in my hands and love was ordinary
And the day she left, her love exploded within me
As if she set a timer in my heart
When she walked away, her love exploded in my veins
Before you left, I was composed and calm

poem0075_ku.text_ar: وعقبها ضاق كل الكون في عيني غلطتي
poem0075_ku.translation_en: And after, the whole universe narrowed in my eyes, my mistake
And I thought time and moments would wait for me

poem0075_ku.text_ar: واثر من لا تغانم فرصته غادي
poem0075_ku.translation_en: But whoever doesn't seize their opportunity will lose it

poem0075_ku.text_ar: آه يا فرصةٍ ضاعت من سنيني
poem0075_ku.translation_en: Oh, what an opportunity lost from my years

poem0079_ku.text_ar: طلب من الجمهور يعدها أبو خالد
poem0079_ku.translation_en: Abu Khalid requested from the audience to count it

poem0079_ku.text_ar: يا بو قلب أطهر من ثيابك ليا صليت
poem0079_ku.translation_en: O you with a heart purer than your clothes when you prayed
poem0079_ku.imagery_tags: pure heart, prayer clothes, spiritual cleanliness

poem0079_ku.text_ar: ويا بو ضحكة من تبتسم يبتسم كوني
poem0079_ku.translation_en: O you with a smile that makes the universe smile when you smile

poem0079_ku.text_ar: ويا بو وجهٍ يغار القمر منك
poem0079_ku.translation_en: O you with a face that makes the moon jealous of you

poem0079_ku.text_ar: ويا بو وجهٍ يغار القمر منك لا طليت
poem0079_ku.translation_en: O you with a face that makes the moon jealous when you appear
What is life without you and your world without me
I beg you, when someone mentions me and you feel nostalgic

poem0079_ku.text_ar: دخيلك ليا من جابني طاري وحنيت
poem0079_ku.translation_en: Don't hold back any feeling of passion from my eyes

poem0079_ku.text_ar: لا تذخر من إحساس الوله شيء لعيوني
poem0079_ku.translation_en: With you, emotions implemented the Kuwaitization plan
I wished for you, and many have wished for me
I wished for you while many wished for me

poem0077_ku.text_ar: عفا الله عن خطأ غدر الخناجر والضلوع أبطال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: May God forgive the betrayal of daggers and ribs, the heroes

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بسامح وأتركك تحت الظلام الحالك لحالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I forgive and leave you alone under the pitch darkness

poem0077_ku.text_ar: دخيلك وفّر دموعك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Please, save your tears

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ترى هدر الدموع إذلال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Wasting tears is humiliation

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وترى ما فيه احد يصبر مثل صبري بغربالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: No one can endure like my patience with your torment

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا عيبٍ علي انقض كلامي والرجال أفعال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: It's shameful for me to break my word, men are actions

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وإذا قلت أقطع حبالك تراني بأقطع حبالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: If I say I'll cut your ropes, you'll see me cut your ropes

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا عيبٍ علي انقض كلامي والرجال أفعال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: It's shameful for me to break my word, men are actions

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وإذا قلت أقطع حبالك تراني بأقطع حبالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: If I say I'll cut your ropes, you'll see me cut your ropes

poem0077_ku.text_ar: عشان أكسب هدب عينك تجرّعت العذاب أشكال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: To win your eyelash's favor, I swallowed torment in all forms

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وليتك ترأف بحالي على شان أرأف بحالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I wish you'd have mercy on my state so I can have mercy on yours

poem0077_ku.text_ar: مسوي في حياتي شيء ما يذكر ولا ينقال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You've done something in my life that cannot be mentioned or spoken

poem0077_ku.text_ar: حشى حتى العدو وهو العدو ما يعمل أعمالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Even an enemy, being an enemy, wouldn't do your deeds

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تمسيني على الهم وتصبحني على الغربال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You make me sleep on worry and wake me on torment

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تقلطني فناجيلك وتقصر عني دلالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You give me your coffee cups but withhold your affection

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تحملت التعب لأجلك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I bore the fatigue for your sake

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأنا حملي يهد جبال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And my burden could bring down mountains

poem0077_ku.text_ar: رحلت من العذاب وما وقفت إلا على جالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I traveled from torment and only stopped at your threshold

poem0077_ku.text_ar: علامك كل ما أجيك متواضع جيتني تختال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Why when I come humble, you come to me proud

poem0077_ku.text_ar: معاك اليا متى بصبر وصبري معك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: With you, how long will I be patient, and my patience with you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: يحلى لك مثل ما اقبلت لعيونك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: It pleases you as I accepted for your eyes

poem0077_ku.text_ar: لزوم تلد لي بإقبال ومثل ما قد حشمتك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You must bear me fortune and prosperity, just as I have honored and respected you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: حس واحشم قلبي أشوى لك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I feel and respect my heart, I long for you more

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا محدٍ بجابرني أساير معك هالمنوال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I am not someone who will force myself to go along with this pattern with you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ترى لاني تبيع لك ولاني باصغر عيالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You see, I'm not for sale to you, nor am I the youngest of your children

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا جيت أعشقك نبض ومشاعر
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I came to love you with heartbeat and feelings

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ما أعشقك تمثال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I don't love you as a statue

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا جيت أسكنك وأحياك وأبقى فيك وأبقى لك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I came to dwell in you, to live you, to remain in you and remain for you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا جيت بظما عاشق
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I came with the thirst of a lover

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تعب يطرد سراب اللّال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Exhaustion chases away the mirage of nights

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا جيت أستفز رضاك من فرقاك والجأ لك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I came to provoke your satisfaction from our separation and seek refuge in you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا ما همت بك عاقل
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I did not fall in love with you while sane

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا كنت أعشقك بخبال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I used to love you madly

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا ما كنت أحبك حيّ
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I never loved you while alive

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أنا كنت أعشقك هالك، تخيل من كثر ما أخاف تلقى للزعل مدخال أخاف أخطي على طيفك وأدوس برجلي ظلالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I loved you to death, imagine how much I fear you'll find a way to be upset, I fear stepping on your shadow or treading on your shade with my feet

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تخيل من كثر ما أخاف تلقى للزعل مدخال أخاف أخطي على طيفك وأدوس برجلي ظلالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Imagine how much I fear you'll find a way to be upset, I fear I might step on your shadow and tread upon your shade with my feet

poem0077_ku.text_ar: تبعتك والعرب تتبع رعود البارق الهمّال وأنا شفت المطر يتبعك في حلك وترحالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I followed you as Arabs follow the thunder of the pouring lightning, and I saw the rain following you in your settling and travels

poem0077_ku.text_ar: كأن اللي خلق حسنك خلقني مع جسدك ظلال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: As if the one who created your beauty created me as shadows with your body

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وصرت أقرب جسد يمشي معك بقفاك وقبالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And I became the closest body walking with you, behind you and in front of you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبي قلبك يحس إنه فقد بمحبته رجال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I want your heart to feel that it has lost a man through its love

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ملكته من هدب عين وخسرت رضاه بإهمالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You possessed him with the flutter of an eyelash, and lost his satisfaction through your neglect

poem0077_ku.text_ar: صحيح إن الفراق أقسى ولكن الوصال محال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: It's true that separation is harshest, but union is impossible

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأنا صعب علي أرضي غرورك وأضعف قبالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And it's hard for me to accept your arrogance, yet I weaken before you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بعد ما حققت عيني في بعدك للرقاد آمال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: After my eyes achieved hopes for sleep in your absence

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أعوّد للسهر يا أخوي فال الله ولا فالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I return to staying up late, oh my brother, may God grant you good fortune, not bad fortune

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بعد ما حققت عيني في بعدك للرقاد أمال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: After my eyes achieved hopes for sleep in your absence

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أعوّد للسهر يا أخوي فال الله ولا فالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I return to staying up late, oh my brother, may God grant you good fortune, not bad fortune

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ببدل نظرتك فيني وأجي لك كل يوم بحال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I'll change your view of me and come to you every day in a different state

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بكون أقرب من ثيابك عليك ولا أتهيأ لك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I will be closer to you than your clothes upon you, yet I won't appear to you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بلمك وانثرك واجمعك وارجع وانثرك بإهمال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I gather you and scatter you and collect you and return to scatter you carelessly

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بخونك وازعلك وارضيك وازعل منك وارضى لك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I betray you and upset you and please you, and get upset with you and accept you

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبرسم بالثرى وجهك وبدفن صورتك برمال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I will draw your face in the soil and bury your image in the sand

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبشكي للعرب فرقاك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I complain to the Arabs about your separation

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأضحك عند عذالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And I laugh in front of your critics

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبهديك الوصال فراق
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I gift you union as separation

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأهديك الفراق وصال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And I gift you separation as union

poem0077_ku.text_ar: بسوي مثل ما اشوفك تسوي
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I will do just as I see you do

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأفعل أفعالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And I do your deeds

poem0077_ku.text_ar: عشان تعرف من فينا الزعول
poem0077_ku.translation_en: So you know which of us is the upset one

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ومن وسيع البال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And from the breadth of mind/peace of mind

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبيك تذوق فنجالي
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I want you to taste my coffee

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وأنا بذوق فنجالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And I will taste your coffee cup

poem0077_ku.text_ar: نصيحة واحتفظ فيها قصر معك الزمن أو طال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: A piece of advice, keep it with you whether time is short or long

poem0077_ku.text_ar: أبي تسمع كلامي زين
poem0077_ku.translation_en: I want you to listen to my words carefully

poem0077_ku.text_ar: وتحطه على بالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And you keep it in your mind

poem0077_ku.text_ar: إذا حبك هبال أطفال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: If your love is childish madness

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ألك عندي هبال أطفال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: You have in me the madness of children

poem0077_ku.text_ar: ولا وابشر بعد بهبال حب ماهو بهبالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And rejoice after with the madness of a love that is not your madness

poem0077_ku.text_ar: واذا قصدك تهين اسمي عشان تشمت العذال
poem0077_ku.translation_en: And if your intention is to humiliate my name to please the blamers

poem0077_ku.text_ar: حشا لا انته ولا غيرك ولا عشرة من اشكالك
poem0077_ku.translation_en: Never you nor anyone else nor ten of your kind

poem0056_om.translation_en: She said: What's your name?
I said: Abdullah Saeed
She said: Sure (sarcastically)
And I said: Ahmad Sulaiman
She said: We've started (the game)
I said: The feast has just begun
She said: Upon us
I said: Lost and thirsty
She said: Be respectful with daughters of nobles

poem0056_om.text_ar: قلت الله أكبر يا نسل نمر عدوان
poem0056_om.translation_en: I said: God is great, O descendant of Nimr Adwan
And she laughed at me a laugh like ululations
And she went on telling me about joys
And sorrows

poem0056_om.text_ar: عن جدها اللي ما اعترف بالتجاعيد
poem0056_om.translation_en: About her grandfather who didn't acknowledge wrinkles

poem0056_om.text_ar: رمى الحيا في سلة الماضي وخان
poem0056_om.translation_en: He threw modesty in the basket of the past and betrayed
About her first love
About her first love, promises and appointments
Until it ended in wounds, betrayal and deprivation
And she sighed, oh how ugly are the sighs

poem0056_om.text_ar: لا جات من بنتٍ للإلهام بستان
poem0056_om.translation_en: When they come from a girl who is a garden of inspiration

poem0056_om.text_ar: قالت لي اجلس جنبي وقلت ما اريد
poem0056_om.translation_en: She said sit beside me and I said I don't want to
If I sit, I fear I'll reach addiction
She said I asked you to sit and extended her hand
I sat and a devil formed from the night

poem0056_om.text_ar: قالت من أية دار؟ قلت اسكن بعيد
poem0056_om.translation_en: She said from which house? I said I live far away
Farther than dawn by the measures of one in love

poem0056_om.text_ar: ردت وش اسمك قلت يا شيخة الغيد
poem0056_om.translation_en: She asked what's your name, I said O leader of the graceful ones

poem0056_om.text_ar: شفتك ونسيت ان اسمي حمود خلفان
poem0056_om.translation_en: I saw you forgot that my name is Hamoud Khalfan

poem0055_om.text_ar: كان الحكي مسجون في كهف جرنان
poem0055_om.translation_en: Speech was imprisoned in the cave of Jurnan / It split the darkness and ignited year after year
It pursued with flocks of rhymes and meters / Until it stood alone and they sang the clouds about it

poem0055_om.text_ar: تلاحق بسرب القوافي والأوزان حتى تفرد وانشدوا الغيم عنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: Its dream is vast and ancestors' resolve are wings / It strikes with a voice that disappointed thunder's expectation

poem0055_om.text_ar: حلمه مدى وعزوم الأجداد جنحان يكفخ بصوت خيب الرعد ظنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: Leave Uthman's body in Uthman's grave / Enough of tongues' beasts devouring it

poem0055_om.text_ar: خلوا جسد عثمان في قبر عثمان كافي وحوش الألسنة ينهشنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: They trade in the Companions' blood until now / Those who judged the Quran with spearheads

poem0055_om.text_ar: يتاجروا بدم الصحابة إلى الآن من حكموا المصحف بروس الأسنة
poem0055_om.translation_en: The poison of fanaticism shouldn't settle in homelands / They brought moaning upon the ruins of nations

poem0055_om.text_ar: سم التعصب لا تمكن بالأوطان جروا على أطلال الأوطان ونة
poem0055_om.translation_en: O bird, we secured you from human recklessness / Your melody is warmth, O bird, I beg you sing it

poem0055_om.text_ar: يا طير أمنناك من طيش الإنسان
poem0055_om.translation_en: In Oman the bird of peace sings on branches / Even our guns were ashamed to hunt it

poem0055_om.text_ar: لحنك دفا يا طير أرجوك غنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: We load the guns with roses / And an orchard erupts above the clouds / Astonishing humans and jinn

poem0055_om.text_ar: في عمان طير السلم يصدح بالأغصان حتى بنادقنا استحن يقنصنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: But in the faces of enemies we are fire / O aggressor, the wooden sword don't sharpen it

poem0055_om.text_ar: في عمان طير السلم يصدح بالأغصان
poem0055_om.translation_en: Most of our homes' furniture is skins of aggressors / And we have many purposes from it
We lived before Mazen found his way / Brothers, shall we part with our souls at peace?
Praise to who established a Sultan over Oman / In his wisdom are two opposites: fire and paradise
And whoever sowed discord harvested failure's fruit / As long as we watered evil intentions
This is Oman if you don't know Oman / Our minds threw off extremism's garment
We embrace the mosque after the call to prayer / And prostrate as Ibadis, Shias and Sunnis

poem0055_om.text_ar: يا معتدي سيف الخشب لا تسنه
poem0055_om.translation_en: O aggressor, the wooden sword cannot be sharpened
Most of our homes' furnishings are the skins of enemies
poem0055_om.imagery_tags: war trophies, conquered enemies, home furnishings

poem0055_om.translation_en: And we have our many needs from him
We lived before Mazen found his way
Brothers, shall we part while our souls are at peace?

poem0055_om.text_ar: حشا من أرسى على عمان سلطان
poem0055_om.translation_en: Except for the one who established a sultan over Oman
In His wisdom are two opposites: fire and paradise

poem0055_om.text_ar: واللي بذر فتنة حصد ثمر خذلان
poem0055_om.translation_en: He who sows discord reaps the fruit of abandonment
As long as we have driven away evil intentions

poem0055_om.text_ar: هذه عمان إن كنت ما تعرف عمان
poem0055_om.translation_en: This is Oman, if you don't know Oman
Our minds have cast off the garment of extremism
We embrace the mosque after the call to prayer
poem0055_om.imagery_tags: mosque, embrace, prayer call, spiritual connection

poem0055_om.translation_en: And we prostrate together - Ibadis, Shia, and Sunnis

poem0052_om.translation_en: We wound the notebook of papers with a nail

poem0052_om.text_ar: نكذب نكتب ونقطع جنون أحلام أطفالي
poem0052_om.translation_en: We lie, we write, and cut off the madness of my children's dreams

poem0052_om.text_ar: ولكن مثل ما تدري نويت أفركش الأسرار
poem0052_om.translation_en: But as you know, I intended to expose the secrets

poem0052_om.text_ar: أرتبها وأطلقها رصاص ما هو بخبالي
poem0052_om.translation_en: I arrange them and release them as bullets, not from my imagination

poem0052_om.text_ar: نعم هذا زمان الفاعل المفعول بالإصرار
poem0052_om.translation_en: Yes, this is the time of the subject made object by insistence

poem0052_om.text_ar: زمان ما يعرف الرفق دام الجاني الغالي
poem0052_om.translation_en: A time that knows no gentleness as long as the precious one is the criminal

poem0052_om.text_ar: هذا شيء بقوله دام هذا اليوم أنا المختار
poem0052_om.translation_en: This is something I'll say as long as today I am the chosen one

poem0052_om.text_ar: ثرى هالأرض لأهل الأرض والله دائم عالي
poem0052_om.translation_en: The soil of this earth belongs to the people of the earth, and God remains Most High

poem0052_om.text_ar: أنا ما قلت لي بيت لأجل أكثر من الإهذار
poem0052_om.translation_en: I didn't compose a verse just to ramble more

poem0052_om.text_ar: ولكن الفتى يبقى نطق لأشياء تنقالي
poem0052_om.translation_en: But the young man remains speaking of things that must be said

poem0051_om.translation_en: Peace to the one whose melody moves me deeply
Girded with my letters and my rhymes
Relying on God and good intention
The one who raised me on goodness
My father whose mention brings pride
Oh my dignity, oh my support

poem0051_om.text_ar: يا ألحاني يا سعدي وفرحي وروحي الحية
poem0051_om.translation_en: Oh my melodies, my happiness, my joy, and my living soul
And forgive me if my emotions overwhelm me
For the one I love who takes pride in me

poem0107_bh.translation_en: Good tidings
My longings have not bloomed / My longings have not appeared
And my longings have never spoken / Nor revealed
My sorrows are seaweed / And my worries are the night's perfume
The pearl of my longing in a shell / No diver has caught it in love's sea
poem0107_bh.imagery_tags: pearl, shell, diver, sea of love

poem0107_bh.translation_en: And my birds in the cloud trees / No trapper or hunter has frightened them
My crops cannot be described / And my rivers cannot be counted
My dreams are as vast as space / And my heart is bleeding love

poem0107_bh.text_ar: ما صادها في بحر العشق غواص
poem0107_bh.translation_en: Slaughtered, I dance from pain / Between the ebb and tide
Lovestruck, oh moment of joy / A lover without limits
Take, oh violet of passion / Take me to your door
Take me as companion of your night / I love the good tidings of your appearance
And I perfume your soil / And say for the rest of life / May roses bloom upon me
My dreams are as vast as space
And my heart bleeds with love
Slaughtered, I dance from pain
Between the ebb and the tide
Enamored, oh moment of joy
A lover without limits
Take, oh violet, its passion
Take me to your door
Take me as your companion for your night
I adore the good tidings of your appearance
And I perfume your soil
And I say at the end of life
The roses bloomed for me

poem0103_bh.text_ar: ايه أحبچ هذا حظي اللي انكتب
poem0103_bh.translation_en: Yes, I love you, this is my fate that was written / And my path that I walk, knowing it brings hardship

poem0103_bh.text_ar: ودربي اللي امشيه وأدري به تعب
poem0103_bh.translation_en: Yes, I love you, and you are sleeplessness in my eyes / And you are in the heart's center, burning passion and anguish

poem0103_bh.text_ar: ايه أحبچ وانت في عيوني سهر
poem0103_bh.translation_en: But I love you, this is my fate that was written / And my path that I walk, knowing it brings hardship
I see people with my eyes, but among them I see only you / And I feel that no one like you exists in this world

poem0103_bh.text_ar: بس أحبچ هذا حظي اللي انكتب
poem0103_bh.translation_en: In your eyes is magic that takes me and makes me your captive / I feel my life stopped at you and my days follow behind you

poem0103_bh.text_ar: ودربي اللي امشيه وأدري به تعب
poem0103_bh.translation_en: And I love you, this is my fate that was written / And my path that I walk, knowing it brings hardship

poem0103_bh.text_ar: أشوف الناس بعيوني ومن بدهم أشوفك غير
poem0103_bh.translation_en: O tear of my eye in my joy / And tear of my eye in my sorrows
poem0103_bh.imagery_tags: tears of joy, tears of sorrow

poem0103_bh.text_ar: وأحس مثلك في هالدنيا أبد ما يصير
poem0103_bh.translation_en: O love of my later life, welcome / I waited years until you came to me

poem0103_bh.text_ar: في عينك سحر ياخذني ويخليني معاك أسير
poem0103_bh.translation_en: I will carry you in the center of my eye / O most precious love that found me

poem0103_bh.text_ar: أحس عمري وقف عندچ وأيامي وراچ تسير
poem0103_bh.translation_en: And in my heart, O joy of my heart / And my youth that returned again, and I love you
This is my fate that was written / And my path that I walk / Knowing it brings hardship

poem0103_bh.text_ar: ودربي اللي امشيه وأدري به تعب
poem0103_bh.translation_en: And my path that I walk, knowing it brings hardship
O tear of my eye in my joy
And the tear of my eye in my sorrows
O love of my later years, welcome
I waited years until he/she came to me
I will carry you in the center of my eye
O most precious love who met me
And in my heart, O joy of my heart
And my youth that returned again and I love you
This is my fate that was written
And my path that I walk
And I know he is tired

poem0105_bh.translation_en: Here you are, I can't believe it's you
Your heart softened for me, you remembered and returned
What brought you back, when all my concern was to make my heart patient without you
And distance the memories that scream every moment of my journey

poem0105_bh.text_ar: وانا كل همي أصبر قلبي عنك
poem0105_bh.translation_en: Here you are, I can't believe it's you
I waited for you, me and longing, and wished you'd come to me unexpectedly
Remember the companionship that passed, oh beloved, and remember me
But the waiting prolonged, and hope I wasted in night and day
And I became convinced you had gone far, and my yearning wouldn't bring you back
What brought you back, when all my concern was to distract my heart from you

poem0105_bh.text_ar: أنا والشوق وتمنيتك على غفلة تجيني
poem0105_bh.translation_en: And distance the memories that knock every moment of my journey

poem0105_bh.text_ar: تذكري العشرة اللي مرت يا الحبيبة
poem0105_bh.translation_en: Welcome, you came and demolished the bridge of patience I built with tears
Welcome, you came and returned me to the past when I didn't intend to return
Against my will, longing shook my heart and my eyes teared
You disappeared from my sight, but oh my life, you remained in my ribs
Here you are, I can't believe it's you
And I became convinced that you are my distance
And my longing does not bring you back to me
What brought you here

poem0105_bh.text_ar: وأنا كل همي أغفّل قلبي عنك
poem0105_bh.translation_en: And all my concern is to make my heart heedless of you
And I distance the memory that knocks
Every moment of my journey

poem0105_bh.text_ar: يا هلا جيتي وهدمتي جسر صبري اللي بنيته بالدموع
poem0105_bh.translation_en: Welcome, you came and destroyed the bridge of my patience that I built with tears

poem0105_bh.text_ar: يا هلا جيتي ورجعتيني للماضي وانا ما أنوي الرجوع
poem0105_bh.translation_en: Welcome, you came and took me back to the past, while I have no intention of returning

poem0105_bh.text_ar: غصب عني هز قلبي الشوق وعيوني دمعت
poem0105_bh.translation_en: Against my will, longing shook my heart and my eyes shed tears

poem0105_bh.text_ar: غبتي عن عيني وأثر يا عمري كنتي في الضلوع
poem0105_bh.translation_en: You were absent from my eyes, and oh my life, you remained in my ribs

poem0105_bh.text_ar: وهذه انتي ما اصدق انچ انتي
poem0105_bh.translation_en: And here you are, I can't believe it's you

poem0104_bh.text_ar:
ولهان يا محرّق
 وأطوف في السكة 
محد عرفني فيچ
 يا محرّق شدعوه! 
خلي اللي واعدني بعد البراحة ببيت
 نطرته طول اليوم
 واقف ولا مليت

poem0104_bh.translation_en: What made him leave me confused and he didn't come to me
And no one in Muharraq showed me to his house

poem0104_bh.text_ar: محد عرفني فيك يا محرق شدعوة
poem0104_bh.translation_en: No one knew him for me in Muharraq, what's the matter

poem0104_bh.text_ar:
والله لا أدوره
 وأدوره في الفرجان
poem0104_bh.translation_en: By God, I search for him and search in the neighborhoods

poem0104_bh.text_ar: واقول يا أهل الخير راعي النشل
poem0104_bh.translation_en: Say, O people of goodness, about the one with the mole
His mark didn't appear, a beauty mole
And his eyes are black and large

poem0104_bh.text_ar: في كل المحرق مثله أبد ما صار
poem0104_bh.translation_en: In all of Muharraq, someone like him never existed

poem0104_bh.text_ar: محد عرفني فيك يا محرق شدعوة
poem0104_bh.translation_en: No one knew him for me in Muharraq, what's the matter

poem0101_bh.translation_en: Standing at your door, yearning and confused
I ask about the one who asked, my beloved is young
Two days passed over me, two years or more
I couldn't, my desire, be patient from seeing you
This fate was written, I love young ones
He loves me but his family, he fears they might know
You exposed me, O passion, and then revealed my head
No one knew my story, and now all the people
Standing at their door, yearning and confused
He loves me but his family
He fears they might not know
And then I uncovered my head

poem0102_bh.translation_en: O beautiful one, remember me / When you've been absent like seas
And with longing call me / Perhaps the world will turn
I want to come with summer / But winter didn't reply to me
Nor with the longings / At the time of spring and roses
And I am far, far away / I have nothing but sighs
I sent my longing to you / At night it didn't reach
I entrusted the sea waves with my greetings, they didn't deliver / I charged the desert birds but they didn't carry the message
I'll return with summer but winter didn't reply / Nor with the longings at the time of spring and roses
I swore, O beautiful one, I won't leave Bahrain / It's planted in my heart and preserved in the center of my eye
I long to smell the oud and greet the good people / And the henna that adorned and darkened the palms
I'll return with summer but winter didn't reply / Nor with the longings at the time of spring and roses
In the night, he did not bid farewell

poem0102_bh.text_ar: حملت موج البحر سلامي ما وداه
poem0102_bh.translation_en: The sea waves carried my greetings but did not deliver them

poem0102_bh.text_ar: وصيت طير الفلا ولا حمل الوصاة
poem0102_bh.translation_en: I entrusted the desert bird but it did not carry the message

poem0102_bh.text_ar: برد ويا الصيف ولا الشتاء لي رد
poem0102_bh.translation_en: It cooled down, but neither summer nor winter brought me back

poem0102_bh.text_ar: ولا مع الأشواق وقت الربيع والورد
poem0102_bh.translation_en: Nor with the longings at the time of spring and roses

poem0102_bh.text_ar: حلفت يا الزينة ما أفارق البحرين
poem0102_bh.translation_en: I swore, O beautiful one, I will never leave Bahrain

poem0102_bh.text_ar: في قلبي مزروعة ومحفوظة وسط العين
poem0102_bh.translation_en: Planted in my heart and preserved in the center of my eye

poem0102_bh.text_ar: أشتاق أشم العود وأوله على الطيبين
poem0102_bh.translation_en: I long to smell the oud and dedicate it to the good people

poem0102_bh.text_ar: والحناء اللي خطوه وساود على الكفين
poem0102_bh.translation_en: And the henna whose lines have darkened on the palms

poem0102_bh.text_ar: برد ويا الصيف ولا الشتاء لي رد
poem0102_bh.translation_en: It cooled down, but neither summer nor winter brought me back

poem0102_bh.text_ar: ولا مع الأشواق وقت الربيع والورد
poem0102_bh.translation_en: Nor with the longings at the time of spring and roses

poem0060_om.translation_en: They say in front, oh my poetry
In your hand is its veil
The day you appear, you shift numbers
By God, feel for the people
Have mercy on them, and whoever presents the word
Behind the back is not blamed
How can your front present it

poem0060_om.text_ar: ترى الرجل من هو في دروب الفعل
poem0060_om.translation_en: You see the man who is in the paths of action
A leader and a word in his mind

poem0060_om.text_ar: و ترى البطحري والمتنبي وأبو تمام وباني أدبهم ما قدر قول يهدمها
poem0060_om.translation_en: And you see Al-Buhturi, Al-Mutanabbi, Abu Tammam, and the builder of their literature could not demolish it with words

poem0057_om.translation_en: He says without hope, no poor man would live in this world
And I am poor, but seeing you is my hope; it's wrong for you to leave me under fate's foot
My home after you is weaker than ant colonies
You know what happened to my lips - a pool of my tears I drank when they poured from my eyes
Now I'm blind and hear in my ear a murmur, and found no one to carry my burden
Come, where are you? Your lover has become blind - give him your sight until his vision is complete

poem0057_om.text_ar: وبيتي بعدك أضعف من بيوت النمل
poem0057_om.translation_en: Reproach, but put 'I love you' at the end, so if you wound me, my wound will heal

poem0057_om.text_ar: تدري وش اللي صار لشفاهي، غدير دمعي شربته
poem0057_om.translation_en: Ask our fingers about the small difference and fill the gaps with your finger, bear it
Because you'll find a bird flies from its nest, and in your palm's nest don't blame it if intoxicated
I remembered putting love after you in a well, and forgot that the bucket had carried the load
From a car's bucket a broken child survived, and love is longing's bucket - its extraction is difficult

poem0057_om.text_ar: تعال وينك صار معشوقك ضرير اسقيه
poem0057_om.translation_en: Sorrow is wine and my day in your separation is a wine jar with nothing but drinking my sorrows as work
poem0057_om.imagery_tags: sorrow as wine, wine jar, drinking grief

poem0057_om.translation_en: Your separation's knife has thrown down heavy weight, and its knives multiply when the camel falls
No matter how many stabs change in my body, the stabbing even your separation's stab included all

poem0057_om.text_ar: في الأخير، من شان لا جرّحت
poem0057_om.translation_en: I plucked my wings - I who was once a bird, and walked to you in a house worth sentences
If I had known, O mirage, that you would leave, I wouldn't have gone to make my feet taste sand and stairs
Our fingers from the small difference
And fill the voids with your finger
And endure because you will find a bird
From his nest he flies
And in the nest of your palm, do not blame her
Not drunk, I remembered

poem0057_om.text_ar: أحط الحب من عقبك في بير
poem0057_om.translation_en: I place love after you in a well

poem0057_om.text_ar: ونسيت أن الدلو قد شال الحمل
poem0057_om.translation_en: And I forgot that the bucket has carried the burden

poem0057_om.text_ar: من دلو سيارة نجا طفل كسير
poem0057_om.translation_en: From a car's bucket a broken child was saved
And love is the bucket of longing in its drawing out
Silence, sorrow is wine
And my day without you is bitter
He has nothing but to drink my sorrows
Work, knife
Your separation has cast upon me the weight of great burden

poem0057_om.text_ar: وتكثر سكاكينه إذا طاح الجمل من كثر
poem0057_om.translation_en: And his knives multiply when the camel falls from abundance

poem0057_om.text_ar: ما الطعنات في جسمي تغير، الطعن
poem0057_om.translation_en: The stabs in my body do not change, the stabbing
Even the stab of your separation is comprehensive
I plucked my wings

poem0057_om.text_ar: وأنا من قبل طير ومشيت لك
poem0057_om.translation_en: And I, before, was a bird and walked to you
In a house worth a camel to him
If only I had known, O mirage
That you walk/proceed

poem0057_om.text_ar: ما كنت رحت أذوّق رجولي رمل
poem0057_om.translation_en: I never went to taste the sand of my manhood
And my question

poem0059_om.text_ar: عاد دامكم طلبتوا غزل دامكم طلبتوا غزل تحملونا
poem0059_om.translation_en: Since you've asked for ghazal, since you've asked for ghazal, bear with us

poem0059_om.text_ar: يقول حبيبتي حبيبتي حبيت وحدة بدالك
poem0059_om.translation_en: He says 'my beloved, my beloved' - I loved someone in your place

poem0059_om.text_ar: بنت نفسها حب نظراتها عشق فيها ضياء يرميك وسط المهالك
poem0059_om.translation_en: A girl whose essence is love, her glances are passion, in her is a light that throws you into peril

poem0059_om.text_ar: والصاعقة تقتل بحيلة من البرق ما أتوه
poem0059_om.translation_en: Lightning kills cunningly with its flash - I wouldn't get lost
Even if I travel to her in pitch dark night
I'd get lost between the waist, chest, and neck

poem0059_om.text_ar: ما أتوه لو اسري لها بليل حالك
poem0059_om.translation_en: I wouldn't get lost even if I travel to her in pitch dark night
I'd get lost between the waist, chest, and neck
The chest like one who is satisfied
And the neck like bird feathers
Woe to my state when I spoke

poem0059_om.text_ar: اذني من اللذة تبا تاكل الحلق
poem0059_om.translation_en: My ear from pleasure wants to eat the earring

poem0031_sa.translation_en: O moon, your paths have begun to change
How slow your rising, how swift your setting

poem0031_sa.text_ar: يا بطي مطلاعك ويا سرع مسراك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: The stars that once competed with you have faded, no star appeared before you or abandoned you
The day before yesterday I counted nights for you and watched over you, today you're distant and hidden from me
O Najd, may the rain clouds water you, quenching your thirst and irrigating your dry lands
O Najd, my heart benefits when it mentions you, God blames whoever blames it except when mentioning you
You didn't know it cherishes and values you, a heart nourished by your food and water
The eye in dark nights converses with you, even in London it feels in your protection

poem0031_sa.text_ar: ما شفت نجم بان قبلك وخاواك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: O Najd we loved you, we loved you for the love of your shepherd

poem0031_sa.text_ar: قبل أمس أعد لك الليالي وأراعيك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: Who built your glory, protected and shaped you
Security and faith dwell within you, the grace of the King who was raised in you and pleased you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: يا نجد جعلهم مروّح الغيث يسقيك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: O Najd, may the evening rain clouds water you
May He quench your thirst and water your parched ones

poem0031_sa.text_ar: يا نجد قلبي ينفعه يوم يطريك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: O Najd, my heart benefits when it mentions you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: الله يلوم اللي يلومه الا طراك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: May God blame whoever blames him except for your sake

poem0031_sa.text_ar: تو ما دريت أنه يعزك ويغليك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: I didn't know that he cherishes and values you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: قلبٍ تغذَّى من طعامك ومن ماءك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: A heart that was nourished by your food and your water
The eye in the dark nights whispers to you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: لو هي بلندن كانها اليوم بحماك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: If she were in London, it would be as if she were today in your protection
O Najd, we have loved you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: يا نجد حبيناك من حب راعيك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: O Najd, we loved you for the love of your shepherd
The one who built your glory, protected you and made you
Security and faith have settled within you

poem0031_sa.text_ar: فضل المليك اللي رُبَى فيك وارضاك
poem0031_sa.translation_en: The grace of the King who raised you and pleased you

poem0034_sa.translation_en: I kiss his nose and ask him how he is
And my love for him has no greed behind it
I respect him and share in his sorrows
While I know he's an enemy with vile nature
My separation and his separation, may God scatter his ribs

poem0034_sa.text_ar: الحقد من قلبه على الكبد مايع
poem0034_sa.translation_en: Hatred from his heart flows liquid on the liver
Apply kohl to your enemy until you blind his eyes

poem0034_sa.text_ar: البس له أغلى اللبس لو كنت جايع
poem0034_sa.translation_en: Dress him in the finest clothes even if you're hungry

poem0034_sa.text_ar: لو عشت عمر شعيب وانت بمهونة
poem0034_sa.translation_en: If you live Shuaib's age while in humiliation
You're wasted and won't fulfill your life's purpose
A man risks himself for it
Others' lives are like your life
Deposits, and when you find people of this time
Complaining about it, don't complain about your time

poem0032_sa.text_ar: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
poem0032_sa.translation_en: May the clouds that carry lightning and thunder
Rain upon the dwelling where my beloved resides

poem0032_sa.text_ar: يسقي وطن منتوقة العنق يا سعود
poem0032_sa.translation_en: Water the homeland of the long-necked beauty, O Saud

poem0032_sa.text_ar: ما لي وطن بالعارض إلا وطنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: I have no homeland in Al-Aridh except hers
My heart has become captive, soft as a tender branch

poem0032_sa.text_ar: جعل السحاب اللي معه برق ورعود
poem0032_sa.translation_en: No one can free my heart from her, O Saud
Armed with flint and gunpowder in his hand

poem0032_sa.text_ar: يسقي وطن منتوقة العنق يا سعود
poem0032_sa.translation_en: He enters his hand between the ribs and buries it

poem0032_sa.text_ar: ما لي وطن بالعارض إلا وطنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: Between me and him are bonds, secrets, and covenants
Protected, unknown to people about it

poem0032_sa.text_ar: محد يفك القلب يا سعود منها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: Each year his love increases more and more, I follow with my soul twisted in her reins
I die between the cheek and the black eyes, and eyebrows that God adorned with beauty
Hair perfumed with musk and rose, a braid that embraces me as I embrace it
A night that gathered us, may it return again, to distance the sad soul from its sorrow
She is protected/preserved, people know nothing about her
poem0032_sa.imagery_tags: hidden pearl, veiled woman, guarded treasure

poem0032_sa.text_ar: في كل عام يزود حبه بعد زود أقفى بروحي والتوى في رسنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: Every year his love increases more and more, I follow with my soul while the bridle twists in its rein

poem0032_sa.text_ar: أموت بين الخد وعيونه السود وحواجب ربي بملحه قرنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: I die between the cheek and his black eyes, and eyebrows that God adorned with beauty
poem0032_sa.imagery_tags: cheeks, black eyes, eyebrows, physical beauty

poem0032_sa.text_ar: وشعر بدهن المسك والورد مكثود جديلةٍ تضمني واحتضنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: And hair perfumed with musk oil and rose, thickly braided, a plait that embraces me and I embrace it
poem0032_sa.imagery_tags: hair, musk, rose, perfume, braid, embrace

poem0032_sa.text_ar: ليلٍ جمعني به عسى ليته يعود يبعد عن النفس الحزينة حزنها
poem0032_sa.translation_en: A night that brought us together, may it return to distance sorrow from the grieving soul

poem0099_bh.text_ar: اكذبي يا سندريلا ملّي الدنيا بكذوبك
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Lie, O Cinderella, fill the world with your lies

poem0099_bh.text_ar: خلي العالم تصدق في سعادات النهاية
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Let the world believe in happy endings

poem0099_bh.text_ar: رتبي كل الحوادث سيري الأحداث صوبك
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Arrange all incidents, direct events toward you / You alone with your beloved
You alone with your beloved amidst paradise cells

poem0099_bh.text_ar: انت بس ويا حبيبك وسط جنات خلايا
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Let the world applaud behind your dress trains

poem0099_bh.text_ar: خلي العالم تصفق من وراء أذيال ثوبك
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Your dance was solitary in the beginning hours

poem0099_bh.text_ar: رقصتك كانت وحيدة في سويعات البداية
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Diamonds dangled from the sweetness of your heel's curve

poem0099_bh.text_ar: كان بك الماس يتدلى من حلا ورقة كعوبك
poem0099_bh.translation_en: No human picked it up after you / No human picked it up after him, and you returned among the barefoot
I ask you why you lied when you emptied your pockets

poem0099_bh.text_ar: ما التقطه إنسان بعده وعدتي من ضمن الحفايا
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Your beloved is not your beloved, nor did he run behind the palaces

poem0099_bh.text_ar: بسألك بس ليه كذبتي وإنتي نفّضتي جيوبك
poem0099_bh.translation_en: Perhaps you just ran after what your paths depicted / Your knight is someone else who returns and left you behind the veils

poem0099_bh.text_ar: لا حبيبك هو حبيبك ولا جرى خلف السرايا
poem0099_bh.translation_en: If you cried, if you yearned / He didn't gesture toward you

poem0099_bh.text_ar: يمكن إنتي يمكن إنتي بس ركضتي خلف ما صور
poem0099_bh.translation_en: He fell from love's garment / A body through which temptations flowed
Remove the dress of sin / Remove the dress of sin and wash away your sins
You legislated love / Missing a pair of front teeth
Lie, O Cinderella, and fill the world with your lies / Print your lie in a thousand copies and distribute among people
If only my yearning
He doesn't gesture with his glances towards you
The hem of love's garment has fallen
A body that distractions have afflicted
Take off the garment of sin
Take off the garment of sin
And wash away the burden of your sins
You are my law of love
Missing the pair of front teeth
Lie, O Cinderella
And fill the world with your lies
My nature has copied your lie a thousand times
And distribute me among the people

poem0098_bh.text_ar:
أعرفچ 
أعرفچ طفلة صغيرة ولو كبرتي
 وداخلچ باقي من الطفلة الصغيرة باقي ذكراها
وللذكرى كبتتي 
داخل عيونچ رقصها مستثيرة
كل لحنٍ لو نشدتي ما نشدتي
لحنها هذا الذي كانت 
لحنها هذا الذي كانت
poem0098_bh.translation_en: I know you as a little girl even though you've grown, and inside you remains something of that little girl, her memory remains

poem0098_bh.text_ar:
تبيرة
كل شكل لي رسمتي ما أجدتي
poem0098_bh.translation_en: Every shape you drew for me, you didn't master
You draw the painting with a borrowed brush

poem0098_bh.text_ar: تهربي منها تهربي منها وفيها أنت عشتي
poem0098_bh.translation_en: You flee from it while in it you lived

poem0098_bh.text_ar: أنت طفلة أمس بس لوّل قصيرة
poem0098_bh.translation_en: You are yesterday's child but now short
Say that you flee and that you denied
All her past whose embers she trod upon
Every patience she showed, you betrayed
Every path she drew and trod its ruggedness
Every rose that adorned the bouquet of my embrace
Every rose that adorned the bouquet of my embrace
Its removed thorn cut many
His dream that gathered wealth, you scattered it
His dream that gathered wealth, you scattered it
Penny upon penny, a treasure for the girl
Years gathered waiting for him
Years gathered waiting for him
My mercy did not dream of a dress she saw
Oh, I am poor/destitute
I drew him in all the notebooks
The one with a pink-colored constitution/essence

poem0098_bh.text_ar: ودوم به ربطة مثيرة وجه باسم
poem0098_bh.translation_en: And always with an exciting tie and a smiling face
And a bouquet in the hand of my group of friends
Held by the hand that carried fragrance
The smiling one deceives you, tomorrow with a mouth beneath
And your two roses, your drops trod them with a path
The years didn't care to end it, you grew up

poem0098_bh.text_ar: وان ثوب الأمس عنه انتي كبيرة
poem0098_bh.translation_en: And yesterday's dress, you are too big for it

poem0100_bh.text_ar: تقرأ نظراته وتدري
poem0100_bh.translation_en: You read his looks and you know

poem0100_bh.text_ar: أرخصك أرخصك تاجر جهل بالغوص عمق المسألة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He undervalues you, undervalues you, a merchant ignorant of diving into the depth of the matter

poem0100_bh.text_ar: ما تثمنتي بإيد العارفة غلا جوهرة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: You weren't valued by the hand of one who knows the worth of a pearl

poem0100_bh.text_ar: أرخصك تاجر جهل بالغوص عمق المسألة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He undervalues you, a merchant ignorant of diving into the depth of the matter

poem0100_bh.text_ar: أرخصك من هو احتفى بالنسخ وفرط بالأصل
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He undervalues you, one who celebrated copies and squandered the original

poem0100_bh.text_ar: علمك من هو رخص إنك تجازين بدلاء
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He taught you that you should repay him with loyalty

poem0100_bh.text_ar: كل أثمانك بقلبه كل أثمانك بقلبه صغر أصغر بوصلة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: All your values in his heart, all your values in his heart are smaller than the smallest compass

poem0100_bh.text_ar: ما درا إنك حياته لو على الموج اختلا
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He didn't know you are his life even if the waves differed

poem0100_bh.text_ar: ما درا انك نجومه وتاه في دنيا الشموع
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He didn't know you are a star and he got lost in a world of candles

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وش تخالي جاهلا بالصقر غير ان ياكله
poem0100_bh.translation_en: What do you expect from one ignorant of the falcon except to eat it

poem0100_bh.text_ar: يوم لذته دموعك وهي عمرك جارية
poem0100_bh.translation_en: When his pleasure was your tears flowing through your life

poem0100_bh.text_ar: هالمزون اللي بجوف البر ضاعت باطلة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: These provisions in the heart of land were lost in vain

poem0100_bh.text_ar: حرمچ حرمچ لمس الدفاتة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He forbade you, forbade you from touching warmth

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وسلبچ سترة غطاه واعتقد
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And robbed you of the veil that covered you and believed

poem0100_bh.text_ar: واعتقد برده سلامچ وان نيرانه صلا
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And believed his coldness was your peace and his fires were prayer

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وانحرم ينسى جفا الكون بعيونچ لو نظر
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And he was deprived of forgetting the world's harshness in your eyes if he looked

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وانحرم ينسى جفا الكون بعيونچ لو نظر
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And he was deprived of forgetting the world's harshness in your eyes if he looked

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وانحرم يلمس حنانچ يوم عن حضنچ
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And he was deprived of touching your tenderness when from your embrace

poem0100_bh.text_ar: سلا، صنفچ صنفچ ضمن الوصايف
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He consoled himself, classified you among the handmaidens

poem0100_bh.text_ar: وانت كنت المملكة وحسبچ ضمن الحشود
poem0100_bh.translation_en: While you were the kingdom and he counted you among the crowds

poem0100_bh.text_ar: ولچ عليها معتلى
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And you had elevation above them

poem0100_bh.text_ar: يا العزيزة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: O precious one

poem0100_bh.text_ar: يا العزيزة ما يذل بجوره من كمل عدد
poem0100_bh.translation_en: O precious one, he who has completed his count does not submit to oppression

poem0100_bh.text_ar: لي عرف انچ على عرش الصفوف الاولى
poem0100_bh.translation_en: I have known that you are on the throne of the front rows

poem0100_bh.text_ar: لانك تشوفين عجزه
poem0100_bh.translation_en: Because you see helplessness

poem0100_bh.text_ar: لانك تشوفين عجزه
poem0100_bh.translation_en: Because you see helplessness

poem0100_bh.text_ar: لانك تحسين ضعفه
poem0100_bh.translation_en: Because you feel his weakness

poem0100_bh.text_ar: حاول يداري عيوبه ويعمي راس المشكلة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He tries to hide his flaws and obscure the root of the problem

poem0100_bh.text_ar: هو عرف إنك عظيمة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He knew that you are great

poem0100_bh.text_ar: هو عرف إنك عظيمة وهو قدامك ذليل
poem0100_bh.translation_en: He knew you were great while he stood before you humbled

poem0100_bh.text_ar: واكتشف إنك بالاول وان جريه هرولة
poem0100_bh.translation_en: And discover that you were first even if your running was a trot

poem0053_om.text_ar: يا طير حلّق ما بقى في غابة أحشائي شجر
poem0053_om.translation_en: O bird, fly away, no trees remain in the forest of my entrails

poem0053_om.text_ar: والحق بسربك والعذر
poem0053_om.translation_en: Catch up with your flock, and excuse yourself, all birds are migrating, travel

poem0053_om.text_ar: كل الطيور مهاجرة سافر
poem0053_om.translation_en: You have five benefits, seize your days as they pass

poem0053_om.text_ar: ولك خمس فوائد واغنم أيامك عبر
poem0053_om.translation_en: What good is the world when your life is transient

poem0053_om.text_ar: وش تسوه الدنيا ما دامها حياتك عابرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: Whenever travel is mentioned, I become passionate about traveling, and the flight attendants' charm makes you forget the fear of flying

poem0053_om.text_ar: وكل ما يجيبوا للسفر طاري تولهت السفر
poem0053_om.translation_en: 'Please do you want drink' teaches you the meaning of numbness, and how if she smiles at you, it brings your life to its end

poem0053_om.text_ar: وغنج المضيفات الذي ينسيك رعب الطائرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: You wish the aisle would widen a bit as she walks, while you sway like a stick, distancing and accompanying her

poem0053_om.text_ar: please do you want drink
poem0053_om.translation_en: God has generously placed all virtues in your waist, while I bite my finger wishing you were traveling with me

poem0053_om.text_ar: تعلمك معنى الخدر
poem0053_om.translation_en: Cairo is your heart and your Nile is a pulse that makes you Egypt, truly without the Nile we wouldn't have known Cairo

poem0053_om.text_ar: وشلون لو ضحكت معاك تجيب عمرك آخره
poem0053_om.translation_en: Like me, a poor man had a dream last night that if we don't live in the palace, at least we'll be its neighbors

poem0053_om.text_ar: وكل ما يجيبوا للسفر طاري تولهت السفر وغنج المضيفات الذي ينسيك رعب الطائرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: Whenever poverty is mentioned, I curse you, O poverty, we are ladders even if we climb into wealthy pockets

poem0053_om.text_ar:
please do you want drink
 تعلمك معنى الخدر وشلون لا ضحكت معاك
poem0053_om.translation_en: Who taught this wealthy one that he equals dates? What if ambition lived a luxurious life?

poem0053_om.text_ar: تجيب عمرك آخره، ودك لو ان في مشيها يتوسع شوي الممر وانت تتمقل فيه عود يبعدك وتسايره
poem0053_om.translation_en: It is the key to relief, they said his name is Mr. Patience, O patience, until we memorize it in lessons

poem0053_om.text_ar: كل المكارم جاد ربي وحطها لك في خصر
poem0053_om.translation_en: For the poor there's nothing but prayer, protection O God, protection, and children whose laughter is hostage to harsh circumstances

poem0053_om.text_ar: وأنا أعضض أصبعي ليتك معاي مسافرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: People sleep with hunger gripping the thread of dawn, while others are entertained by greed with toasts and prostitutes

poem0053_om.text_ar: كل المكارم جاد ربي وحطها لك في خصر
poem0053_om.translation_en: O poetry, when good words have lost their value, and my pains in my chest cage are fighting each other

poem0053_om.text_ar: وأنا أعضض أصبعي ليتك معاي مسافرة
