poem0053_om.translation_en: Whenever poetry is mentioned, I mourn for poetry, when the arena becomes an editor seducing the poetess

poem0053_om.text_ar: القاهرة قلبك ونيلك نبض يحيلك مصر
poem0053_om.translation_en: He convinces himself saying she compensated her creativity with a moon face, and poetry gets its meager charity from every pocket

poem0053_om.text_ar: والصدق لولا النيل ما كنا عرفنا القاهرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And truly, if not for the Nile, we would not have known Cairo

poem0053_om.text_ar: ومثلي فقير له حلم في نومة البارح عبر
poem0053_om.translation_en: And like me, a poor man who had a dream in last night's sleep that passed

poem0053_om.text_ar: أن القصر لو ما سكنناه على الأقل نجاوره
poem0053_om.translation_en: If we cannot inhabit the palace, at least we can be its neighbors

poem0053_om.text_ar: وكل ما يجيبوا للفقر طاري لعنتك
poem0053_om.translation_en: And whenever they bring up the topic of poverty, I curse you

poem0053_om.text_ar: يا الفقر
poem0053_om.translation_en: Oh poverty

poem0053_om.text_ar: وإحنا سلالم وان تسلقنا الجيوب العامرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And we are ladders, and when the prosperous pockets climb us

poem0053_om.text_ar: من علمه يا هالثري
poem0053_om.translation_en: Who taught him, O this soil/earth

poem0053_om.text_ar: إنه يساوي من التمر
poem0053_om.translation_en: It equals dates

poem0053_om.text_ar: وش عاد لو كان الطموح
poem0053_om.translation_en: What if ambition exists

poem0053_om.text_ar: أحيا حياة الفاخرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: I live a life of luxury and pride

poem0053_om.text_ar: هو للفرج مفتاح
poem0053_om.translation_en: He is the key to relief

poem0053_om.text_ar: قالوا اسمه السيد صبر
poem0053_om.translation_en: They said his name is Master Patience

poem0053_om.text_ar: يا هالصبر لين ان صرنا بالدروس نذاكره
poem0053_om.translation_en: Oh patience, until we became studying it in lessons

poem0053_om.text_ar: هو للفقير الا دعاء
poem0053_om.translation_en: He has nothing for the poor but prayer

poem0053_om.text_ar: الستر يا الله الستر
poem0053_om.translation_en: O Allah, grant us concealment and protection

poem0053_om.text_ar: الستر وعيال حتى ضحكها رهن الظروف
poem0053_om.translation_en: And children whose laughter is hostage to circumstances

poem0053_om.text_ar: العاثرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: The stumbling one

poem0053_om.text_ar: ناس تنام ناس تنام وجوعها قابض على خيط الفجر
poem0053_om.translation_en: People sleep while their hunger grips the thread of dawn

poem0053_om.text_ar: وناس تسلي هالجشع في نخب كاس وعاهرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And people who entertain themselves with greed in toasting glasses and debauchery

poem0053_om.text_ar: ناس تنام وجوعها قابض على خيط الفجر
poem0053_om.translation_en: People sleep while their hunger grips the thread of dawn

poem0053_om.text_ar: وناس تسلي هالجشع في نخب كاس وعاهرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And people who entertain themselves with greed in toasting glasses and debauchery

poem0053_om.text_ar: ويا شعر يا اللي ما بقى للكلمة الطيبة قدر
poem0053_om.translation_en: Oh poetry, where the good word no longer has value

poem0053_om.text_ar: و أوجاعي اللي في قفص صدري هنا متناحرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And my pains that are in the cage of my chest here are conflicting with each other
poem0053_om.imagery_tags: chest as cage, internal conflict, pain personification

poem0053_om.text_ar: وكل ما يجيبوا للشعر طاري ترحمت الشعر
poem0053_om.translation_en: And whenever they bring up poetry as a topic, I have mercy on poetry

poem0053_om.text_ar: لا صارت الساحة محرر يستميل الشاعرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: When the arena becomes a liberator that captivates the poetess

poem0053_om.text_ar: وكل ما يجيبوا للشعر طاري ترحمت الشعر لا صارت الساحة محرر يستميل الشاعرة يُقنع بقوله عوضت إبداعها بوجه قمر
poem0053_om.translation_en: He is satisfied saying I compensated her creativity with a moon-like face

poem0053_om.text_ar: ولا الشعر من كل جيب له الزكاة القاصرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: Poetry is not from every pocket with its limited alms

poem0053_om.text_ar: نجمة غلاف وتوها يا دوب توزن لك صدر
poem0053_om.translation_en: A cover star, and she barely fits you a chest/heart

poem0053_om.text_ar: نجمة غلاف وشعرها لا ما تعدى الخاطرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: A cover star whose hair never crosses beyond the shoulder

poem0053_om.text_ar: نجمة غلاف ولا حكت أروع قصايدها هذر
poem0053_om.translation_en: A cover star who hasn't told her finest poems is nonsense

poem0053_om.text_ar: نجمة غلاف استوردت عذب الشعر بالباخرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: A cover star who imported sweet poetry by ship
poem0053_om.imagery_tags: star, magazine cover, ship, poetry, import

poem0053_om.text_ar: مليون فم وكلهم له بالأدب وجهة نظر
poem0053_om.translation_en: A million mouths and each has their own perspective on manners

poem0053_om.text_ar: مليون شاعر والشعر أحلى القصايد فاغرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: A million poets and poetry is the sweetest of poems overflowing

poem0053_om.text_ar: نشر الغسيل اللي اعتراها ساحة الشعر انتشر
poem0053_om.translation_en: The laundry that was spread in the poetry arena has scattered

poem0053_om.text_ar: قومي ابهري الساحة ما دام أن الكراسي شاغرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: Rise and dazzle the arena while the seats are still vacant

poem0053_om.text_ar: يا الله يا الله والدنيا فناء والابن آدم منتظر
poem0053_om.translation_en: O God, the world is ephemeral and the son of Adam awaits

poem0053_om.text_ar: ما نرجي إلا عفو حشرٍ مع وجوه باسرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: We hope for nothing but forgiveness on the Day of Gathering with frowning faces
poem0053_om.imagery_tags: judgment day, frowning faces, divine forgiveness

poem0053_om.text_ar: لحظة بها تتلى صحف والناس قد سيقوا زمر
poem0053_om.translation_en: A moment when records are recited and people are driven in groups
poem0053_om.imagery_tags: judgment day, divine records, crowds, reckoning

poem0053_om.text_ar: مالك سوى رب ينجي من هلاك
poem0053_om.translation_en: You have none but the Lord who saves from destruction

poem0053_om.text_ar: الآخرة يا طير يا طير حلق
poem0053_om.translation_en: The afterlife, oh bird, oh bird, fly high

poem0053_om.text_ar: ما بقى في غابة إحساسي شجر
poem0053_om.translation_en: There are no trees left in the forest of my feelings

poem0053_om.text_ar: والحق بسربك دامها كل الطيور مهاجرة
poem0053_om.translation_en: And catch up with your flock while all the birds are migrating

poem0046_sa.translation_en: O Allah, when the chests of the afflicted are constricted by prolonged grief, do not test them further
O Allah, do not leave the homes of travelers empty when the master who narrowed the paths comes to them

poem0046_sa.text_ar: ويا الله لا تخلي بيوت المسافير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: The clouds torment me and the birds sadden me, and I don't wish to walk upon this earth
In my eyes, the world is little from much, like a locust that whoever catches it roasts it
People have their direction and I have mine different, and every living being has a passion they pursue
Days are mixed, their clarity with turbidity, and Allah is generous and we hope for His mercy

poem0046_sa.text_ar: والأرض ما كن ودي امشي عليها
poem0046_sa.translation_en: I am patient and content with fate, expecting an hour of relief that I await
My sustenance is from Allah, when some arrangements honor is just a handful of papers you buy
I swore not to return, people are destined, and if my morsel humiliates me I don't desire it
Some people are like sparrows over what they have, and some Allah gave and made it pleasant for them
But among merchants how many are corrupt, chivalry has washed its hands of them
And how many poor ones guide the travelers, poetry's glory and its people protect it
I hold affection and appreciation for the good, and remember those of noble deeds and point to them
They say horses imitate the donkey's forehead, I praise some people with it and satirize others
O my friend, time has turned and Allah is the protector, from you a step reaches what it steps
Whoever has shortcomings from what he loves, tries to lower his head and protect it
And tries to find any justification for shortcomings, and as long as they're around him he wants to contain them
You can say it's a crisis that passed well, and I emerged from a whirlpool I was in
And you can say they were storms and hurricanes, I stood and declared my victory over them
When some plans/arrangements
His dignity is a handful of papers you can buy
I swore? He didn't respond, and people are sources/witnesses
And if your morsel would humiliate me, I don't desire it

poem0046_sa.text_ar: ناس على ما بهش مثل العصافير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: People are carefree like birds
And people whom God gave to and made them blessed

poem0046_sa.text_ar: لكن من التجار كم من عثيبير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: But among the merchants, how many are deceitful
Chivalry has washed its hands of him
How many poor people astonish the wealthy
poem0046_sa.imagery_tags: poor person, wealthy class, social contrast

poem0046_sa.translation_en: The glory of poetry, and no one can protect it
I hold deep affection and appreciation for goodness
And I remember those with tall stature and point to them

poem0046_sa.text_ar: وقالوا تحذى الخيل من جبهة العير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: And they said horses take warning from the donkey's forehead
With it I praise some people and satirize others

poem0046_sa.text_ar: يا صاحبي جار الدهر والله مجير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: O my friend, time has been unjust, but God is the protector
And from you, a step reaches whoever takes it

poem0046_sa.text_ar: لي جشّني لي مما يحبه تقاصير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: When he prepared for me what he loves, shortcomings appeared
He tries to lower his head and protect it
And he tries to find any justification for the shortcomings
As long as she is around him, he wants to embrace her

poem0046_sa.text_ar: تقدر تقول أزمة وعدت على خير
poem0046_sa.translation_en: You can say the crisis has passed peacefully
And I emerged from a whirlpool I was in
And you can say that they are storms and hurricanes
I stood and declared my victory over her

poem0047_sa.translation_en: He says, O evil time, where are the friends of halfway
They changed direction and extinguished the lanterns of trust, and if you ask their ruins, they answer your news is old
Their sun has set, O you whose sun is still shining, the belt knows from the beginning

poem0047_sa.text_ar: وان سألت أطلالهم جاوبت خبرك عتيق
poem0047_sa.translation_en: From the equipment it tightens, and later the belt breaks and no longer has a tear

poem0047_sa.text_ar: شمسهم غابت يا اللي عاد شمسك مشرقة
poem0047_sa.translation_en: I testify that in the heart from friends is a deep wound, and I testify that in the throat is a tear and in the chest a sob
I testify that the hope of the departed is a flowing mirage, and I testify that the rope of hope is like the rope of the gallows
I testify that some estrangement is right and I am deserving of it, and I testify I am right against all who have wronged
I testify that truth has left me no friend, and I testify that society believes its lies
I testify that some Arabs drown in a pitcher's pour, and some wouldn't drown even if a bucket pursued them
May God cut the rope of whoever doesn't make his rope tight, and may he stumble from his wandering, and to camels his sweat
O my existence, find the departed and catch up with them, and if bad luck returns, they are a rifle
O poisons of summer heat, there's no longer a leafy branch, the last branches of friendship on a scorching day
I learned when I divorced them the day I became free, and the bad one is like a woman - two witnesses and a paper
And I bear witness that my hope is fulfilled
A mirage that flows/runs smoothly

poem0047_sa.text_ar: وأشهد أن حبل الرجاء مثل حبل المشنقة
poem0047_sa.translation_en: And I bear witness that the rope of hope is like the rope of the gallows
And I bear witness that some harshness is justified
And I am truly worthy of it
And I testify that I am most foolish
Upon everyone who has righteousness within them

poem0047_sa.text_ar: وأشهد أن الصدق ما عاد خلا لي صديق
poem0047_sa.translation_en: And I bear witness that honesty no longer left me a friend
And I bear witness that society
Whoever lied to him, he believed

poem0047_sa.text_ar: واشهد أن بعض العرب تغرقه صبة ابريق
poem0047_sa.translation_en: And I witness that some Arabs are drowned by the pour of a teapot

poem0047_sa.text_ar: وأن بعضهم لو يهجده قنيف ما أغرقه
poem0047_sa.translation_en: And some of them, if a small wave hits them, they would not drown

poem0047_sa.text_ar: قطع الله حبل من لا جعل حبله وثيق
poem0047_sa.translation_en: May God sever the rope of one who does not make his rope strong
And he is broken from his dispersion
And the camels have their lineage
O my existence, a locked/closed passion
And they caught up with him, the pursuit
And if bad luck returns again
And they are a rifle
Oh scorching winds of summer heat
poem0047_sa.imagery_tags: desert wind, summer heat, scorching air

poem0047_sa.translation_en: There is no longer any branch or leaf
The last branches of friendship
A scorching day
I was told that you divorced them
The day I am free and unbound
And the response is like bitterness, two witnesses and a paper

poem_new_04.text_ar: يقول يا اللي مع المفرق الغربي تمرونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: He says to those who pass by the western crossroads

poem_new_04.text_ar: يا حظكم فيه يوم انكم تشوفونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: How fortunate you are if you get to see him

poem_new_04.text_ar: قولوا له العمر يركض والزمن يجري لا يحسب الناس والدنيا على هونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Tell him life rushes and time runs, don't think people and the world are easy

poem_new_04.text_ar: علمي به العام يوم ان جونا صافي قبل يجي جونا ناسٍ
poem_new_04.translation_en: Tell him about last year when June came clear, before people came searching for him

poem_new_04.text_ar: يحوسونه سروا به بموتر شكمانه يهيض لواحة لله يا قبضة
poem_new_04.translation_en: They went with him in a car, how many times it breaks down at the oasis, oh what a handful they drove him

poem_new_04.text_ar:
دركسونه يا زين مسرىً معه في ليلة قمراء على ظهر
 lexus
poem_new_04.translation_en: How beautiful a journey with him on a moonlit night on the back of a Lexus, you'd love its dashboard

poem_new_04.text_ar: يعجبك طبلونه ايه هالسواليف
poem_new_04.translation_en: Oh these stories

poem_new_04.text_ar: مدري عن سوالفكم فيني من الضيق شيء ما تحسونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: I don't know about your stories about me, from the distress there's something you don't feel

poem_new_04.text_ar: اللي تعلق بواحد ما درى عنه يا عزتي له
poem_new_04.translation_en: The one who attached to someone who doesn't know about him, oh my dignity for him

poem_new_04.text_ar: وكان الله في عونه يجيب طاريه متقصد ومتعمد
poem_new_04.translation_en: May God help him, he mentions him deliberately and intentionally

poem_new_04.text_ar: لعله يطيح في ناس يعرفونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Perhaps he'll come across people who know him

poem_new_04.text_ar: واللي يحبونه أهملهم وخلاهم حتى خسرك وخسر ناس يحبونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Those who love him, he neglected and left them, until you lost and lost people who love him

poem_new_04.text_ar: وحيد والوحدة أصعب شيء في الدنيا تكره الشخص في نفسه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Alone, and loneliness is the hardest thing in the world, makes a person hate himself

poem_new_04.text_ar: وفي كونه لا صار مديون هم وفاقد غالي
poem_new_04.translation_en: And in his existence, when he becomes indebted to sorrow and loses someone precious

poem_new_04.text_ar: بالله يا ناس كيف يسدد
poem_new_04.translation_en: By God, people, how does he pay

poem_new_04.text_ar: ديونه دايما يقولون عقب الشينة
poem_new_04.translation_en: His debts, they always say after hardship

poem_new_04.text_ar: الزينة وانا تعبت انتظر شي يقولونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Comes ease, and I'm tired of waiting for what they say

poem_new_04.text_ar: والله ما ابي منه شي ان كانه مقفي
poem_new_04.translation_en: By God, I don't want anything from him if he's turned away

poem_new_04.text_ar: ما غير أبا ادري عقب فرقاي
poem_new_04.translation_en: I just want to know after our separation

poem_new_04.text_ar: وشلونه ان كانه بخير
poem_new_04.translation_en: How he is, if he's well

poem_new_04.text_ar: قلت الله يسهّل له ماني بقايل عساها تدمع
poem_new_04.translation_en: I said may God ease things for him, I'm not one to speak ill, may his eyes

poem_new_04.text_ar: عيونه وان عاش من دوني الله يحفظه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Shed tears, and if he lives without me, may God protect him

poem_new_04.text_ar: لكن المشكلة الصدق كيف أعيش
poem_new_04.translation_en: But the problem is honesty, how do I live

poem_new_04.text_ar: من دونه تكفون يا اللي تجونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: Without him, how can you manage, O you who come to him

poem_new_04.text_ar: من يبشرني عساه ما زال رقمي
poem_new_04.translation_en: Who will bring me good news, hoping my number is still there

poem_new_04.text_ar: في تلفونه ابيه يذكرني ليا جيت في باله
poem_new_04.translation_en: In his phone I want him to remember me whenever I come to his mind

poem_new_04.text_ar: اني تحديت كل الناس
poem_new_04.translation_en: I have challenged all the people

poem_new_04.text_ar: لعيونه ذلت مشاعرك
poem_new_04.translation_en: Your feelings surrendered to his eyes

poem_new_04.text_ar: ما فاحت ولا صبت عط الملاهيف
poem_new_04.translation_en: It neither exhaled fragrance nor poured perfume for the yearning ones

poem_new_04.text_ar: فنجانٍ يذوقونه الحب
poem_new_04.translation_en: A cup from which they taste love

poem_new_04.text_ar: ما حرمه ربي ولا ذمّه
poem_new_04.translation_en: My Lord has not forbidden it nor condemned it

poem_new_04.text_ar: مدري ورا الناس والعالم يذمونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: I don't know why people and the world condemn him

poem_new_04.text_ar: سويت لك شي لو تزهم به أخوانك
poem_new_04.translation_en: I made something for you that would make your brothers proud

poem_new_04.text_ar: يبطون يبطون والله ما يسوونه
poem_new_04.translation_en: They delay, they delay, by God they are not worth it

poem_new_04.text_ar: سلامتكم
poem_new_04.translation_en: Your safety/wellbeing

poem0088_qa.translation_en: To hell with you and to hell with the world
And its people, I don't care about you

poem0088_qa.text_ar: حسافة، مات ابو خبزة وجا غيره
poem0088_qa.translation_en: What a pity, they didn't want bread and someone else came
And ate it, the truth is painful

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يقول البارحة والريح من تهامة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He says yesterday when the wind was from Tihama

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ودعتها من نجد للشرقية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I bid her farewell from Najd to the Eastern Province

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وودعت روحي يوم تاقت روحي لجيته وانا محب الجية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I bid farewell to my soul when my soul yearned for his coming, while I am one who loves the arrival

poem0085_qa.text_ar: البارحة والريح من تهامة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Last night, and the wind from Tihama

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ودعتها من نجد للشرقية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I bid her farewell from Najd to the Eastern Province

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ورقيت برج الفيصلية حتى حتى وصلت أدواره
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I climbed the Al-Faisaliah Tower until I reached its floors

poem0085_qa.text_ar: العلوية عين نظرها فوق قصر المصمك وعين نظرها من وراء الدرعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The noble woman's gaze reaches above Masmak Palace, and her gaze extends from beyond Diriyah

poem0085_qa.text_ar: راجعت استرجع التاريخ وأنا واقف في لحظةٍ ماهيب تاريخية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I went back to recall history while standing in a moment that is not historical

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا ذكرت الا دبي وشيخها وبرج العرب اللي سما في دبيه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I only remembered Dubai and its Sheikh, and Burj Al Arab that rose high in Dubai

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا ذكرت الا دبي وشيخها وبرج العرب اللي سما في دبيه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I only remembered Dubai and its Sheikh, and Burj Al Arab that rose high in Dubai

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وودعت روحي يوم تاقت روحي لجيته وأنا محب الجية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I bid farewell to my soul when my soul yearned for his coming, while I am one who loves the arrival

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلى قصر زعبيل قصر الفزعة، الله يطول لي عمر راعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: To Zabeel Palace, the palace of aid and support, may God prolong the life of its ruler

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بين النخيل اللي روت من كفه ما لا روت من غيمةٍ
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Among the palm trees that were watered from his palm rather than from a cloud

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وسمية الغصن من طرق الهبايب يمنع طرقي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the branch named by the winds' paths prevents my way
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: branch, wind, blocked path, nature obstacle

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يأشر عند أبو حدرية والشمس فوق الوردة أشعتها فستان عروس على مصرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He signals at Abu Hadriya while the sun above the rose, its rays like a bride's dress on an Egyptian woman
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: sun, rose, bride's dress, Egyptian woman, rays of light

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الا بدا لي شخصها المتواضع قدام ما اسمع منه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Her humble figure appeared to me before I heard from her

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا الله حيّه اشوف في عينها طموح الأمة والعدل والإعجاز والحرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Oh God, how alive she is, I see in her eyes the nation's ambition, justice, miracle, and freedom

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وقدام ما أقول الخطاب السامي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And before I speak the sublime discourse

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي يضم حروفي السامية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The one who embraces my noble letters

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا مسوي الفنجال
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O maker of the coffee cup

poem0085_qa.text_ar: كثر هيله
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Too much of his fuss/commotion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: والقهوة هريرية هريرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the coffee is Hariri, Hariri

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا بغيت تزعفره في الكيلة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And if you want to upset him in the measure/dealing

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لا تجعل كفوفك بها مملية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Do not make your palms tedious/boring

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أخذ من العلبة فقط ما يملأ
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He took from the box only what fills

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أصابع يدياتك الفوقية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The upper fingers of your hands

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الزعفران الغالي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The precious saffron

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي كنه حنا يماني في يدين
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Those who are like us are Yemeni in their hands

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بنية لا تخالط لونها مع لونه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A girl, do not mix her color with his color

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لا يقول لا شقراء ولا بنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He doesn't say whether she's blonde or brunette
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: hair color, blonde, brunette, physical appearance

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكن أقرب لون يقرب منه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But the closest color that approaches it

poem0085_qa.text_ar: دم الظبي في روضة محمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The gazelle's blood in a protected garden

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكن أقرب لون يقرب منه دم الظبي في روضة محمية في دلة من دلالنا اللي فيها من لاهب الجمر الحمر مارية، فنجالها ما هو يقدم إلا إلا الشيخ يحتمي طاريه فنجالها ما هو يقدم إلا إلا الشيخ مقدم في جاهية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But the closest color that resembles it is the blood of a gazelle in a protected meadow, in a coffee pot of ours that contains burning red embers, its coffee cup is not offered except to the sheikh who seeks its protection, its coffee cup is not offered except to the sheikh who is foremost in honor
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: gazelle blood, protected meadow, coffee pot, burning embers, coffee cup, sheikh

poem0085_qa.text_ar: شيخِ لا وقف في اللزوم الكائد ضاعوا شيوخ العملة النقدية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A sheikh who didn't stand firm in difficult obligations, the sheikhs of monetary currency were lost

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا انقضى اللازم شرب فنجاله
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Until the obligation of drinking his coffee cup is fulfilled

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وان ما انقضى كبه على الزولية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And when it was not fulfilled, he poured it on the carpet

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فنجالها الرايب بقند راسي ما هي من ادنى سوقها مشرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Her coffee cup of yogurt drink is at my head's sugar, she is not bought from the lowest market
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: coffee cup, yogurt drink, sugar, market, nobility

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا اندلق من بطنها مع فمها سيل حدر من طلعة القدية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Until it poured from her belly with her mouth a torrential flood from the hilltop's rise

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وفمها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And her mouth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وفمها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And her mouth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو أن أوله من تاليه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If only its beginning were like its end

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وفمها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And her mouth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أعوذ بالله من الشيطان الرجيم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Satan
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: divine protection, spiritual refuge, evil repulsion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وين خريبيش
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Where is Khuraibish

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا اندلق من بطنها مع فمها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Until it poured out from her belly with her mouth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: سيل حدر من طلعة القدية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A torrent descended from the slope of the hill

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وفمها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And her mouth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وفمها لو مقاس أولته
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And her mouth, if measured from its beginning

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مشابه لمقاسه في تالية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Similar to its measure in what follows

poem0085_qa.text_ar: كأنك تتفرج لك على زحليقة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: As if you're watching yourself on a slide

poem0085_qa.text_ar: في روضة للطفل تمهيدية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: In a kindergarten preparatory for the child

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا كسرت العين في مقبضها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the eye did not break in its handle

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مقبض صقيل مركب
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A polished handle, mounted/assembled

poem0085_qa.text_ar: في جنبية وكراسه المبروم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: In a dagger and its twisted cord

poem0085_qa.text_ar: حلقة حلقة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Ring by ring / Circle by circle

poem0085_qa.text_ar: عودش جرى ملتوية به
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Your return happened with twisted/crooked circumstances

poem0085_qa.text_ar: حية ولا منارة مسجد دمشقي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A snake rather than the minaret of a Damascus mosque
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: snake, mosque minaret, Damascus, religious architecture

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بناه أحد ملوك بنو أمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: One of the Umayyad kings built it

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إن جيت للمقعد
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When I come to the seat/gathering place

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لك الله كنه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: By God, it is as if

poem0085_qa.text_ar: كنه يقول الوصف
poem0085_qa.translation_en: As if he speaks the description

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وصفك فيه خف الذنول
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Your description contains lightness of burdens

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي لا جات السيدة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When the lady/mistress arrives

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تيماتها تيمات خيالية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Her themes are imaginary themes

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي قليل المعرفة يحسبها مهجنة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He who has little knowledge thinks she is a hybrid camel

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا هي عمانية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And she is not Omani

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا خلصنا من وصوف الدلة النجر دوره كان ذا أهمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When we finished describing the coffee pot, the Najr's turn was of great importance
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: coffee pot, traditional crafts, cultural objects

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو كان له منا ومنا مقبض والوزن أخف من الوزن ذا شوية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If only it had a handle from us and for us, and the weight was slightly lighter than this weight

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بلا تردد كنه كاس العالم دورة الألعاب الأولومبية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Without hesitation, as if it were the World Cup or the Olympic Games

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بلا تردد كنه كاس العالم دورة الألعاب الأولومبية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Without hesitation, as if it were the World Cup or the Olympic Games

poem0085_qa.text_ar: صوته إلا منه طرقه الهاون تقول جرس كنيسةٍ قبطية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: His voice when the mortar strikes sounds like the bell of a Coptic church

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ويد النجر لو أنك تبغى وصفة محتاج لك تركيبة فكرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the carpenter's hand, if you want a description, needs from you an intellectual composition

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكنه أهون علي من نسجي لأجمل بنات أفكاري الذيبية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But it is easier for me than weaving the most beautiful daughters of my wolfish thoughts

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يمنى صغير فيه غرغرينة في كفة ومحتاج عملية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A small right hand with gangrene in the palm needing surgery
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: medical condition, infected hand, surgical need

poem0085_qa.text_ar: قدام ما تصل يده قصوا كفه لكن يده على ما هي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Before his hand could reach, they cut off his palm, but his hand remains as it is

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أوصاف قد تركب وقد لا تركب لكن على قدر الشبه مبنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Descriptions may fit or may not fit, but they are built according to the degree of resemblance

poem0085_qa.text_ar: هذه وصوف الدلة من وجهة نظر
poem0085_qa.translation_en: This is the description of the coffee pot from a point of view

poem0085_qa.text_ar: عساها ما هي بعادية سويتها وأنا هناك لحالي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I hope what I did wasn't wrong while I was there alone

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وغنيتها لرضاك وأنا هنا
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I sang it for your satisfaction while I am here

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو كان مالي في النجر والدلة ووصوفها مصلوح بالمولية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If only my wealth were in coffee pots and their descriptions, adorned with loyalty
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: coffee pot, Arabic coffee, traditional hospitality

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكنها طقت في راسي وأبغي أفحص على قدراتي الشعرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But it struck in my head and I want to test my poetic abilities

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكنها طقت في راسي وأبغي أفحص على قدراتي الشعرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But it struck in my head and I want to test my poetic abilities

poem0085_qa.text_ar: بالله يا راعيها لا منها فاحت سوقها لشيخِ ضفني في فيّه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: By God, O her keeper, when her scent spreads, bring her to a sheikh who will host me generously

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وقل له ترى ابن الذيب مبلش روحه من عاده يداوم على الدورية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Tell him that Ibn Al-Theeb has exhausted his soul, as is his habit to persist in his rounds

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مرة أشوف أني بسيط وعادي مع عباد الله سواسية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Sometimes I see myself as simple and ordinary, equal with all of God's servants

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ومرة أشوف أني على المتسيد جني لو أن ماني بولد جنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And sometimes I see myself as a jinn upon the master, even though I am not the son of a jinn

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ومرة أشوف أني على المتسيد جني لو أن ماني بولد جنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Sometimes I see myself as a jinn upon the master, even though I am not the son of a female jinn

poem0085_qa.text_ar: قرايح الشعار فيها الأنثى وفيها الذكر والشعر ذكورية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The inspirations of poetry contain both feminine and masculine, but poetry itself is masculinity
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: gender duality, poetry craft, masculine essence

poem0085_qa.text_ar: قرايح لا من ضواها الهاجس جاءت تسلسل كأنها مدعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Inspirations that come not from the midday heat of anxiety, flowing as if they were pretentious

poem0085_qa.text_ar: البيت الأول يدعي اللي عقبه مثل الجمال اللي مع سرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The first verse calls upon what follows it, like camels traveling with a caravan

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وقرايح ما لام أبوها داعي مجبورة على الشعر جبرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And verses whose father never blamed their caller, forced upon poetry by compulsion
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: poetry personification, familial metaphor, creative compulsion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا كتبت بيتين بالميلادي يتكمل البيتين في الهجرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I wrote two verses in the Gregorian calendar, and the two verses are completed in the Hijri calendar

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا أكملت عشرين بيتٍ
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I haven't completed twenty verses

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا كتبت بيتين بالميلادي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I only wrote two verses in the Gregorian calendar

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تكمل البيتين في الهجرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The two verses are completed in the Hijri calendar

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا كملت عشرين بيتٍ قامت
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And before completing twenty verses, she stood up

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تكدها في الصبح والعصرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: You toil at it in the morning and afternoon
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: morning light, afternoon sun, continuous labor

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واللي قرايحهم على ذا الحالة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And those whose minds are in this state

poem0085_qa.text_ar: محتاجة لدكتور نسائية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: She needs a gynecologist

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو انهم ذكور قرايحهم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If only their minds were masculine/strong

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تعاني من الدورة الشهرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: She suffers from the monthly period

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو انهم ذكور قرايحهم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If only their minds were masculine/strong

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تعاني من الدورة الشهرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: She suffers from the monthly period

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وما يحزنك
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And what saddens you

poem0085_qa.text_ar: غير الرفيق الطيب
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Other than the good companion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي بيوته تاتي جفيعية والعادي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Those whose homes are visited by sudden calamities and ordinary matters

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي فوقه ومن تحته مجنون في الفكرة وفي القافية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The one above him and below him is mad in thought and in rhyme

poem0085_qa.text_ar: حالة لا أخصصها ولا أعممها لكنها مسموعة ومرئية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A situation I neither specify nor generalize, but it is heard and seen

poem0085_qa.text_ar: حبيت أوضح حالكم ولا أنا ماني بوكيل آدم على الذرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I wanted to clarify your situation, but I am not a guardian over Adam's descendants

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أسبح من بحور الشعر ما يحوي جزل البيوت الندّر القوية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I swim through seas of poetry that contain the most precious and powerful verses

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي يغنيها في وجه الحاكم لا طأطأت روسها الرعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He who sings it in the face of the ruler when the subjects have bowed their heads

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تنوع أسلوبي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: My style varies

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي أغنيها في وجه الحاكم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The one I sing in front of the ruler

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لا طأطأت روسها الرعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When the subjects bow their heads low

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وتنوع أسلوبي مع جمهوري
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I vary my style with my audience

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ليس بمدعاةٍ إلى السخرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: It is not a cause for mockery

poem0085_qa.text_ar: من أول عفوي لأني عفوي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: From my first forgiveness because I am forgiving

poem0085_qa.text_ar: والحين ما تصلح لي العفوية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And now spontaneity no longer suits me

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وتنوع أسلوبي مع جمهوري
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I vary my style with my audience

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ليس بمدعاة إلى السخرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: It is not a cause for mockery

poem0085_qa.text_ar: من الكوميديات أصنع ساخر
poem0085_qa.translation_en: From comedies I create satire

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وأصنع من الجدية الجدية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And I create seriousness from seriousness

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مثل السيوف لكل سيف شغله
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Like swords, each sword has its own purpose

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الاسم واحد
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The name is one

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكن الفرقية سيف مهو ينسل من جفيره
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But separation is a sword that cannot be unsheathed from its scabbard

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا لا ثوّر غبار الهية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Do not stir up the dust of passion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: سيف مهو ينسل من جفيره
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A sword that is not drawn from its sheath

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا لا جات العرضة الحربية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When the war dance comes forth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: سيف مهو ينسل من جفيره
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A sword that is not drawn from its sheath

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا لا ثوّر غبار الهية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Do not stir up the dust of passion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: سيف مهو ينسل من جفيره
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A sword that is not drawn from its sheath

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا لا جات العرضة الن
poem0085_qa.translation_en: When the Najdi war dance arrives

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لا حول ولا قوة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: There is no power nor strength (except with Allah)

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا بالله وعبادة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Only through God and worship

poem0085_qa.text_ar: عباده تصلي على نبيه، الشعر
poem0085_qa.translation_en: You pray upon his prophet, the poetry

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وصلني لحاجة تصعب انها توصلني لها رجليه منها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Take me to a need so difficult that my legs cannot carry me to it
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: journey, legs, difficult path, unreachable destination

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وقوفي قدم عينك وانا غريب ومن الديرة الغربية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I stand before your eyes as a stranger, from the western lands

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ومثلي الا منه وقف امامك لو كان نفسه بالرضا غنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And like me, except from him, stands before you even if his soul is content with satisfaction

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو قلت وش تبغي ابا اقول ابغي رضاك ولا حاجتي مقضية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If you asked what do you want, I'd say I want your satisfaction, and my need is not fulfilled
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: unfulfilled desire, seeking approval, emotional plea

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا سيدي قدام اجيكم فقري وأكدّ لي على عرب فقرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O my master, I come before you in my poverty, and confirm for me upon the poor Arabs

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واليوم من فضل الولي سبحانه ثم فضلكم أسلف الطرقية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And today by the grace of the Almighty, glorified be He, then by your grace, the paths have been paved

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا سيدي يا سيدي يا سيدي يا سيدي قدام أجيكم فقري
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O my master, O my master, O my master, O my master, I come before you in my poverty

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وأكد لي على عرب فقرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And he confirmed to me about the Arabs of Faqriya

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واليوم من فضل الولي سبحانه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And today by the grace of the Almighty, Glory be to Him

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ثم فضلكم أسلف الطرقية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Then your favor preceded the wayfarers

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وما غيرت مبادئي واخلاقي تداعيات الطفرة المالية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The repercussions of financial boom did not change my principles and morals

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكنني أحبك وأحب عيالك من عاد رأس المال كم ربية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But I love you and love your children, beyond capital how much profit

poem0085_qa.text_ar: من يوم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Since the day

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكنني أحبك وأحب عيالك من عاد رأس المال كم ربية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But I love you and love your children, beyond capital how much profit

poem0085_qa.text_ar: من يوم رغت الغترة الفضفاضة ودقيتها يا شيخ حمدانية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Since the day the loose ghutra fluttered and I adorned it, O Sheikh, in Hamdani style

poem0085_qa.text_ar: خلقت في الدنيا وحيد وعابر سبيل بين الآه والحنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I was created in this world alone and a passing traveler between sighs and tenderness

poem0085_qa.text_ar: كم مرة جريت صوتي ضايق بالعبرة المكنونة المخفية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: How many times I ran, my voice choked with hidden, concealed tears

poem0085_qa.text_ar: غنيت مرعية يا بنت بصوتي والظاهر انها ما هي بمرعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I sang to Mariyah, O girl, with my voice, but it seems she is not listening/caring

poem0085_qa.text_ar: للناس حاجة عندي وتعرفها لكن ما تعرف وش اللي لي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: People have a need from me and you know it, but you don't know what I need

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وإن قلت لا محدٍ عذر لآتي وإن قلت إيه من يثمّن إيه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If I say no, no one has an excuse to come, and if I say yes, who would value a yes

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واللي على درب الرجال يوقف توجب عليه الوقفة المسمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He who stands on the path of men must take the noble and renowned stance

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا توطاه الرجال وروح مثل مراح السيل في واديه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And men do not tread upon it, and it flows like the flood's course in its valley

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فإن شفتني واقف على بيبانك والناس دورية وراء دورية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If you see me standing at your door while patrols follow patrols

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فلا بخيل إلا بخيل بجاهة ولا ردي إلا ردي النية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: There is no miser except one who is miserly with his influence, and no vile person except one with vile intentions

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ناس من صدوف الزمان الأشهب ما عاد تبكيها الطعون الحية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: People who, from the harshness of gray time, are no longer made to weep by living wounds

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وناس من البطرة وزود النعمة تبكي على تغريدة القمرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And people from luxury and excess of blessings cry over the cooing of a dove

poem0085_qa.text_ar: والعالم الفوقية إلا طاحت تدعس عليها العالم التحتية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the upper world when it falls, the lower world tramples upon it

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وخير الأمور من الأمور أوسطها
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And the best of matters among all matters is their middle path

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إلا الأماكن شرها الوسطية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Except for places, the worst of them is mediocrity

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وقصايدي محصورة في سموك لأن صفاتك لك فقط حصرية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: My poems are confined to your highness, for your qualities are exclusively yours alone

poem0085_qa.text_ar: نار على هامة علم في قمة أطول جبال الكورة الأرضية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A fire atop a flag on the peak of the tallest mountain on Earth
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: fire, flag, mountain peak, summit, Earth

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ما فيه واحد ما يعرفك إلا غاوي و حدّه المكابر غية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: There's no one who doesn't know you except the misguided, and the stubborn one whose limit is delusion

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ونقول له بالانجليزي ولا باليعربي واللهجة العامية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And we tell him in English or in Arabic and the colloquial dialect

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يلي على درب الجبل وعيونك كأنها عيون الأرنب
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O you who walks on the mountain path, your eyes are like the eyes of a wild rabbit
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: mountain path, wild rabbit eyes, nature

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وان قلت عينك ما تشوف هذه غلطة لكن ما هي بعشوائية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And if you say your eye doesn't see, this is a mistake, but it's not random

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واحدة من الثنتين واختر منها واحدة وواحدة عادها مقفية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: One of the two, and choose from them one, and one remains locked away

poem0085_qa.text_ar: إن كان شوفك مثل عقلك قاصر بنقص لك نظرة طبية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If your vision is as limited as your mind, I'll prescribe you medical glasses

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وإن كان مبلي يا الله لا تبلانا
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And if there is a trial, O Allah, do not test us

poem0085_qa.text_ar: هذه تسمى حالةٍ نفسية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: This is called a psychological state

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ارتاح يا اللي شيختك محصورة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Rest now, you whose leadership is confined

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فقط في إثباتاتك الرسمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Only in your official documents

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ما انته بشيخ
poem0085_qa.translation_en: You are not a sheikh

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الشيخ والله غيرك الاسم هذا
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Sheikh, by God, no one but you deserves this title

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ما انته براعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: It did not end with a shepherdess

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو تبخش نجوم السماء بيدينك
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If the stars of the sky were to be generous in your hands

poem0085_qa.text_ar: خراطي وشيختك خراطية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Your lies and your pretense are all lies

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لو تبخش نجوم السماء بيدينك
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If the stars of the sky were to be scattered by your hands

poem0085_qa.text_ar: خراطي وشيختك
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Your nonsense and your arrogance

poem0085_qa.text_ar: خراطية ولو كان
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Nonsense/lies even if it were

poem0085_qa.text_ar: رأس المال عندك
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Capital/wealth is with you

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فايض ما انت من أهل الشيخة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Fayez, you are not from the people of nobility/leadership

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الفعلية بعض الدول
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Actions speak louder than words in some nations

poem0085_qa.text_ar: فيها قانون ثابت
poem0085_qa.translation_en: It has a fixed law

poem0085_qa.text_ar: أوضح من الإنارة الشمسية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Clearer than the solar illumination

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مبلغ معين لا امتلكه الواحد
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A certain amount that one does not possess

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يصير شيخ بصفةٍ رسمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He becomes a sheikh in an official capacity

poem0085_qa.text_ar: طبعا لو أن كومار
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Naturally, if Kumar

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ولا بابو اللي تبيع الخس في الجمعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And not the father of the one who sells lettuce at the cooperative

poem0085_qa.text_ar: رصيدهم يشقح حدود المية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Their balance barely reaches the limits of a hundred
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: financial scarcity, limited resources, economic struggle

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مليون ولا من تحتها المية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: A million and not from beneath it the hundred

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تامر وتنهي والرخوم
poem0085_qa.translation_en: You command and forbid while the vultures circle

poem0085_qa.text_ar: تلبي وانت أول المامورة المنهية لو انها بالمال كلٍ شايخ لكنها بالوقفة
poem0085_qa.translation_en: You respond even to forbidden commands, if it were about money everyone would boast, but it's about the sincere stance

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وانت يا بو راشد صدوق الوقفة ومواقفك ما هي بطبيعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And you, Abu Rashid, are true to your stance, and your positions are not ordinary

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وانت يا بو راشد صدوق الوقفة ومواقفك ما هي بطبيعية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And you, Abu Rashid, are true to your stance, and your positions are not ordinary

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مراجلك من عادك في بطن أمك مورّثة ما هي بإعلامية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Your courage since you were in your mother's womb is inherited, not for show

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكل طائي عصر، وانت الطائي اللي نعيش أفضالك الطائية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Every era has its Hatim al-Tai, and you are the Tai whose generous virtues we live by
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: legendary figure, timeless virtue, living legacy

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا سيدي ما انت بشيخٍ لانك تعطي وكفك تجزل العطية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O my master, you are not a sheikh just because you give, but because your hand is generous in giving

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ويا سيدي ما انت بشيخٍ لانك خليت من دولتك عالمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O my master, you are not a sheikh because you made your state international

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ويا سيدي ما انت بشيخٍ لانك سياسي ورؤيتك سياسية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And oh my lord, you are not a sheikh because you are a politician and your vision is political
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: false authority, political manipulation, religious facade

poem0085_qa.text_ar: لكن حاكم فيك ذي وهذه وهذه وهذيه وهذيه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: But the ruler in you is this one and that one and that one and that one and that one

poem0085_qa.text_ar: مشيئة الوالي وسبحان الله مشيئة الرحمن إلهية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: The will of the Almighty, glory be to God, the will of the Merciful is divine

poem0085_qa.text_ar: علي الطلاق أنك عريب المجنى وأعظم شيوخ الفترة الحالية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: By divorce oath, you are of noble lineage and the greatest sheikh of the current era

poem0085_qa.text_ar: علي الطلاق أنك عريب المجنى وأعظم شيوخ الفترة الحالية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: I swear by divorce that you are of noble lineage and the greatest sheikh of the current era

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ان كانني صادق تراني صادق وان قلتوا منافق فذنبي لي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If I am truthful, you see me as truthful, and if you say I'm a hypocrite, then my sin is mine alone

poem0085_qa.text_ar: في مذهب العجمان ما هي تطلق من ذمة العجمي ولا عجمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: In the doctrine of the Ajman tribe, she is not released from the obligation of the non-Arab man nor the non-Arab woman

poem0085_qa.text_ar: ان كانني صادق تراني صادق وان قلتوا منافق فذنبي لي
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If I am truthful, you see me as truthful, and if you say I'm a hypocrite, then my sin is mine alone

poem0085_qa.text_ar: في مذهب العجمان ما هي تطلق من ذمة العجمي ولا عجمية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: In the doctrine of the Ajman tribe, she is not released from the obligation of the non-Arab man nor the non-Arab woman

poem0085_qa.text_ar: يا سيدي ما حن سوات الراهب
poem0085_qa.translation_en: O my master, we are nothing but equals to the monk

poem0085_qa.text_ar: اللي قضى الايام رهبانية طمعان في الجنة وحوريتها ولا حصل جنة ولا حورية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: He who spends his days in monastic devotion, yearning for paradise and its houris, yet finds neither paradise nor houri

poem0085_qa.text_ar: نقزر الأيام يوم بيومه ونموت وبيوت الشرف مبنية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: We endure the days one by one and die while the houses of honor are built

poem0085_qa.text_ar: واقبل تحياتي وشكري وأنا إذا بغيتوني تراي هنيه
poem0085_qa.translation_en: Accept my greetings and thanks, and if you need me, you'll find me here

poem0085_qa.text_ar: وإن ما لقيتوني فدقوا رقمي أنا ولدكم وأنتو أبخس فيا
poem0085_qa.translation_en: And if you don't find me, then call my number, I am your son and you are the cheapest to me
poem0085_qa.imagery_tags: phone call, family relationship, value comparison

poem0085_qa.text_ar: الا حصل فزعة فطيب منكم وإن ما حصل تستاهل القافية
poem0085_qa.translation_en: If help comes from you, it's good and generous, and if it doesn't come, you deserve this poem's criticism

poem0084_qa.text_ar: أنا لو اوزّع على الناس ابتساماتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: I don't distribute my smiles to people / O you with dead feelings, what can revive them?
'You owe me' doesn't fatten my mustache / And people's actions don't match their principles
The opportunity is favorable and the topic is timely / And poetry is something that concerns me and I care for it
But it doesn't express my suffering / Unless it expresses the world and its outskirts
From a quarter-century experience my self has lived / Not every separation shakes the heart when mentioned
Except the empress of my heart and my desires / She stirs in the pool of my heart with her feet

poem0084_qa.text_ar: لكن ما هو يعبر عن معاناتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: O first love station of my stations / Nights that gathered me with you to water them
I come with my great ambitions / And leave having given her everything

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ضواحيها من تجربة ربع قرن عاشها ذاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And for you my heart behind the ribs doesn't sleep / Nor approaches your home when I intend to

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ما كل فرقى يهز القلب طاريها إلا
poem0084_qa.translation_en: Like a GMC that distances don't intimidate / Experienced in the world's beginning and end
Its slaughter when I meet the long-nosed ones / Like a docile camel that increases its owner's pride

poem0084_qa.text_ar: في بركة الخفاق رجليها يا أول
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And its mirrors before its hood are wide / Like the palms of an imam with a prayer he prays
And the horn honks with my honks / It ignites fire and doesn't extinguish it
Upon it the living enter the realm of the dead / And upon it the dead, I don't know where I take them
Between it and the people of Najd no relations / Neither does it approach them nor they approach it
And its sound like Ibn Murra's wind after my roar / The sigh of one burned by love's rejection

poem0084_qa.text_ar: وعليش قلبي وراء الأضلاع ما باتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: Leaning toward love with sighs / But finding no one in love to lean with her
And its wipers when they stand to kiss and come / Like an old woman's finger with many prayers
And its mudflaps when lined with bumps / Like a pampered girl's hips being trained

poem0084_qa.text_ar: وعليش قلبي وراء الأضلاع ما باتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: When hit by strong wind / She feels it's trying to flip her
And he won't come near your home the day I intend to visit it
Like a wild camel that distances do not intimidate
Wandering aimlessly through the beginning and end of this world

poem0084_qa.text_ar: منحره لا أقبل مع خشم الطويلاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: From his throat, I do not accept with the nose of the arrogant ones
A slaughtered camel that feeds on its herder's liver
And his mirror without his stumble are my broad ones
The hands of an imam with a prayer that he calls upon
And the Hawli sprays/splashes

poem0084_qa.text_ar: منحره لا أقبل مع خشم الطويلاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: From his throat, I do not accept with the nose of the arrogant ones
A slaughtered camel that feeds on its herder's liver
And his mirror without his stumble are my broad ones
The hands of an imam with a prayer that he calls upon
And the Hawli (pearl diver) dives and his diving matches my diving

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ـلوفاتي يولع النار ولا ما يطفيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: He ignites the fire but never extinguishes it
Upon him the living enter the realm of the dead
And upon it are the dead, I don't know where to take them

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ما بينه وبين اهل نجد علاقات
poem0084_qa.translation_en: There are no relations between him and the people of Najd
Neither does she come close to him nor does he come close to her

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ما بينه وبين اهل نجد علاقات
poem0084_qa.translation_en: There are no relations between him and the people of Najd
She doesn't come close to him, nor does he come close to her

poem0084_qa.text_ar: وصوته لا ريح بنمرة عقب زتاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And his voice when the wind of Ibn Murra comes after my provisions
The sigh of one whose heart is burned by love's rejection
Sighing for love with deep breaths

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ولا لقت في المحبة من يناحيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And she found no one in love to stand by her side
And its two areas when they rise to kiss and come
The finger of an old woman with many complaints
And its two areas when they rise to kiss and come
The finger of an old woman with many complaints
And its fluttering wings when they line up at the speed bumps
The curves of a girl from blessings/nobility
You train her when I butt heads with her

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ورفارفه يوم تصف بالمطبات عيوب بنتٍ من النعمة
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And its fluttering when it lines up at the speed bumps, flaws of a girl from privilege
poem0084_qa.imagery_tags: car suspension, speed bumps, privileged girl, revealing flaws

poem0084_qa.text_ar: تدربيها، ليا نطحها هوا هيفية عاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: You train her, when the fierce gentle wind strikes her
You feel that he is following/tracking you from the group
The jackhammer has grown, its children and daughters
The Lexus, the Porsche, the BMW and its siblings

poem0084_qa.text_ar: ان قلت يا الjeep خاوه قال ما احاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: If I said O pocket, befriend him, it said I don't care
But his religion has its followers who support it
He drinks my coffee cups and breaks my glasses
And he extends his leg across my path and bends it

poem0084_qa.text_ar: وان قلت يا الford قال الford سكاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: And I said O Ford, the Ford said my silence
Some paths you don't want to encounter them
The GMC is creativity from all my directions

poem0084_qa.text_ar: كنه قصيدتك ذي اللي على إيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: As if your poem is the one that is upon it
A source/origin to Fujairah with a Croatian name
He studies the sciences of nature in its aspects
He bought it, a Saudi from an Emirati
He sold to a Hadhrami who was leaving with it

poem0084_qa.text_ar: مصدر للفجيرة باسم كرواتي يدرس علوم الطبيعة في نواحيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: A source to Fujairah with a Croatian name, studying natural sciences in its surroundings
poem0084_qa.imagery_tags: travel, foreign names, scientific study, geography

poem0084_qa.text_ar: شراه واحد سعودي من إماراتي باعه على حضرمي رايح فيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: He bought it, a Saudi from an Emirati who sold it to a Hadhrami who's going with it

poem0084_qa.text_ar: الحضرمي كل ما خزن من القات الحاجة اللي على باله يسويها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: The Hadrami, whenever he stores qat, whatever is on his mind he will do it

poem0084_qa.text_ar: باعه على حضرمي رايح فيها والحضرمي كل ما خزن من القاتي
poem0084_qa.translation_en: He sold to a Hadhrami who was doomed in it, and the Hadhrami whenever he stored from the khat

poem0084_qa.text_ar: الحاجة اللي على باله يسويها ولا
poem0084_qa.translation_en: The need that's on his mind, he does it without hesitation

poem0084_qa.text_ar: خواطر خفوقي وآخر أبياتي قصايدي كل أبيها قد سمعتيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: The thoughts of my heart and the last of my verses, my poems, every one of them you have heard

poem0084_qa.text_ar: أي والله اني عشقت رضاك بالذاتي ما به مساحة بقلبي ما مشيتيها
poem0084_qa.translation_en: Yes by God, I have loved your satisfaction with my very essence, there is no space in my heart that you have not walked through
poem0084_qa.imagery_tags: heart as landscape, walking through spaces, complete occupation

poem0084_qa.translation_en: Oh my sweet Nile
Oh my Tigris
Oh my Euphrates
O homeland of love
Her street
And her pride
And oh most eloquent poem
Upon her are my movements
Nothing brings wonder to my eyes
Her reader/One who reads her
Let the tears of your eyes scatter
Do as I do
Tell me, is it like this in your sleeve
Then he walked her away
Peace/Greeting

poem0082_qa.text_ar: يا حسن من عادني طفل ماني باسمّي معظم الأشياء بأسماءها
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Oh how beautiful, whoever opposes me is a child, I won't name most things by their names

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وقدني صيّة كل ما قالوا عروبة قمت أشمّر كمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And I was led astray, whenever they said 'Arabism' I would roll up my sleeves

poem0082_qa.text_ar: والعروبة سوقها طايح على ربية أسمع بذو أسمع بقومية معمر
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Arabism's market has fallen to the ground, I hear of this, I hear of Gaddafi's nationalism

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وذبح الذمي لكن الذمي بخير وماتت القومية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And the dhimmi was slaughtered but the dhimmi is fine, and nationalism died

poem0082_qa.text_ar: بس أنا من أهل قطر ولا اني بمهتم لي مع بوش الابن
poem0082_qa.translation_en: But I'm from Qatar and I don't care, I have a personal relationship with Bush Jr.

poem0082_qa.text_ar: بس أنا من أهل قطر ولا اني بمهتم لي مع بوش الابن علاقة شخصية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: We have the largest base drinking the poison's dregs, meaning America is our friend, we're not insignificant

poem0082_qa.text_ar: عندنا أكبر قائدة تشرب ذحاح السمي يعني أمريكا صديقتنا ما حن بشوية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Any one of you who thinks to boil my blood, I swear I'll inform the American forces

poem0082_qa.text_ar: أي واحد منكم يفكر يفوّر دمي والله أن أعلم القوات الأمريكية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Your poet's problem is he doesn't specialize, he generalizes, thoughts mix and burden the psyche

poem0082_qa.text_ar: بس أنا من أهل قطر ولا اني بمهتم لي مع بوش الابن علاقة شخصية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Oh my obsession, grow the idea and I'll grow the audience's amazement at the rhyme structure

poem0082_qa.text_ar: عندنا أكبر قائدة تشرب ذحاح
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Cool down oh audience's passion or heat up, I'm ready to make the audience laugh at a eulogy

poem0082_qa.text_ar: السم يعني أمريكا صديقتنا ما حن بشوية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: For eight years I've wanted to write a poem about my mother but fear men will say what's the occasion

poem0082_qa.text_ar: اي واحد منكم يفكر يفور دمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Your frame doesn't support tenderness, until once my mother wrapped my ghitra in my lap

poem0082_qa.text_ar: والله أن أعلم القوات الأمريكية مشكلة شاعركم أنه ما يخصّ
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Mohammed, and I said: name my heart's veins, she said: Mohammed, and I said: oh longing one

poem0082_qa.text_ar: يعمّ تختلط الأفكار والشرهة على النفسية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Al-Ajman, if they covet a sip of my blood, what would you do being Ajami to your Murri mother?

poem0082_qa.text_ar: يا هجوسي نمي الفكرة وأنا بنمّي دهشة الجمهور من تركيبة القافية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: I said: Don't die or I'll die carrying my burden, oh I'd sacrifice for your two feet, you terrorist

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وأبردي يا لهفة الجمهور ولا حمّي مستعد أضحّك الجمهور
poem0082_qa.translation_en: I swear I'll slaughter an Ajami woman from Al-Ajman for you, and maybe bring my father from his grave

poem0082_qa.text_ar: في مرثية، من ثمان سنين وانا أبغى اكتب قصيدة في أمي بس أخاف ان الرجال
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Slaughter me oh Al-Murra and spill my blood, I swear I'll die loving my Murri woman

poem0082_qa.text_ar: تقول وش داعية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Let no one misunderstand, the poem is about my mother, I said it while sad and it came spontaneously

poem0082_qa.text_ar: من ثمان سنين وانا ابغى اكتب قصيدة في أمي بس أخاف ان الرجال
poem0082_qa.translation_en: For eight years I've wanted to write a poem about my mother but I fear what men would say

poem0082_qa.text_ar: تقول وش داعية وانته جنوبك كبار وعظمك الملتمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She says what's your purpose when your sins are great and your bones are aching

poem0082_qa.text_ar: ما يساعد هيكلك أصلًا على الحنية، لين مرة من حد المرات
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Your frame/body doesn't help with tenderness at all, until one time out of many times

poem0082_qa.text_ar: ما يساعد هيكلك أصلاً على الحنية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Your frame/body cannot bear tenderness at all

poem0082_qa.text_ar: لين مرة من احد المرات
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Until one time among the times

poem0082_qa.text_ar: لدّت يمّي غترتي في حضني
poem0082_qa.translation_en: I wrapped my ghitra close to my chest beside me

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وما أدري وين الطاقية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And I don't know where the cap is

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: محمد
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Mohammed

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وقلت: عروق قلبي سمّي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And I said: The veins of my heart are my poison

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: محمد
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Mohammed

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وقلت: الشوق يا طاريه
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And I said: Oh longing, you who comes unexpectedly

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: العجمان
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Al-Ajman

poem0082_qa.text_ar: لو تطمع في شربة دمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: If you crave to drink my blood

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وش تسوي وانت عجمي في أمّك المريّة؟
poem0082_qa.translation_en: What are you worth when you're a foreigner in your doubtful mother?

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: محمد، وقلت: عروق قلبي سمّي، قالت: محمد، قلت: العز ياطاريّه، قالت: العجمان لو تطمع في شربة دمي وش تسوي وانت عجمي في أمك المريّة؟ قلت: لا تموتين وإلا مُت.. قالت العجمان لو تطمع في شربة دمي وش تسوي وانت عجمي في أمك المريّة
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Mohammed, and I said: name the veins of my heart

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قلت: لا تموتين وإلا متت شيلي همي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: I said: Don't die, or else I'll die; carry my burden

poem0082_qa.text_ar: يا فديت رجولش الثنتين يا إرهابية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Oh I would sacrifice myself for your two legs, oh terrorist

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت العجمان لو تطمع في شربة دمي وش تسوي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Al-Ajman said: If you crave to drink my blood, what would you do?

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قلت: شين الليل يا مرية دوري لي ثار
poem0082_qa.translation_en: I said: The night is bad, O Mariya, turn around for me, I have revenge

poem0082_qa.text_ar: ما يمتد لأبناء عمي، ما هي بلحية بني عمي!
poem0082_qa.translation_en: It doesn't extend to my cousins, it's not by the grace of my cousins!

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: لي هي!
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: It's me!

poem0082_qa.text_ar: ما هي بلحية بني عمي!
poem0082_qa.translation_en: It's not about my cousins' beard!

poem0082_qa.text_ar: قالت: لي هي! اسكني بين الضلوع الكايدات وزمّي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: She said: Here I am! Dwell between the burning ribs and hold tight

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وانحري قلبي بحدّ السيف والشبرية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And slaughter my heart with the edge of the sword and dagger

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وخلي إذنش ثابتة واللي تسولف فمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Keep your ear steady and what my mouth speaks

poem0082_qa.text_ar: والله ان أذبح من العجمان لش عجمية ويمكن أطلّع أبي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: By God, if I slaughter from the Ajman tribe, it's for an Ajman woman, and perhaps I'll reveal my father

poem0082_qa.text_ar: موجودين هناك مشاكلهم واجد يا الربع
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Their problems exist in abundance, oh companions

poem0082_qa.text_ar: والله ان أذبح من العجمان لش عجمية ويمكن أطلّع أبي من قبره المنطمي
poem0082_qa.translation_en: By God, if I slaughter from the Ajman tribe a Persian woman, I might bring out my father from his buried grave

poem0082_qa.text_ar: وأذبحه تسعين ذبحة بالدموع الحية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: And I slaughter him ninety slaughters with living tears

poem0082_qa.text_ar: اذبحوني يا آل مرة واستبيحوا دمي والله أنا أموت وأنا أحب لي مرية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Kill me, O tribe of Murrah, and spill my blood freely, by God I die while I love my Murrah woman

poem0082_qa.text_ar: اذبحوني يا آل مرة واستبيحوا دمي والله أنا أموت وأنا أحب لي مرية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: Kill me, O tribe of Murrah, and spill my blood freely, by God I die while I love my Murrah woman

poem0082_qa.text_ar: لا أحد يفهم خطأ ترى القصيدة في أمي قلتها وأنا حزين وجت تلقائية
poem0082_qa.translation_en: No one understands wrong, you see the poem about my mother I said it while sad and it came spontaneously

poem0086_qa.text_ar: قالوا أبهق قال ذا موضة جديدة، والتفت وقلت يسعد لي مساكم جاكم اللي ما تتعبه القصيدة ان بغى يتعب عليها قال جاكم وان تعذّرها المحرر في الجريدة والله ان اكتب على طوفة حداكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: They said 'Albahaq', he said this is a new trend, and I turned and said good evening to you. The one who isn't troubled by poetry has come to you, if he wants to trouble himself with it, he said he came to you. And if the editor rejects it in the newspaper, by God I'll write on the edge beside you

poem0086_qa.text_ar: اتشفّق لسعد ولا نشيده لا قعد يجذبكم ويرجعكم وراكم وابو خالد المسافات البعيدة ان بغيته شاعر ولا ملاكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: I sympathize with Saad and won't praise him, lest he sits pulling you and bringing you back. Abu Khalid of the long distances, if you want him as a poet or your angel

poem0086_qa.text_ar: لا تغنى كنه يسحب من رصيده ما يسد افواه ثلثين أفقراكم، يا كويت المرجلة فرصة سعيدة
poem0086_qa.translation_en: Don't sing as if he withdraws from his balance what doesn't fill the mouths of two-thirds of your poor. O Kuwait of manliness, a happy opportunity

poem0086_qa.text_ar: ويا جماهير المعزة وش بلاكم الصراحة والحقيقة والوكيدة داءكم طيبتكم وحبي دواكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: O crowds of affection, what's your affliction? Frankness, truth, and certainty - your illness is your kindness and my love is your cure

poem0086_qa.text_ar: تحملون أمراض الأفكار الحميدة الله لا يعافيكم من اللي بلاكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: You carry the diseases of benevolent thoughts, may God not cure you from what afflicts you

poem0086_qa.text_ar: لو صلاة الله تضمنها عبيده والله ان اقول صلى الله عليكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: If God's prayer were guaranteed by His servant, by God I would say may God's prayers be upon you

poem0086_qa.text_ar: والبهق فوائده فعلا عديدة كيف بفهمكم وبكسب رضاكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: And albahaq has many benefits indeed, how can I make you understand and gain your satisfaction

poem0086_qa.text_ar: لو حداكم شافني وسط الجريدة ثم يقابلني في شارع قال جاكم
poem0086_qa.translation_en: If one of you sees me in the middle of the newspaper then meets me in the street, he'll say 'he came to you'

poem0089_qa.translation_en: O desire of the soul, O desire of the soul
When the heart constricted, it piled the heart's depths
Straighten your stature, O temptation of the graceful ones when love intensifies
Poison upon the heart from behind and in front
O curve of the neck, when you spoke with your mouth: I entrust you to God, a love that kills its passion

poem0089_qa.text_ar: ويا فتنة الغيد يوم ان الغلا زمّش
poem0089_qa.translation_en: I'm not saying may God water my departure yesterday, but may God water the era of love and its days
A person in the eyes of who cherishes them doesn't matter, no tear falls but their head falls
My soul like Abu Zaid before death didn't gather, shake a figure dressed properly like proper attire
Pure that her maternal uncle and paternal uncle bought her, the noble men's leader tightens his belt for her
Let me fall, let me fall from a cliff to a ravine, a great fall that bones can't bear anymore
Criminal of love, what's wrong if he drank from your blood, as long as after you his beginning moment is his execution
Whether distance is long or short doesn't matter, you're in my face, poetry's face, and prominence
In the heart you were in your father's or mother's embrace, until love dies and we shroud its dreams
My soul walks away

poem0089_qa.text_ar: لكن سقى الله عصر الحب وأيامه الشخص في عين من يغليه لا همش ما يطيح له دمعة
poem0089_qa.translation_en: But may God water the era of love and its days, the person in the eye of who cherishes him is never marginalized and no tear falls for him

poem0089_qa.text_ar: الا تطيح له هامة، روفي بابو زيد قبل يموت ما لمّش
poem0089_qa.translation_en: Until a head falls for him, my soul, Abu Zaid before he died did not gather/collect

poem0089_qa.text_ar: وهزي قوام لا هندم كن هندامة أصيلةٍ قد قناها خالش وعمش
poem0089_qa.translation_en: And sway a figure that when dressed appears as noble attire, refined by her maternal and paternal uncles
poem0089_qa.imagery_tags: swaying figure, noble dress, family refinement

poem0089_qa.text_ar: ولها عقيد النشامى يكرب حزامه وخليني أطيح خليني أطيح
poem0089_qa.translation_en: And for her, the leader of brave men tightens his belt, and let me fall, let me fall
From a secluded place
Until the fall collapses/diminishes
The elder can no longer be carried
His bones are criminal
Precious, what's wrong with it

poem0089_qa.text_ar: ان شرب من دمّش ما دام
poem0089_qa.translation_en: If he drinks from what is mixed/blended, as long as it lasts
After you, the beginning of his moment
His execution, even if delayed
Distance, even if it doesn't last long
Don't be marginalized, you are in my face
And the face of poetry and inspiration
In the heart there is a nest in an embrace
I will stay and not leave
Until love dies and we shroud it
His dreams until he dies
Love and we shroud its dreams

poem0090_qa.translation_en: May you live a hundred years, O you who have taken my heart
It is written on my forehead that I have accepted you
In my conscience, love and respect are twins for you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ولي في ضميرك مثل ما أنا بغيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: And I hope in your conscience there is the same as I desired you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ولك منزل في نايف القلب وخيام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: You have a dwelling and tents in the heights of my heart
The herds of passion graze there and I never complained about you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: يفطر عليك القلب وان فارقك صام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: The heart breaks its fast on you, and if it parts from you it fasts

poem0090_qa.text_ar: والله لو انك شوك سدرة كليتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: By God, even if you were thorns of a lote tree, I would eat you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: القلب طير لا دعي للهوى حام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: The heart is a bird that circles when passion calls

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ولا انت وكره من كثر ما هويتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: You are not a nest despite how much I loved you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: كن العيون من النظر عقبك أيتام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: As if eyes became orphans from looking after you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: وكني ما رأيت الا انت من يوم رأيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: As if I saw nothing but you since the day I saw you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: وكنك معي وأنا فقدتك من أعوام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: As if you're with me though I lost you years ago
With imagination I meet you as if I found you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: من صعب وصلك ما تهنيتك أحلام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: Due to the difficulty of reaching you, dreams didn't congratulate me
When they brought you, my longing increased and I erased you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: من صعب وصلك ما تهنيتك أحلام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: Due to the difficulty of reaching you, dreams didn't congratulate me
When they brought you, my longing increased and I erased you
It means your union is difficult
And my goals are illusions
It means I planted you for fate but didn't harvest you
Your patience
The Arabs say all days
One day is for you and one day is against you
I came to you, oh heart
O you who inherited wounds and pains

poem0090_qa.text_ar: بليتني ما هوب أنا اللي بليتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: You afflicted me, but I am not the one who afflicted you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ولعتني من عادني في الهوى خام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: She set me ablaze, whoever opposed me in love remained raw/unrefined
And you were excessive with me
And I gave you my reins
I obeyed you and the essence of my obedience to you
Worry and passionate love

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ما الله كتب لي واستخرت وعصيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: What God has written for me, I sought guidance and disobeyed you
I obeyed you and the essence of my obedience is worry and infatuation

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ما الله كتب لي واستخرت وعصيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: What God has written for me, I sought guidance and disobeyed you
poem0090_qa.imagery_tags: fate, divine will, disobedience, istikhara prayer

poem0090_qa.translation_en: If hearts had markets with sellers and bargainers

poem0090_qa.text_ar: لا أبدّلك وان جيتني ما شريتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: I won't replace you, and if you come to me, I won't buy you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ولا انت يا اللي جيش عينيك مقدام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: And you are not the one whose army of eyes advances forward

poem0090_qa.text_ar: لا اقنعت منك والرجاء ما رجيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: I am not satisfied with you and the hope I had in you is gone
As if I am a prisoner between release and execution
As if you are a prison that I built myself

poem0090_qa.text_ar: عقب الوصال اللي على عين من لام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: After the union that was in plain sight of those who blamed

poem0090_qa.text_ar: قد هو يكفيني عن الوصل صيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: Your reputation alone suffices me instead of union
And it ignites me when I pass through the main street
I complained from what's in my conscience and called upon you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: أدري إن صوتي ما قطع عشرة أقدام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: I know that my voice doesn't travel ten feet

poem0090_qa.text_ar: وأدري بي أعود إلا من نصيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: And I know I will return except from what I advised you

poem0090_qa.text_ar: يا شينها يا محنّي راس الإبهام
poem0090_qa.translation_en: Oh how ugly it is, oh one who bends the thumb's head

poem0090_qa.text_ar: ما أقدر على شوفك وأنا عند بيتك
poem0090_qa.translation_en: I cannot bear to see you while I'm at your house

poem0096_qa.text_ar: ماني بمن يآتي ولا يدرى به، شطرٍ حفظته ما عرف كتّابه
poem0096_qa.translation_en: I am not one who comes without knowing, a verse I memorized whose writer is unknown
A verse that suits me for a night like this, and I see myself in this place most worthy of it

poem0096_qa.text_ar: واشوفني في ذا المكان أولى به
poem0096_qa.translation_en: I want to rely on Allah, and what excellence in Allah, who doesn't close His door to His creation
I will speak and let the committee evaluate my words, and from the multitude of poets I am not concerned

poem0096_qa.text_ar: اللي ما يوصد دون خلقه بابه
poem0096_qa.translation_en: Praise be to Allah, I am confident in myself, and if I am a wolf, then men are wolves
I don't say I'm the best poet in the world, but my poetry is worthy and I know it
Poetry gathered us though we are separated, our borders and overwhelming circumstances
May Allah honor the face of the idea's owner, by Allah's glory it counts in his favor
May Allah honor the face of who sponsors it, Mohammed may Allah preserve him for his loved ones

poem0096_qa.text_ar: ما أقول أنا أشعر واحد في العالم
poem0096_qa.translation_en: Mohammed bin Zayed of noble lineage, Crown Prince of the captivating homeland

poem0096_qa.text_ar: لكن قصيدي كفو و انا أدرى به
poem0096_qa.translation_en: Poetry has been our history from long ago, and our media when years were harsh
Poetry is a house and meter its pillars, meaning is its ropes and rhyme its curtain
Poetry is a valley with much prey, and everyone drives their mounts to the valley
Ideas are prey, every poet a hunter, each fattening their mustache with their talons
Some have free imagination, some a falcon, some imagination like a pigeon in a cage
My imagination whenever I guide it turns to the valley and hunts its eagle
I participated to represent my homeland and territories, each represents their homeland and relatives
By Allah if Allah wills and says it, I will hand it the pride and its book
My home is Qatar, and I'm here representing it, glory is my goal and I seek it
A pledge upon me not to honor my home like a boy who doesn't cherish its soil
See my blood from its love is grape-colored, my enthusiasm from its light is youthful
Poetry is a house and meter is its pillars
Its meaning is a tent rope and its rhyme is its veil
Poetry is a valley with abundant game
And everyone rushes their camels through the valley
And thoughts are prey
